name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Defeat DEI Survey
body:
It’s time for merit to make a comeback.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvj7flil2q826evpnr9rsq2dlltenve1snhghn40_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j6aoj2chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

It's time for merit to make a comeback.

[That's why I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3s8g833lltvq953daq7eurb301fu76fubmehlq0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j6aoj2chh2bs).

Like many Americans, I'm sure you're all too aware of the damage that has been done to our country by policies implemented in the name of "Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion" or "DEI."

Race grifters and hustlers make _millions_ perpetuating DEI lies, including...

* America is a nation built on slavery, not freedom.
* All racial disparities are indisputable evidence of systemic racism--and if you question this conclusion, you must be a racist.
* Students in K-12 schools can be divided into oppressors and oppressed based on their skin color.

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Hillsdale College, where I am president, is engaged in a nationwide fight on the battlefield of education to save young Americans from this anti-American agenda.

Since our founding in 1844, we have offered "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty."

To do this work well, we need a clear understanding of **what informed Americans like you think about DEI and how best to fight it.**

So please share your views by completing the **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time.

Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept any government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations.

**We remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities have rejected their founding statements and embraced radical and dangerous ideologies.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** , which you can access at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt3592dm45uml16ojlheij6j6i02l2dh3lf20pi0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j6aoj2chh2bs)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. Please fill out your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. Your answers will help us to defend excellence and merit against the tyranny of DEI. Today, DEI affects almost every aspect of American life. This endangers lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

You can take your survey at the secure link below. It will only take a few moments of your time.

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze0nqms4vi9ure6ee48hi4a7gte3jjsfie4te5h8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j6aoj2chh2bs)

Thank you!
---

ICYMI News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

To do this work well, we need a clear understanding of what informed Americans like you think about DEI and how best to fight it. So please share your views by completing the DEFEAT DEI SURVEY and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept any government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. We remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities have rejected their founding statements and embraced radical and dangerous ideologies. Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. Your answers will help us to defend excellence and merit against the tyranny of DEI. Today, DEI affects almost every aspect of American life. name: Jenna Burns
subject: Help save my husband and my family
body:
If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

Dear Fellow Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9foia9abvqk6mcegpikj5ue2u9ep6maotqr4528_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j6aoj2c1h2bs)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z72ttkv79hu5fbpm9g19o19hjlqkr7tl24gv99bo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j6aoj2c1h2bs)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zitftafuvh7cj9h897a10dut9s6f4khbslhotl4g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j6aoj2c1h2bs)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zigjejfjsab87sokerrc8opck9nlolfq4bia2d50_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j6aoj2c1h2bs)**

His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm490vn6p4a7bq7g465fbthuna2a5scj0jgn9048_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j6aoj2c1h2bs)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zed3b9gp2qk9f7t9jb14evosmvacourf7r4gh580_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j6aoj2c1h2bs)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znsp6778nf6mj6bc7cgkfp92021mrre4sf0ddo1g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j6aoj2c1h2bs)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zehsbtrja6ajg5a3sfme4167g4ucipse3mlsc79g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8ob4c1h61pj246h22sh2s8i6eob4c5j6aoj2c1h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrq9oref9mrpm5794nntcklsrp781iqh3oubjm78_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j6aoj2c1h2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbv8d0cpb6mfailgq737f3n85rip01ds1ooq30h0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr1chgmcpb2c9g649fg)

name: Warner Mendenhall, Freedom Counsel
subject: Fauci pardoned… Now what?
body:
In the final hours of his presidency, Biden pardoned Dr. Fauci.

|
---
| | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zmq9ejkbpd63ae1q66ovf7mldjnnpockkaj8kph8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j66p34c1h2bs)
Friend,

In the final hours of his presidency, Biden pardoned Dr. Fauci.

The pardon is the final slap in the face of American citizens who suffered tremendous abuse during COVID. What you and I endured during the tyranny of the pandemic is one of the greatest civil rights abuses in our lifetime.
* There are estimates that 500,000 or more were killed by the shots.
* Millions lost their jobs for refusing the shots (even to do this day!)
* Big Pharma receives billions of dollars for their experimental shot.
* Big Tech and the government censored our speech.

You may be wondering, “What comes next?” Will we let Fauci, Big Pharma, the government, and the hospitals get away with what they did to abuse our rights?

Here’s my answer: NO!

I'm Warner Mendenhall, and I'd like to share with you the important work we're doing at **Freedom Counsel** to help those affected by COVID-19 policies.

Many Americans have contacted us sharing deeply personal stories about their experiences during the pandemic - from job losses and separation from loved ones in hospitals to adverse health impacts and business closures.

These stories have moved us to action.

Freedom Counsel emerged from the COVID Litigation Conference in Atlanta in 2023 with a clear purpose: _to provide legal support and coordination for those seeking justice and accountability through the court system. We work alongside dedicated attorneys, medical professionals, scientists, and concerned citizens to address the challenges many Americans continue to face_.

Here’s how you can help:

[I am asking for your immediate support to help Freedom Counsel raise $50,000 this month. Can you chip in $10, $35, $100, or even $250 today? Please consider donating ANY amount you can generously spare to help us go on the offensive against those who abused our rights during COVID.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z69ddcg8ot0b3hek5bes2ftj7hn2kmhqi1u3dlo8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j66p34c1h2bs)
[Donate](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zvgqug24carkd2j7nk2ake259gpkt7eqoahom0a0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j66p34c1h2bs)
Friend, this is the new civil rights movement.

In the past, the civil rights movement expanded rights. Under COVID, the government attacked our individual rights in the Constitution. Now it is time to restore those rights and hold people who abused our rights accountable.

Our current initiatives include:
* Supporting individuals seeking compensation for job losses due to mandate policies.
* Helping those experiencing health complications to access legal resources.
* Working to restore and protect doctor-patient relationships.
* Holding the government accountable for civil rights violations.
* Holding hospitals accountable for fraud in covid treatment and deadly protocols.

What makes our approach unique is our commitment to bringing together multiple law firms, medical experts, and affected individuals to share resources and develop effective legal strategies. We believe in the power of coordinated, strategic action through proper legal channels.

[To continue this important work, we're seeking to raise $50,000 this month. Your support - whether $10, $35, $100, or more - would help us provide crucial legal coordination.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z1pq27b4hilgc6dqd3jjnb2ufhejctj40uno8a2g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j66p34c1h2bs)
[Donate $10](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2ziauum8jh2strlep0gk1ou4gpbkposm2kp4ou8i8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j66p34c1h2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z222m188ruhp50f511oou7956fmvkbia765988u0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j66p34c1h2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zidt49t7n6n5d7nttp4ktg8d0tggld4nmhunpt10_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j66p34c1h2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z03hqkah6ntnrhsdtr8mo7fnqndjjk3fj5m369og_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j66p34c1h2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z852k3ruv9jvg1eik3la0bat4ijdeeo8b5d1urs0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j66p34c1h2bs)

[Donate $500](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zam2tdt88ou0jiepc2v2figbb25e717oreie0jjo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j66p34c1h2bs)

[Donate $1,000](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z4nhas70ta0f3uoc4smj0dr0igc14a8c50a9d6sg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j66p34c1h2bs)

[Donate Other](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zk19sup6ivvq84og6smm86ih40sefsbpgf3f6ui0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j66p34c1h2bs)
Friend, while the legal process can be lengthy, we're committed to supporting those seeking justice through proper legal channels. If you've been affected by these policies or know someone who has, please know that you're not alone. We're here to help coordinate legal resources and support.

Thank you for considering supporting our mission to help those affected find their path to justice.

Warmest regards,

Warner Mendenhall

clean_body: In the final hours of his presidency, Biden pardoned Dr. Fauci. | | | Friend, In the final hours of his presidency, Biden pardoned Dr. Fauci. The pardon is the final slap in the face of American citizens who suffered tremendous abuse during COVID. What you and I endured during the tyranny of the pandemic is one of the greatest civil rights abuses in our lifetime. There are estimates that 500,000 or more were killed by the shots. Millions lost their jobs for refusing the shots (even to do this day!) Big Pharma receives billions of dollars for their experimental shot. Big Tech and the government censored our speech. You may be wondering, “What comes next?” Will we let Fauci, Big Pharma, the government, and the hospitals get away with what they did to abuse our rights? Here’s my answer: NO! I'm Warner Mendenhall, and I'd like to share with you the important work we're doing at Freedom Counsel to help those affected by COVID-19 policies. Many Americans have contacted us sharing deeply personal stories about their experiences during the pandemic - from job losses and separation from loved ones in hospitals to adverse health impacts and business closures. These stories have moved us to action. Freedom Counsel emerged from the COVID Litigation Conference in Atlanta in 2023 with a clear purpose: to provide legal support and coordination for those seeking justice and accountability through the court system. We work alongside dedicated attorneys, medical professionals, scientists, and concerned citizens to address the challenges many Americans continue to face. Here’s how you can help: Friend, this is the new civil rights movement. In the past, the civil rights movement expanded rights. Under COVID, the government attacked our individual rights in the Constitution. Now it is time to restore those rights and hold people who abused our rights accountable. Our current initiatives include: Supporting individuals seeking compensation for job losses due to mandate policies. Helping those experiencing health complications to access legal resources. Working to restore and protect doctor-patient relationships. Holding the government accountable for civil rights violations. * Holding hospitals accountable for fraud in covid treatment and deadly protocols. What makes our approach unique is our commitment to bringing together multiple law firms, medical experts, and affected individuals to share resources and develop effective legal strategies. We believe in the power of coordinated, strategic action through proper legal channels. Friend, while the legal process can be lengthy, we're committed to supporting those seeking justice through proper legal channels. If you've been affected by these policies or know someone who has, please know that you're not alone. We're here to help coordinate legal resources and support. Thank you for considering supporting our mission to help those affected find their path to justice. Warmest regards, Warner Mendenhall Freedom Counsel is a nonprofit organization formed under 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code. Dear Friend of Liberty,

[I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkotsd2n83lpd8g9dmgjjkudt9d5k63m3k6tnv3o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j66p30c3h2bs).

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by taking your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. You can find it at this secure link:

name: Vivek
subject: The words of wisdom my father instilled in me.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
I'm not fighting for a campaign slogan - I'm fighting for the future of Ohio.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv5ppo0bv5a0rff2j69vutmsu2oi1rh1rm4agi5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j61o72chh2bs)
---
_**"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." **_
* * *
---
My father instilled those words of wisdom in me, and I've lived by them ever since.
Friend, I'm Vivek Ramaswamy, and I'm not just talking about my own success. I'm talking about the future of our great state of Ohio. Born and raised in Cincinnati, I've spent my life building businesses, creating jobs, and fighting against the woke agenda.

The radical Left and their media allies have taken notice, dubbing me _"The C.E.O. of Anti-Woke."_

**But I'm not done yet. I'm just getting started.**

As Governor, I'll bring the same bold leadership I showed as a CEO to the statehouse. I'll fight for a state where merit matters, free speech reigns, and We the People are in charge. No more mediocrity. No more victimhood. No more excuses.

But I need your help to make it happen. I'm not some cookie-cutter politician who only cares about climbing the political ladder. I'm also not beholden to special interests, mega-donors, or the Establishment.

Because of that, my campaign is fueled by everyday folks like you doing what they can to help. Sometimes that means kicking in a few bucks. Sometimes more. Regardless of the amount, I would be deeply honored if you'd be willing to pitch in and help my campaign keep running through the finish line.

Your support - no matter what the amount - would be a huge help.

**[So will you join me with a contribution today? Every dollar is a declaration of independence from the status quo.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv8qncprljl3hel2p7l4af98cugeiv8jtrirpivg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j61o72chh2bs "So will you join me with a contribution today? Every dollar is a declaration of independence from the status quo.")**

I'm not fighting for some cheap campaign slogan - I'm fighting for the future of our state, and our country along with it. I'm also fighting for the state where my wife, Apoorva, and I are raising our two boys.

**I don 't want to just make Ohio stand out a little more - I want it to be OUTSTANDING!**

**[So I'll ask you again: are you with me?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5r9ap66c57smsnu9tqnuevj3m21iojga1v14d4o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j61o72chh2bs "So I'll ask you again: are you with me?")**
---

| | [**PLEASE DONATE NOW**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc7fmhvfq9acl9u59ngelms3n46kih7cicldru6g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j61o72chh2bs)
---

God Bless you and God Bless America,

Vivek Ramaswamy
Candidate for Governor of Ohio

---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z96js0oj4rjo2gp6k7r232rf4abvd6n958ij5pf8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j61o72chh2bs)
---
**It 's Vivek Ramaswamy - I wrote you a personal message now that I OFFICIALLY launched my campaign:**

I am running to be a key partner to President Trump in my home state of Ohio. But I really need your help to win. That's why I am humbly asking you to join my inner circle and become a Founding Donor to my campaign today.

_It would be an honor to have you aboard._
---
| | [**JOIN MY INNER CIRCLE!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9i8kbj8fte2lsk078dhu00f7q014k2ia8ls8js0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j61o72chh2bs)
---
To victory,
Vivek Ramaswamy

---
|
---

Columbus, OH 43201

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Defeat DEI Survey
body:
DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdm3ihc89kortp8jtrgqqqiu8njr68afqlijp2s8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j61o72chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

[I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbe0988f41khliobag8tc6fic7bk30tpukujtpoo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j61o72chh2bs).

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by taking your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. You can find it at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zldprf39s1npl9s3n6g1v38gc9spnmplp3jb1fug_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5j61o72chh2bs)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

| | |

| |
# _Weekly Update_
The second half of session is officially here with committees resuming this past week.

We heard several bills in the [Education and Career Development Committee](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=c48115120a6ff11366592cfefa21f2d6d39bac9152f4f454d81e92490fb6842c4df8e728cd298fa6fe888b66bfd445ccff4f04ca6d6449d5 "Education and Career Development Committee") and will revisit them next week with the opportunity to propose amendments.

We anticipate more committee action as session ramps back up, and I am looking forward to sharing with you all the work my colleagues and I are doing on behalf of every Hoosier.

_Speaking of work our caucus is doing_ , the Indiana Senate Democrats have several pieces of legislation that are eligible for hearings in House committees, and you can read more about a few of those in [my legislative review](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=c48115120a6ff113e7b62da25e52d40cef233909c2dfa88d618f1b721d5f4f5c4a6896bd05e1e1fa80e7f27af912c6d64869a10ffcbdf449 "my legislative review") which can be found later in this newsletter. **With the second half of session here, stay up to date on important legislation updates, stream session and more on[iga.in.gov](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=c48115120a6ff113ca48926049270317730ad666ac02f0aee42144999d6cb6b9c2b191fba3f108fed26a1f71738a3f284ad532e674e567cc). ** **Additionally, make sure you are following my social media channels for daily updates about session and our District 46 community. **
---
#
* * *
---
| | |
# _**Standing Up For Science **_
---
| |
---
Thank you all of those who showed up at the Statehouse to use your voices to stand up for our science community.

In Indiana, we know how valuable this industry is to the future of our state. The life science industry contributed $95 billion to our state's economy in 2023 and employs nearly 70,000 hardworking Hoosiers.

Despite this, those in the science community are leaving our state because of harmful policies passed in the General Assembly that defy science.

I was honored to join you all in compelling our state leaders, our national leaders, to believe in science and to fund science.

Let us make sure we are empowering the folks and the tools that help keep us healthy, that drive innovation and are doing the research today that will guide us to tomorrow.
* * *
---
| | | |
---
| | There are several House bills in the second half of session that I am proud to sponsor in the Senate.

One of these bills is [HB 1289](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=c48115120a6ff1131911757d88a5eb017a103df92224f73a9e9cb61fc27819a4cca1bec4bd7ff8cbc862cd84c477cd34daf31f0cd014e8d1 "HB 1289") authored by Rep. Carey Hamilton.

This bill would expand the definition of workforce-related programs to include a work-based learning program or transitional jobs program.

This expansion would help organizations like [RecycleForce](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=c48115120a6ff1139701815b831a459570fe0f53deecd24da340ee054bc0b4c6112019057ff3f88a2aedb539623a93900a70b18cf6703674 "RecycleForce"), which is a great avenue for those released from incarceration to get workforce development and reduce recidivism.

On a larger scale, this bill will make Indiana more competitive for federal funding that makes organization like RecycleForce possible.

HB 1289 passed out of the [Pensions and Labor Committee](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=c48115120a6ff113ccdd87d7e72dc6bded07f3867aa9d0e446843cfbee47b5f80b4229097de5a48f83dc6f4d7e3a7da81181b7a4d77023ad "Pensions and Labor Committee") unanimously, and I will continue to advocate for this workforce development initiative it as it moves forward.
**Hear more thoughts about HB 1289 in my _Weekly Dispatch_**
---
#
* * *
---
# _**Archeology Internship Opportunity for High School Students**_
---
|
---
### Want to learn even more?
**For more information or questions about the program, please contact Indy-ology Project Coordinator Sam Catchpole at[Samantha.Catchpole@indy.gov](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=c48115120a6ff1139de1ecfac25bb6fde6df47adf553a8dc29e877925d13b199d7fdcc267769d7eb36ab4c5a20ca7bae515742ecfb4f8458 "Samantha.Catchpole@indy.gov")**

---
| | [CLICK HERE TO APPLY](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=c48115120a6ff113d742677a16830c924e00fca079881cbf876967b12110c4527bac79fc92920a145152b69ad425e62ed4c57221f2a27ef4)
---
#
* * *
---
# **IUI Social Justice Symposium with Dr. Brittney Cooper**
---
| | | |
---
| | This year's [Social Justice Symposium, hosted by Indiana University - Indiana](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=c48115120a6ff113cf5306b0e9b0ec435b60b283902c442131242810302579f1f39b6da3d32494c0c7a49b8cad923e51c0cf4e03dadb098d "Social Justice Symposium, hosted by Indiana University Indiana"), focused on interstices and intersections of social justice.

Attendees gained valuable insight on how to best navigate our current climate while using their voice for impactful activism.

I walked away with an important reminder: **joy and hope are both acts of resistance.** It is important for us all to remember that as we work together towards progress.

A major highlight of the the symposium was the opportunity to hear from Dr. Brittney Cooper.

Dr. Cooper is the Founding Director of the Race and Gender Equity Lab at Rutgers as well as Professor of Women's, Gender and Sexuality as well as Africana Studies.

In her remarks, she left us with a resounding call to action:_ "Don't back off from your truth, your vision, or your courage. Keep Fighting."_

Thank you to everyone who made this event possible. Our community is better because of the passion and insight that is shared in environments like this.

* * *
---

Additionally, I have included bills I have concerns with, and think they are worth keeping your eye on as we continue the second half of session.

# 2025 Pre-Session Survey Results
Thank you to all of you who took the time to share your hopes, concerns and ideas for our community.

This feedback helps me best represent District 46. We are better when we use our collective voices to effect change. Thank you for your help in creating a better Indiana.

Results can be found _**[here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=c48115120a6ff11316a5a20cd1a3b9281b401b91ff6d663b61fafdd42c75b86a289438d61ed92859c43a6d844a699857d72cb51fec58be64 "here")**._

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Defeat DEI Survey
body:
It’s time for merit to make a comeback.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfsd7safib19p02bikrd3o39n7kvv323dfotbqu0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5gm4ob1cdh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

It's time for merit to make a comeback.

[That's why I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zninla5ujfac7e042lgjnr8q394ic0s9aukd64r0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5gm4ob1cdh2bs).

Like many Americans, I'm sure you're all too aware of the damage that has been done to our country by policies implemented in the name of "Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion" or "DEI."

Race grifters and hustlers make _millions_ perpetuating DEI lies, including...

* America is a nation built on slavery, not freedom.
* All racial disparities are indisputable evidence of systemic racism--and if you question this conclusion, you must be a racist.
* Students in K-12 schools can be divided into oppressors and oppressed based on their skin color.

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Hillsdale College, where I am president, is engaged in a nationwide fight on the battlefield of education to save young Americans from this anti-American agenda.

Since our founding in 1844, we have offered "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty."

To do this work well, we need a clear understanding of **what informed Americans like you think about DEI and how best to fight it.**

So please share your views by completing the **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time.

Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept any government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations.

**We remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities have rejected their founding statements and embraced radical and dangerous ideologies.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** , which you can access at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu57ag7hthpap0lrsmgkj142l09l3n58e60gkaag_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5gm4ob1cdh2bs)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. Please fill out your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. Your answers will help us to defend excellence and merit against the tyranny of DEI. Today, DEI affects almost every aspect of American life. This endangers lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

You can take your survey at the secure link below. It will only take a few moments of your time.

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk694c6l8gl0etf1ce3ap9mokvl19cst3h0brrs0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5gm4ob1cdh2bs)

Thank you!
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zko8vehggq0u6700aukajcu7i437ulnfsl326pto_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8ob4c1j64pj246h22sh2s8i6eob4c5gm4ob1cdh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp6ea6o7s290og30sgsd1q8uee8u2kjk9laonslg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5gm4ob1cdh2bs)_

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: Embarrassing! NJ property taxes the highest ever…
body:
Peter, Well, this is an embarrassing headline. New Jersey residents already know well that our property taxes are sky-high
|
---
| Peter, Well, this is an embarrassing headline. New Jersey residents already know well that our property taxes are sky-high — the most expensive in the country. And under Governor Phil Murphy, they’ve gotten way worse. So, unfortunately, [this headline](https://xtz223.keap-link006.com/v2/click/0c025be0d009371f4f78b831b47ea0f3/eJyNUctuwjAQ_BcfOBHyhoAUVQghhKAc-jgjx1kSg-1Y9oZAEf9eQ6u2h1bqwZI1O56dGV8IgqIKlyWZkBO-RVFM-sQA45qDwlmjkLL7NEqTMA77RHB1WJim1WRy-fXxF-EGx1mW9QmeNTjKy9N0tlpuFtv1crNyTE2N2_EvnSQMv3Xmj9PlmlyvfwqD5Dg_Om1LJmhauCUquUuFr0Y4fo2o7cT3u64bqP2ANdLXjeDImfWjIEr9IPbV3nr0CIZW4GnTaDB49pCevIIL4RmgrAbrWWyV4qryFHReDbyqcVCjFA-Qp8OoiEYsTFOaRUVShHFZZEVSjmnChrALeoJhlQ9dq6xMHStIRoztxmEQlO70WpRb27SGQf5MucDatHdMuiStzEE68A4wKjXllcp_urxPEIzMN9BZAeju28K5PjizW2fWupqo1qDKzz9ewfmjrOs7h06zqw==) won’t surprise you at all:
---
|
# N.J. property-tax bills reach stunning new height
---
| The article reports that, for the first time ever, the average homeowner in New Jersey is paying over $10,000 in property taxes. Bills are topping $10k in more than 40% of New Jersey counties. This is insane! No wonder people are packing their U-Hauls and leaving our state in droves. This excessive taxation is also destructive and suffocating to our state’s economy. We should be getting real about our ridiculous over-taxation and government waste that is killing dreams and making it impossible for the next generation to build their futures in our beautiful state. It doesn’t need to be this way. This election year, we NEED to get these Leftist clowns who are wasting our tax dollars to the tune of billions. Want to help us fight our state’s crazy tax policies? Consider making a gift today.

| Hello, and thank you for taking the time to read this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and I want to take a moment to ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from future emails. Why You’re Receiving This Email You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us. If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages. Your Privacy is Important We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold, or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have. You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction. How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there’s no hard feelings. You can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below. By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsense.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsense.org
Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line)
Mailing Address:
Common Sense Club
165 Route 35
Red Bank, New Jersey, 07701 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://xtz223.infusionsoft.com/app/optOut/0/4fd6eb57577aacb0/26415798/6ca8c46b70f98e9a) Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States
---

name: Vivek
subject: The words of wisdom my father instilled in me.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
I'm not fighting for a campaign slogan - I'm fighting for the future of Ohio.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z91eug9s0vre5v2u4q1flqkf88r2367ubvlr75v8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5gm4ob1cdh2bs)
---
_**"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." **_
* * *
---
My father instilled those words of wisdom in me, and I've lived by them ever since.
Friend, I'm Vivek Ramaswamy, and I'm not just talking about my own success. I'm talking about the future of our great state of Ohio. Born and raised in Cincinnati, I've spent my life building businesses, creating jobs, and fighting against the woke agenda.

The radical Left and their media allies have taken notice, dubbing me _"The C.E.O. of Anti-Woke."_

**But I'm not done yet. I'm just getting started.**

As Governor, I'll bring the same bold leadership I showed as a CEO to the statehouse. I'll fight for a state where merit matters, free speech reigns, and We the People are in charge. No more mediocrity. No more victimhood. No more excuses.

But I need your help to make it happen. I'm not some cookie-cutter politician who only cares about climbing the political ladder. I'm also not beholden to special interests, mega-donors, or the Establishment.

Because of that, my campaign is fueled by everyday folks like you doing what they can to help. Sometimes that means kicking in a few bucks. Sometimes more. Regardless of the amount, I would be deeply honored if you'd be willing to pitch in and help my campaign keep running through the finish line.

Your support - no matter what the amount - would be a huge help.

**[So will you join me with a contribution today? Every dollar is a declaration of independence from the status quo.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq7stposodpn3rlsqdcevkvpqplrrprqt4lld3ko_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5gm4ob1cdh2bs "So will you join me with a contribution today? Every dollar is a declaration of independence from the status quo.")**

I'm not fighting for some cheap campaign slogan - I'm fighting for the future of our state, and our country along with it. I'm also fighting for the state where my wife, Apoorva, and I are raising our two boys.

**I don 't want to just make Ohio stand out a little more - I want it to be OUTSTANDING!**

**[So I'll ask you again: are you with me?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdvfe3boupg10nstoclpaom71cgmj1ka4ln0q7po_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5gm4ob1cdh2bs "So I'll ask you again: are you with me?")**
---

| | [**PLEASE DONATE NOW**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2orssb7c5m607ngnoqc0j5rfsejvorifj5525no_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5gm4ob1cdh2bs)
---

God Bless you and God Bless America,

Vivek Ramaswamy
Candidate for Governor of Ohio

---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9pp5rmcr1987q6kkbqn441n9rilnbsl79uaef1g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5gm4ob1cdh2bs)
---
**It 's Vivek Ramaswamy - I wrote you a personal message now that I OFFICIALLY launched my campaign:**

I am running to be a key partner to President Trump in my home state of Ohio. But I really need your help to win. That's why I am humbly asking you to join my inner circle and become a Founding Donor to my campaign today.

_It would be an honor to have you aboard._
---
| | [**JOIN MY INNER CIRCLE!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqosssju6ioh2lq61q0q3vcgvqeqtrcljquei8ag_rp22sh2s8i6eob4c5gm4ob1cdh2bs)
---
To victory,
Vivek Ramaswamy

---
|

Columbus, OH 43201

4/13: [Columbia County Lincoln Day Dinner](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-cdldljy-didthutlhu-ii/) **Upcoming WisGOP Events** **Brown County**
The amazing team from the Republican Party of Brown County is working hard for our candidates! **Calumet County**
April 1 is just around the corner! Head to your local Republican offices and pick up signs to show your support for our candidates in April! **Kenosha County**
Republicans in Kenosha County are working hard to elect Judge Brad Schimel, Brittany Kinser, and local conservative candidates. They held their caucus, wrote postcards, knocked doors, and hosted a Super Saturday. Keep up the great work! **Milwaukee County**
Over the past few weeks, our coalitions team has been hard at work. To conclude Black History Month, they organized a documentary screening on the inspiring story of Joshua Glover. Additionally, the team hosted a Hispanic Roundtable with Judge Brad Schimel, fostering important discussions and connections! **Monroe County**
Monroe County Republicans have been staying busy this month! From conservative breakfasts with local candidates to an incredible Lincoln Day Dinner and County Caucus, we know we can count on our friends in Monroe to show their support for Republicans and GOTV! **Oneida County**
The Republican Party of Oneida County held their annual caucus, joined by Wisconsin's finest, Congressman Tom Tiffany. **Outagamie County**
Republicans in Outagamie County came out for an incredible Super Saturday. These amazing volunteers wrote over 1000 postcards for Supreme Court Candidate Brad Schimel. **Price County**
Thanks to these amazing volunteers with the Price County Republican party for door-knocking this past weekend! **Rock County**
The Republican Party of Rock County hosted a Save Wisconsin Rally with Supreme Court Candidate Brad Schimel. Republicans are united and energized to win on April 1st! **Sauk County**
Great Caucus this morning in Sauk County! Say hello to a couple of new faces to the Executive Committee of the Republican Party of Sauk County. **Waukesha County**
The Republican Party of Waukesha County hosted an incredible Lincoln-Reagan Day Dinner, with Special Guest Speaker Judge Brad Schimel. **Walworth County **
Walworth County volunteers knocked it out of the park over the weekend! They had teams knocking doors, doing lit drops, staffing the office and the gun show both and crisscrossing the county to repair damaged field signs and installing at new locations. **Washington County**
Republicans in Washington County came out in droves to support Supreme Court Candidate Brad Schimel. The momentum is on Brad's side. One month to save Wisconsin! **Wood County**
The Republican Party of Wood County hosted their Lincoln Day Luncheon over the weekend, hearing from amazing guest speakers and taking part in a Trump'n'Wine raffle! [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-cdldljy-didthutlhu-id/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-cdldljy-didthutlhu-ih/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-cdldljy-didthutlhu-ik/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-cdldljy-didthutlhu-iu/) | [ Share ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-fb-cdldljy-didthutlhu-dr/) | [ Tweet ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-tw-cdldljy-didthutlhu-dy/) | [ Forward ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-didthutlhu-931243C5-cdldljy-l-dj)

subject: We need YOU to defend Elon & DOGE

body:
We need 1,000 patriots to defend Elon

| | | **[**Before you read this email, could you please sign your name in support of Elon Musk and D.O.G.E? We need 1,000 signatures before midnight tonight >>**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Peter,

The Democrats and their media lapdogs have found their next target: Elon Musk.

Just weeks into his leadership at DOGE, they’re already smearing him – calling him a _“Nazi,”_ accusing him of a _“coup,”_ and claiming he’s _“taking over the government.”_

Why? **Because he’s exposing their decades of wasteful spending and saving American taxpayers BILLIONS.**

And here’s the real reason they’re panicking: Elon is uncovering fraud that threatens the bureaucratic politicians’ secret slush funds! The loudest voices attacking him are the ones with the most to lose – and they’ll do anything to protect their corrupt schemes.

Instead of fixing the mess they created, they’re doing what they do best – attacking, distracting, and lying.**But we’re not going to let them get away with it.**

**[We’re collecting 1,000 signatures from American patriots to show the radical left that we STAND with Elon Musk and DOGE. Peter, will you be one of them?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-ZFa6swKmVG2g)**

I'm all in with Vivek running for office in his home state of Ohio. If you live in the Buckeye State, you're lucky - he's the best in the business.

But I want to be clear: you don't have to be an Ohioan to support his campaign. He will be a fighter for ALL OF US and the values we hold dear. He wants to be an example of strong MAGA governance that others can follow.

**[So, if you want to be a part of history, I IMPLORE YOU to pitch in and become a Founding Donor today.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTE4ODYyNjYsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMzYyMy1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MDY3LWFlZmE1NDJmODQ4ZDRiMzBiZGRlZmMyMmIwMzY0NWRhIiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdml2ZWstcmFtYXN3YW15LWZvci1vaGlvL2JsYWNrYnVybi8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDMwOF9GWi1BVC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MTE3NTItMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTAzMDhfRlotQVQuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjExNzUyLTM2MjMifQ/YWG2i55M-aylqCldYFfWDg "So, if you want to be a part of history, I IMPLORE YOU to pitch in and become a Founding Donor today. Marsha

name: Josh Weil
subject: Giant MAGA attack on my district - good sign??
body:
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wpm4p-vh1jva-kyd76rh1/)
---
# **Giant MAGA attack on my district**
---
friend, As you know, I am the Democratic nominee in the FL-06 Special Election, which is set to take place on April 1st. Whereas in most normal special elections for vacant Congressional seats, the Governor in the state will give campaigns an average of six months to build their campaigns and introduce themselves to voters. Florida’s Governor Ron DeSantis has compressed this window into around 4 months to give us the shortest amount of time to build out our campaign while the MAGA movement dumps tens of millions into our district, saturating it with ads in hopes of shooing in their ultra MAGA pick: Randy Fine. Yesterday the **_full frontal MAGA assault on my district_** entered its newest phase. A pro-Trump super PAC began flooding our district with this ad in support of our opponent:
---
|
---
_The ad that Defend American Jobs - a MAGA aligned super PAC began running in my district yesterday._ These ads are beyond critical to my opponent's path to victory because **no one** in this district **_knows him_**. He is a carpetbagging Casino mogul from South Florida. If he was a true shoo-in, MAGA would keep its powder dry and wouldn’t feel the need to pump millions into this district. The fact that they are having to saturate the district in ads to save their candidate, is extremely promising for us **_but only if we can keep up with their spends_** in the 73 days left until E-Day. So far we are rolling with the punches and are closing in on having raised _$500,000_ since we began fundraising in late December but we need to scale up faster. [**_If just 1 out of every 20 people we send this email to donate $5 we could raise 100k off of a single email and run more of our own ads to keep up._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wpm4p-vh1jvb-kyd76rh2/)[**_Can you help us keep up with the dark money pro-MAGA PACs flooding into this race by making a donation of $5 or more?_**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wpm4p-vh1jvc-kyd76rh3/)
---
| | | | | [Chip in $10](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wpm4p-vh1jvd-kyd76rh4/)
---
| [$26 for 2026](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wpm4p-vh1jve-kyd76rh5/)
---
| [Chip in $100](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wpm4p-vh1jvf-kyd76rh6/)
---
| [RUSH $250](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wpm4p-vh1jvg-kyd76rh7/)
---
|
---
That MAGA needs to flood the airwaves so early on in this race is a good sign for us - with your support we’ll soon be flooding the airwaves with ads of our own. Thank you in advance for your support. Josh Weil Democrat for Florida’s 6th
---
| | | | |
---
**No Dem Left Behind PAC** P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 20003
---
|
---

You are subscribed to this email as dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Click here to modify your [preferences](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/form?2wpm4p--15aab-kyd76rh8&sl=4i6&t=1&ac=gpnv) or [unsubscribe](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/form?2wpm4p--15aab-kyd76rh8&sl=4i6&t=5&ac=gpnv).

subject: Russia Sanctions, Daylight Saving Drama, and a Sneaky Cat
body:
President Trump announced on Friday that he is "[strongly considering](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71uwyAUxfGngS3W5QJxPDB08ZauHS0-LjEtNpaNgvz2lbt3O9KRftL_6zk9bcppfX3ahUyNZUJAfQN5g8cUbMrnpHgwkQhJcjKiV0JJ0Q-SzybC4INwXpDu6YHoNDorUEvUXsfB82QuDSQ8hABA6BwFQhGdHILTXhBTQCHVsnffJa11ppjP8qa982Xh2cy1bgeTHwxHhmNrrXPOXx_DcaV2MBztXpPPdE0v7-1nO6Ua-sJ3E7aWck7HvWcKXotN-U-t_1W-Df4GAAD__5AcU7w)" sanctions and tariffs on Russia until it agrees to a ceasefire and peace deal to end its three-year war with Ukraine.

# Saturday, March 8, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1936, the [Daytona Beach](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zz1urDAQAODT2B1oPMOPXbh4Dd2-NiUyeICJzHplrI24fZT0ucAnfR-P-REkyXP_H072dcszAvYNUAN2jkHSPXc6-o0ZmTR7M3amIzM60od3CIsltmEAG3sYAax1EcfeRRxW47T4Hw0IrDEACO3CkdFsC7m49Kth1QFHqbm0n1me9eAt3fnNpV3zqZM_an1div4pnBRONcdwX4dcNZe7zWVXONnmDGU9GuNoUDgZcmQVTrr4-PqSlOQaRtXBfgZJv2j9K_n2-B0AAP__PIlRMg) racetrack hosted its first oval stock car race, complete with scoring controversies and crashes. The event was halted after 72 of 78 laps, with driver Milt Marion winning the $1,700 prize. The daylight saving time debate is back, with President Trump calling it a "[50-50 issue](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD9vpDAUxD-N6Yz8B47dwgWnE1dtmhQp0cN-wIuMjWzvEr59RPp0MxrNaPT7eIwPIE9heYMNTZnjqIRqudBc3EYH5M-xqZyZERXqCo3sGtlo2d11tRrsZNtKOzdob4AKZQMtwozzvZUIE1ZkrjWhxU1KIZSoJ3So5Dzpu5taK5E1Ah2VmOrPSKGsOPszvjDVNm6VN2spe2a6Z2pgajiOo95yuDKmBgz8mZka9uipkL3kclXDhqEwNZT03Hae4cx8heR4iXzBwvHLUkHHYYrPwu0KYaGwcAenp2UtPMPr8oU2ZGqAxPte9nuC_0wP0ZJj-t_fCxce-R3TXiXj9oO8p_ynY41YNiD_8778RvNl1HcAAAD__wi1exA)" and lawmakers proposing to end it. Should the U.S. end daylight saving time? Take the poll below! We're sponsored today by [FinanceBuzz](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z79u8yAUBfCngS3W5V78JwPDJ33ylq4dEYZLQotDRFBcv33ldu56ftI5Ou8Xe3Epp_v1za1sWiwWAfsT0AkmG1zKu9UymMiMTJKNGrXSpMYzyZuJOuDge49qIegpTP0wTYqcG31UfmSZzNEGBJNSAAjdwoFRxYXOYem9YqGBQ2qldh8l3duNY97Li2vnyyqzubX2eAr6J3AWOG_b1u31q9XPgwXOLkbrBc0lRq42BUH_EbUGgcNBvwGctawmPLaUc3oOo9BwXV3KPxPtr8svg98BAAD__5HWVqk). ## Trump Considers Russian Sanctions
President Trump announced on Friday that he is "[strongly considering](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71uwyAUxfGngS3W5QJxPDB08ZauHS0-LjEtNpaNgvz2lbt3O9KRftL_6zk9bcppfX3ahUyNZUJAfQN5g8cUbMrnpHgwkQhJcjKiV0JJ0Q-SzybC4INwXpDu6YHoNDorUEvUXsfB82QuDSQ8hABA6BwFQhGdHILTXhBTQCHVsnffJa11ppjP8qa982Xh2cy1bgeTHwxHhmNrrXPOXx_DcaV2MBztXpPPdE0v7-1nO6Ua-sJ3E7aWck7HvWcKXotN-U-t_1W-Df4GAAD__5AcU7w)" sanctions and tariffs on Russia until it agrees to a ceasefire and peace deal to end its three-year war with Ukraine. The threats of tariffs and sanctions are the [first indication](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OhCAURp8GOyb8qGhBsQ3dbLulQbmM7CAYuM7Et984_TZfc5KTL-fnPt1tiCE9vu0GGn2eBBMdZZKyYXI2xHNqG6c9gADZgOaq5a3kapTNqh0f-NgNloHsXD8q5VnX961fBt_PVg1N0JeNSTZwzphgtxkcCO5nObq5WziQloELmMvtN4eEK_h45heU25K3JuoVca9EfhFhiDDp3HPFCxFhLjERhslrFBHmqDTBuxJhsBzbTnEtYBFSpdWmBUNOleZEy1FrsNTnQpecMKQDHLWIdnl--PEsNiQgwjRFu_0dYgy1V6Rlj82G-DmG_4V6afEXAAD__3Hhazg) that the White House is weighing action against Russia and come as Trump stated that Russia was absolutely "pounding" Ukraine on the battlefield. Trump also reiterated his belief that Ukraine doesn't "[have the cards](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DGOpDAQheHTQGZUtqGBwMEmZL3phqiwC6gdYyPbNOrbj3ryiT_p6en_95yfyJ7D9hcPMmWNswLVCdAChtkh-_fc1s6sRIp0TUb2rWy17Edd74YcSteBe7jV9ssIZId17NUDW4BBa1ez-ayBhkFKAAXNQo6UXBc9uqWzkqoWyHGJqfkfOZSdVv-OL0qNjUftzV7KmSv9p1JTpab7vpuw2EB3_nilpjN6LmzzB3cuJPZ4ZarUVNJ1nKLsibBQyIKPM2YSHtNGIlv0JDIGWziGLNKVM6M4CS0J3BLRQaGI60skG1COnda6TsadN3vP-dFXLWwHsv95WX6r9jLqOwAA__-MlHLr)" to force Russia to the negotiating table, but U.S. economic pressure could lead to a ceasefire or final settlement agreement. Ukrainian President [Volodymyr Zelensky](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0jzFvwyAUhH8N3rCAh-N4YOjiLV07WmAeyWuxiQAH5d9X7t7tpDvdp-_rttwsRdrvn3ZDU0NalFADF8DFdfGW4nvRnTcBUSF0aOSopQY5TtA9zCQQdRil8-BG8BqcGibUMFxWO00aOjLnmwBxlVIIJXqHHpUMDibvhlUi0wI91ZT770R7fWCI7_TC3K9p66J51PosDD6YmpmaW2v96sqOrZw9U_MZmZprPrYnz0cpZPnxky3tyJvNvNh9rZT2wqvNFMI57rLxz0YxUrmMTIv7Zin-8ep__i-jfgMAAP__PkletA) also expressed readiness for peace talks Friday, stating the first step toward peace was for Russia to halt its attacks.
## Second Person Dies from Measles Outbreak
An unvaccinated adult in New Mexico has become [the second person](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71uwyAUxfGngS0W3AuxGRi6eEvXjhYf1wkRNpGNQt2nr9y925GO9JP-X7fp5lJO6_3TLWTrXCYQoC8CL2KYokv5mBSPdiYCQk5W9koqlL1B_rDODdrQTENvQtRaIZoroonaD8p7BTzZUxMoBimFANF5igRy9mii10ESU4JiqmXrniWt9UFzPsqbti6UhWf7qPW1M_xgMDIYW2ud9-H8GIwrtZ3B6LaaQqZzhgXWn-N539p34ZuNr5ZyTvu1Z0rcF5fyn1r_q3xb-A0AAP__p4xUpg) to die from a measles outbreak, a week after an unvaccinated child in Texas died from the disease. Health officials reported Friday that there are [198 measles cases](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGSozAQRL8GsqFGQjYmUHAJmS-9kJLQCHQWkkujNev9-i0236iDrup-9f7d57sJMaT1r9lJV59nifIC2APeZmdCfM-qddoTSepb0mJQQvViGPt20wOOXl6R0Eoz4miXQTlhL1aKcfBXo9qgzzXs8SYEosTOkiMpvO1HZy-LoEYhuVBz6f7nkOpGPr7zi0q35L2Neqv1yU3_p5FTI6fjOLpHyUmdbSOnRAefYWrIycRGTpU-DcNOhiMx5I9qC5kHrCUfDDVDIlPiGyQiLIaJIVFYN5tLSCtwNZWg0DOXyuDyFyWG7CHEmIiZzq-2aPc8QoyBr0OjcN1NiD-w9Td5Ly2_AwAA___KnXTT) in West Texas, with cases in New Mexico tripling to 30 in a single day, according to local authorities. Nearly all measles cases are in [unvaccinated individuals](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFu5CAUAL8Gd1jwHuzaBcVJJ-uavTalheFhk2CzArLO_n206VOPNBrN222-2Zjisf63O5kW8gwCNBfIxTB7G9NzVp03gQgIOzLyqqRCeR2x28wgnSI9hBDAjVKTshcXEEAvfsBA2EXzsgkUg5RCgOgX8gQyLDj6RTtJTAnyseXSv-d4tI1CeuYHld7lvUtma-1eGf5hMDGY7OIOOmu_5hdmMP0jm9rGYMKRH3RyZytVvpOtiSovdM-lkeeNvmzl-bMthewHX0s-K4OptlyeDKfoGf6VctRKa626Yvz9jCnFerkyJdbdxvST037b8zDwHQAA__9GI2e1) or those with unknown vaccination status. At least 23 people have been hospitalized, with five cases of individuals vaccinated with one dose of the MMR vaccine.
## Daylight Saving Time Starts Sunday
Sunday marks the start of [daylight saving time](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLtu7CAYhJ8GOiyux7sFxWncbdqUFpcf80fYrAxZx28fOalTjjSa-fS9P-aHw4Lb8uZWsD3VWXJpGFeM3-bosJyzptEmAAmKghWjFlqJ8a5oti6am4EAUocAYoxXFMqnaEYnhDcU7bXGFb8Jwbnkg4cIUiSv7tGbIIBoDhF73YePilvPkMpZX7APoa602Nz7sxH1n8iJyOk4jiHVrwNcz78VIqeCCVo_CxA5RXcWXHJnzb1wW1jHFZiHBbfG2ucW3clWt4fM7uzioruNzwNLwfZvJJovq8Py89z_MvGy8jsAAP__pR9iXA), when most of the U.S. springs forward by moving clocks ahead one hour, losing an hour of sleep but gaining later sunsets. Hawaii, Arizona, and U.S. overseas territories, including Puerto Rico, Guam, the U.S. Virgin Islands, American Samoa, and the Northern Mariana Islands, are [exempt from the time switch](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuO6yAURb_GdFiHh18FxW3S5bZTWsdwbJgQiAwTlL8fJf30W3stra_resUQQzr-451M3fMqQQ4cFId5dRjia9XMmZ1IkmJkxKSFVmJaFPMGB3Sw4DjuKIRV4yKmYZtxHhTaSTpiwbzfQMEsBICEfiNHUuybWtw2WEGdBnKh5rP_ziFVT3t85Sedvc13Fo2v9VE69a-Tl05eWmt9olYa0e096OTF4SuGw1de8BnSUfjH_qfwUrFS4c3TSdzGbG-Fu5wqtx7TQVyCWjQAO417tBBjKOPUaTjuGOIHXv-K8TTyNwAA__8jc2Ib), which will occur again in November under the Uniform Time Act of 1966. The biannual practice could end as Sen. Rick Scott has reintroduced the [Sunshine Protection Act](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD9vpDAUxD-N6Yz8B47dwgWnE1dtmhQp0cN-wIuMjWzvEr59RPp0MxrNaPT7eIwPIE9heYMNTZnjqIRqudBc3EYH5M-xqZyZERXqCo3sGtlo2d11tRrsZNtKOzdob4AKZQMtwozzvZUIE1ZkrjWhxU1KIZSoJ3So5Dzpu5taK5E1Ah2VmOrPSKGsOPszvjDVNm6VN2spe2a6Z2pgajiOo95yuDKmBgz8mZka9uipkL3kclXDhqEwNZT03Hae4cx8heR4iXzBwvHLUkHHYYrPwu0KYaGwcAenp2UtPMPr8oU2ZGqAxPte9nuC_0wP0ZJj-t_fCxce-R3TXiXj9oO8p_ynY41YNiD_8778RvNl1HcAAAD__wi1exA) to make daylight saving time year-round, after the legislation passed the Senate in 2022 but didn't receive a House vote. Elon Musk, an advocate for ending daylight saving time, [posted a poll](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L1yrDAMBeCnMZ13ZNnLT-HiNnR725SMWQtQIjCzdkh4-wzp06jRnG_OnLfH8AgsvM3_w0q-TGlAwLsGq6EdYmA5B1dFPxEh2Yq8aZxx1jSdrRZPNgC5KbRUm7qD0cW6vUMTbGdoJGwr9pcGFlpjABBuI0VCM422i-P9aUg5oMglvW7vibey0CRnOuh1e6a1Er-Usmdl_ynsFfbbuadcrpfC_oIV9mCv0yjshSfK5RRS2H-xiCZJm14_80fW33pPIjrSkyPpGE7heSk6h4O3WRdeSUcaQ7my1cvH_QI4141yMK-B5bdP-Wufw-NPAAAA__-4nWeD) asking followers if they preferred an hour earlier or later if the time change is canceled, with over 58% opting for an hour later.
|

**➤ ****The economy** added 151,000 jobs in February, while the federal government cut 10,000 positions, pushing the unemployment rate slightly up to 4.1% from 4.0%, according to newly released data. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLtuhDAURL_GdEbXD7JQuEhDt2lTIj8ui1d-INss4u-jjdKmHI1mdHS-78td--DT40tHVG3NCwc-UBAUxsVpH65Fdk6tiBxFh4rdJJOC3SbRbYrJaTTOWjcJJsbBOgkaAKXRwBkb186r9xsIGBkD4NAbdMjZasTkzGAZEgnofMulf2af2oZruPILS29z7ILaWtsrEZ-Ez4TP53n2ydiEZ333hM_mqD5hrYTPaHPK8SJ8XtGUQ5eLPrOptOCeS6PnphtNRzRYKq36otrko9G_FW3liDut7-howxJpsUmzaQA2dEW5_fQh-PpxIxIeUfvwC9j-E_ZS_CcAAP__wUFwsA)) **➤ ****The White House** threatened reciprocal tariffs on Canada Friday, citing over 200% dairy tariffs and high lumber tariffs, which President Trump said made U.S. exports "impossible" to sell. Look no further. | Trump Considers Russian Sanctions President Trump announced on Friday that he is "" sanctions and tariffs on Russia until it agrees to a ceasefire and peace deal to end its three-year war with Ukraine. The threats of tariffs and sanctions are the that the White House is weighing action against Russia and come as Trump stated that Russia was absolutely "pounding" Ukraine on the battlefield. Trump also reiterated his belief that Ukraine doesn't "" to force Russia to the negotiating table, but U.S. economic pressure could lead to a ceasefire or final settlement agreement. Ukrainian President also expressed readiness for peace talks Friday, stating the first step toward peace was for Russia to halt its attacks. Second Person Dies from Measles Outbreak An unvaccinated adult in New Mexico has become to die from a measles outbreak, a week after an unvaccinated child in Texas died from the disease. Health officials reported Friday that there are in West Texas, with cases in New Mexico tripling to 30 in a single day, according to local authorities. Nearly all measles cases are in or those with unknown vaccination status. At least 23 people have been hospitalized, with five cases of individuals vaccinated with one dose of the MMR vaccine. Daylight Saving Time Starts Sunday Sunday marks the start of , when most of the U.S. springs forward by moving clocks ahead one hour, losing an hour of sleep but gaining later sunsets. Hawaii, Arizona, and U.S. overseas territories, including Puerto Rico, Guam, the U.S. Virgin Islands, American Samoa, and the Northern Mariana Islands, are , which will occur again in November under the Uniform Time Act of 1966. The biannual practice could end as Sen. Rick Scott has reintroduced the to make daylight saving time year-round, after the legislation passed the Senate in 2022 but didn't receive a House vote. body:
Writing this off could come back to haunt us.

[https://secure.winred.com/team-jordan/098c4511292ca230/?utm_campaign=20250227&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=MAWCO&utm_term=lrm-active]

Friend,

I forgot what it feels like to see America WIN – and it sure feels
great!

President Trump is back in the White House, and our unified Party is
working to usher in a Golden Age for America.

_But I can’t say the same for the Democrats. They would rather see
our nation FAIL than let America win with President Trump at the
helm._

So, they’re resorting to the same old tactics...

“DONALD TRUMP IMPEACHMENT ARTICLES FILED. HERE'S WHAT HAPPENS
NEXT”

[Source: _Newsweek_]

BUT I WANT TO BE CLEAR: WE MUST TAKE THIS THREAT _SERIOUSLY_.

With imminent special elections coming up, our House Majority could
fall to a mere TOSS-UP!

...And Democrats certainly know that. In fact, they’re _BANKING_ on
it!

They see a TOSS-UP majority as an opening to successfully IMPEACH
President Trump in the House.

OVER THE COURSE OF THE 2024 ELECTION, I TRANSFERRED $2.5 MILLION AWAY
FROM MY OWN CAMPAIGN TO HELP COUNTER KAMALA’S PLOT TO BUY OUR HOUSE
MAJORITY.

_I say that because I firmly believe that elected officials need to
put skin in the game and fight right alongside you._

And fighting together, our shared efforts paid off: we held the House,
flipped the Senate, and won back the White House.

BUT NOW, WITH MULTIPLE SPECIAL ELECTIONS JUST WEEKS AWAY, I’M
CALLING ON 2.5 MILLION GRASSROOTS PATRIOTS LIKE YOU TO DEFEND OUR

subject: The MAGA movement is bad for women

| Today is International Women’s Day, a day that brings attention to how far we have left to go in the fight against gender inequality. Sadly – especially since Trump took office again – the United States has been going backwards in our commitment to women’s rights. Trump and his far-right SCOTUS appointments were instrumental in overturning Roe v. Wade and leading to severe abortion restrictions all across the country. These abortion bans have had devastating (and deadly) consequences for American women. And Trump’s attacks on reproductive rights are global too, Peter. He reinstated the “global gag rule” which cuts American aid to any organization that provides – or even promotes – abortion services. This dangerous policy has led to the closure of valuable healthcare clinics and prevented organizations from providing lifesaving sexual and reproductive health services and information. Plus, his ridiculous attempt to gut USAID has defunded important women’s empowerment programs that were giving women and girls living in poverty the economic and social opportunities they deserve! [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T78d89e41-c205-45ee-82b2-33424c620a1d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) America should be at the forefront of gender justice and a model to other nations. Instead, we’re gutting women’s rights at home and abroad. Peter, we need leaders who are going to stand up for women’s rights. Democrats are fighting hard against the Trump administration’s efforts to destroy access to reproductive healthcare and trying to limit the damage he causes to women’s equality around the world. [Can you please make a gift in honor of International Women’s Day so we can invest in Democrats who will be advocates for gender justice?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf9e7d4b9-d1e0-4de6-aab0-7e89b580c342/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2df53e82-66ad-4dab-85a7-25bcb51da821/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMtuwyAQRb8GdrGYARtnwSKPUlWRqqpSq2ZJAcdEJjh-Kv36Kmma7cyZOVfXxLYJ1UURuSaIdXA9QSR8RRDP-zl24zHunhdQHPjiXLzG_LrFzR2d8AGfrOFPXy-rdKlTP6fjxu3beYIHPlxa_4Dv0sxHE5rrVG6pU7xyTFCvQAoQHJeipLUqfS6E_BYChCiX3iGvrEcJtkQGTjoaFDLMGWclACLkWe4KzsA5LMBAJSQR7ObJTPRdsAb6YTZdl1LMbIq0UfUwtP0tmCao5y5lp9E2fuz_zmyKBPU9MkE9EdTvP7sPM8a1zgnXt9L4duUPn_ZNto52yrVzaJrQF1f74f8NnRT-BgAA__83Pm6l)
| | Why do some people stay sharp as a whip as they get older, while others have trouble recalling names, dates, and even conversations?

New research from Harvard University suggests age may not be the culprit.

And one Boston medical doctor now says memory problems are often caused by the foods you're eating — or NOT eating.

Dr. George Karanastasis, MD says: _"Your brain needs fuel to create new brain cells, recall memories, and focus on tasks. And where does it get that fuel? From the foods you eat."_

However, due to a change in modern dietary habits, Dr. K says most of us aren't getting the nutrients our brain needs. He says this lack of nutrients can cause brain fog, forgetfulness, or worse.

_"When your brain doesn't receive the right nutrients, it literally starts to starve. And that's when you start to suffer those embarrassing senior moments. You might forget people's names, walk into a room and forget why you're there, or even get lost driving to familiar places,"_ Dr. K says.

Fortunately, Dr. K developed a simple protocol that can help fight memory loss.

Best of all, it doesn't require any major lifestyle changes. It just requires adding [**these 3 foods back into your diet**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJyEkEGPmzAQhX-NuYHssbHJgcN201RVpZ67JzQwdvAWx6ztBvHvK6JVeuz1zTfz3jwM6-Ld3jPzhQHMnjIDYPKFAXy8bSH9eQ8_vtVCX2X9oX-G9pjC6yd6hyd8m1B-_fX9Je5zzFt8f6W3dbuLJ1721T7hT9PGBvTLoZpzRb10xFVle2GUUBJOqqvmnlsztkJbkuPIrXHO2NMoHFk0J20Fr3wPHFoueScEgGiblrTkggi0QOGUYYo_fBoMNvkJRS4bphRjaKYYqqWfS1nzI9iFwaUknH43ueCeZ0wrFrzteLUHy-BipSVSHdboAGslFNQd4VS3fOSjkZa77sTkZV1wssHeCpPnXBLeKAw5LnHA4Hx6BhiO2NAy0EiemDxLFyPlIS-CgS4PiXyyUxmH_58Z_m1Xqad188visz4KuD4KON699_A3AAD__wBVnbw).

Dr. K recently put together a video revealing these foods. And since the video was released, it's gone viral, racking up more than 1 million views. Thousands of folks around the country are singing the praises of this protocol.

He says: _"I've seen this protocol work for thousands of people. People keep telling me: 'Dr. K, I feel so much sharper and smarter. Even my family noticed.' It's wonderful to hear how many lives this has changed."_

Now, what about you? Are you concerned about your fading memory? How would you like to take back control of your life?

If so, watch the video at the link below and try this protocol for yourself. You'll discover which foods can help make sure your brain lasts as long as your body.

==> [**Forgetful? Eat these 3 foods daily and watch what happens...**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJyEkEGPmzAQhX-NuYHssbHJgcN201RVpZ67JzQwdvAWx6ztBvHvK6JVeuz1zTfz3jwM6-Ld3jPzhQHMnjIDYPKFAXy8bSH9eQ8_vtVCX2X9oX-G9pjC6yd6hyd8m1B-_fX9Je5zzFt8f6W3dbuLJ1721T7hT9PGBvTLoZpzRb10xFVle2GUUBJOqqvmnlsztkJbkuPIrXHO2NMoHFk0J20Fr3wPHFoueScEgGiblrTkggi0QOGUYYo_fBoMNvkJRS4bphRjaKYYqqWfS1nzI9iFwaUknH43ueCeZ0wrFrzteLUHy-BipSVSHdboAGslFNQd4VS3fOSjkZa77sTkZV1wssHeCpPnXBLeKAw5LnHA4Hx6BhiO2NAy0EiemDxLFyPlIS-CgS4PiXyyUxmH_58Z_m1Xqad188visz4KuD4KON699_A3AAD__wBVnbw)

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Abbott Ends Remote Work, Texas A&M’s New Chancellor, and Outlaw Country
body:
Governor Greg Abbott has instructed heads of state agencies to [end remote work](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DGPhCAUBOBfgx0GHuDTguIau732SsPJc5csigGyrv_-4vbXT76ZzM9turkQw3b_divZ-l7SBAIMF4qLfvIuxHPSjbe_wg-yIStRS60MGGweVkpCZeYBjVoMmA5Q9zjP2OnFz4hDE-yFCSV6KQ1C16LT2PfDLMmowZNjWpAPNeW2PqjS25UlnulFuZ3T2kT7qHUvTH0xGBmMx3G0z1Jqdj6kK8FgvAoYjEIxGD8Ap80XnmlNlfiR8pOnvYa08SVlfr_sbaWtclr3mE6iwmBssvX7EWIMpUOmxX11IX4m1H8_eVn4CwAA___QrGP8) as an option for state employees, mirroring a similar order from President Trump for federal workers and following a trend among large corporations.
