# Saturday, March 8, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1947, harmonica virtuoso Don Brooks was born in Dallas. Brooks’ harmonica accompanied high-profile artists like Rita Coolidge and Harry Belafonte, and he eventually joined the Texas-born country singer [Waylon Jennings’ band](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kM1u6jAUhJ_G2REd_ySOF15cLk2RKBVSkRCryI6PiSuTIGISePsq3Xc7M_o0-k77Zm9CDP3l01xRp6cfGgasWAFfQdU4E-KrEZnTFpyiGWoqBRW8YIXMOg3eihLBewtoW-WQS6kMU8BoC9TbLOgFBhwqSgvJylwaIatKtRQLrhwaIgBdSMM9Tx0mfJrRx9cw4T1vh2sWdZfSbST8H2E1YfU8z_lreKSHxaVfEpPajvB6InxD17v9uv9_jMczYWUMYyJ8c_h4t7tTKCa0TT9_bden8_fbZXNIW3-2df3wyzb0Dp8LIbtrd5tDjGEsJRFwuZoQf6-kP91Mmv0EAAD__24yZWo), helping define the sound of “outlaw” country music. ## Texas Ends Remote Work for State Employees
Governor Greg Abbott has instructed heads of state agencies to [end remote work](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DGPhCAUBOBfgx0GHuDTguIau732SsPJc5csigGyrv_-4vbXT76ZzM9turkQw3b_divZ-l7SBAIMF4qLfvIuxHPSjbe_wg-yIStRS60MGGweVkpCZeYBjVoMmA5Q9zjP2OnFz4hDE-yFCSV6KQ1C16LT2PfDLMmowZNjWpAPNeW2PqjS25UlnulFuZ3T2kT7qHUvTH0xGBmMx3G0z1Jqdj6kK8FgvAoYjEIxGD8Ap80XnmlNlfiR8pOnvYa08SVlfr_sbaWtclr3mE6iwmBssvX7EWIMpUOmxX11IX4m1H8_eVn4CwAA___QrGP8) as an option for state employees, mirroring a similar order from President Trump for federal workers and following a trend among large corporations. Many state employees received an email this week directing them to return to the [office full time](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DGP3CAQBeBfgztWMICBgiKNu0ubcgWeWS86bFaY2Lf_PvJJKa-aYqTv6b0_H_ePmEvelt9xpdC_HvUOAgwXigt3x5jL-64HDEmglwMFabXUyoCxwzM8Rq-08NolNyafUBinjE-oaJylwDjkcGFCCSelsTDebNTWOT9LMsojRaYFYe613fqTOn3F_VHe9aB2m-s6lPDs_bUz9YvBxGA6z_P2efyl68lgiq3nuRCDaaNzZzCVOsfCYPqG_l9OG-680Vo78bO2T75cAdtKW-e0vkp9E-18abTwmFLtnWNuNPd8XDSMngNYLQwo7qw0XCMij4Cap4jaJPGQfjZDC_g6cyl5Hy3TYlljLt8t-o-zHgH-BQAA___CWHlx) “as soon as practicable,” with some remote workers making the switch as early as Friday. In some cases, down-sized office spaces may limit how many remote workers can return, leaving their continued employment in question. A statement from Abbott’s office [justified the decision](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DGPhCAUBOBfgx3m8UDBguIau732SsPCcyVBMcitu__-4vbXziTfJPNzm24uprg9vt1Ktr7mPCFgx0FyMFNwMb0n1QR7hzCIhqzQSijZYaebxep56CWazlxRUCjN4Od7r4LvAYa7aKK9MJBghOg09q12ShszeEGdHAI5poBCrLm0daFKL3fM6Z2fVFqf1ybZpdb9YPKL4chwPM-z9UvJ29UyHDc6D4ajKzX6RAzHj8AfF7DlwgvV37Lxmnme5-iJIyBo0at2X_am2LCfMaV49JopeKwups9s_feHp8W_AAAA__8s9l8r), saying, "_Texans expect their public servants to be present and engaged in the work on their behalf_.”
## Measles Outbreak Tops 200 Cases
The Texas measles outbreak has grown to [198 confirmed cases](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L1u6yAYxvGrwRsWn8EeGI50ZHVJ147WC7y2UXGIgMbx3VfJ3vmRfnr0_7rOV4gp3tZP2NG255JnwYSmTFI2zAFiOmfVBetYGHmHlhvFldRCm26z6IxxfpGgtEdcNB8ZR-HlsCh2cUPoon1hTLKBc23EpTegzDCMnqOWY0AgimGILZe-bdjwCXVJZ35g6X3eu2S31u6VyH9ETERM4PwNj9qv-TUTMX0gpLYRMcmR3vCgHipWuiPUhJUWvOfSMNA3TPNPcwXhm64lH5WIqbZcTiKnGIj8z_moldZadcWG-xFTivViiGLrDjG977Q_-zys-A0AAP__u5RoDQ) in the state, according to a new report released Friday. With 30 cases reported in New Mexico, the outbreak has [surpassed the 200](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb8Gd1iAwUBB8Rp3ee2W1hgmMVpsIiBx8vcrp9huuyMdzdyr-3WZLxBT3G__YUPXXtc8CyYUZQNlZg4Q03uWXXALC5Z36LiWXA5KKN2tjptRBz0aAwvYMYRBglVMB7iO4DHwLrrzGRuY4VxpMfYapDbGeo5qsAGBSIYhtlz6tmLDF9Rreucnlt7nrUtube1eyfCPiImI6TiOfl_8jkc9PRHTipDa-gv0VERMG0JNWGl-tKUgfNP6KHeoFSsVjFEPJ33izgu64Sv6TIvfgVsllOmKC_cjphTrqIlktw1i-lRqf270dOInAAD__86uavE) mark and resulted in 23 hospitalizations. The outbreak has reenergized debates around vaccination as most of the cases have been reported in [unvaccinated children](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0UL3O4yAQfBrcYcECZl1QXOMu115pLWYTo-A4skmcvP0pab7q60Yaze-_03iiXPLt8pcWDvV1XkdQ4KQyUuGYKJf3aJsUokq9bjhob7U1Dpxv5mDQ8hSNNRr7Dog8W7SmswaMSib2TQ4fM2UUau08dK0n6xH7SbMzfWISVnHKdd3aOnPlF-3n8l6fvLXTujQlzLXed2H-CBgEDMdxtNd5fXxIAQNtNU-FBQw3PnYBw8xU6ixgWJj2wvsPkuujxo3pKr8h8rvxcU9UP3JAJ6N1DjtvJGv00iroZUTnZYQJGFNHE_pmC-l-5FLy3nlh1WWhXL5N66_XPQP8DwAA___haWyw). One deceased person in New Mexico tested positive for the disease in a potential second death from the outbreak.
## Texas A&M Selects New Chancellor
Texas A&M has named Glenn Hegar as the [sole finalist](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LHO4yAQBOCnwR3WssaBFBTXuMu1V1pr2MToMESGi5O3Pzn930wz0qfR_LnNN4op5sdv2ti1973MCDhKGCTYOVBMn1l3wS0Qrqpjp4xWehhxNN3qgIAAAnpFFhbv0SxhYbtoshY82S66E4MBrFKjwUtvSBtrr17xOFwDk9DAIbay923lxm-q9_QpL957X7YuubW1ZxXDL4GTwOk4jv7v0t5nKXA6bYETDGcYgdMXkLTJ-qmNN7nzg3OrknIu_7JnmUpmeY-ZUqxN-pWy55TKLnDqdheeR0wp1osRGh4bxfRd0X685eXwfwAAAP__mcZlFw) for its chancellor position, overseeing 11 university campuses and eight state agencies. Hegar is an A&M graduate and comes to his new role from the elected position of Texas Comptroller of Public Accounts. The announcement, which Hegar called “[a tremendous honor](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuu4yAYhJ8Gd1iYi8EFxTZ02XZLC8NvG-k3RBjFyduvkpz2lHPRp9H8u803nzDl7a8_wLbnWmbOuKJMUGbm6BO-ZtlFu7A4DR3YQctBCsWV7nYrmNbDJGE0XIJgYomKadBTWLQBoWSX7BvGBDPDoDQfe-2lNmYKAygxRfBEMoipldq3HRo8_bniqzyg9qEcHdq9tftJxB_CHeHuuq4-LyGu1zsm3GW4TsIdluCRcPcB0B_zK0I57q0WRKh0Q8iZ7rD5Ss-CQNeUPaaz0W_XHzTsPgdALJVwJ7QZlR4Jd1218X4lxHSOmki2HT7hZ2L79bOH5f8DAAD__4libw8),” initiates a 21-day “comment period” before the board can finalize the decision. Hegar [replaces John Sharp](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOwyAQRL8Gd0SwgMEFxTXucu2V1sasbaQ1jgzKJX9_SvqrZzTz9H6u0xUz57J-406xPZdjAgVOKiNVmBJmfk22S_Gm0qA7itpbbY0D57stat17tQTrvEsGBloCJDXb2xy8RwWmy_E9powKWjsP_cWj9SEMsyZnhkQorKKU23Fe2kaNnlgXfh0POi_zsXcct9buVZgvAaOA8V1Y6zsSMFYBY-9s7wSMJ61UWpUFd5IrUylyoxVPORiJVdaDSS65IOfa5OdG4i7nDctMzMfZnTHdfzNzrr0XVq07Zv4gtH-dPCL8BQAA__-PBWNq), A&M's longest-serving chancellor, who announced his retirement last June.

name: Jenna Burns
subject: Life in prison for saving a cop’s life
body:
If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

Dear Fellow Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=11b3ec6ccfe44f3db2a5fba1e2571ef9&_e=WuBAFedWRtvQrhM32y8L_Px2D-U923WuJuq6L0gq7vJdr3YkD6L8n2z-xywtSN_LsVhaq1kZmH-fDirgIHM3ffQg20vuVQnl7Xnn4iNN7Ex1yW4PvAZnRxGDI3s4Jo8hqQIf9TQiowWDWfGzUnBDe0rvi1Q6ZiNMBf9N6qi5xEU-mMhXeR6KMAOs6ulPIJWBWgJ1JMIlgq1CuYCVDIqOXWBS_OAfXBr0CfgIH-sV1N5ZcaiSk4WW4c5d3tY7swXssav7TJNsFew_Ov0H411zpR8WTQTSUyyXtqS1bLCsmMa9PFE_HQmBvgJx07EGnsmc0zOguhpjMTQieRKTFuZyP_KVC_y8QO8L5hfutsoPszSgpyVcW1b1VXhXbzdX_16g4A6-hYvxlpB2-dcuyx1Heg%3D%3D)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=11b3ec6ccfe44f3db2a5fba1e2571ef9&_e=WuBAFedWRtvQrhM32y8L_Px2D-U923WuJuq6L0gq7vJdr3YkD6L8n2z-xywtSN_LsVhaq1kZmH-fDirgIHM3ffQg20vuVQnl7Xnn4iNN7Ex1yW4PvAZnRxGDI3s4Jo8hqQIf9TQiowWDWfGzUnBDe0rvi1Q6ZiNMBf9N6qi5xEU-mMhXeR6KMAOs6ulPIJWBWgJ1JMIlgq1CuYCVDIqOXWBS_OAfXBr0CfgIH-sV1N5ZcaiSk4WW4c5d3tY7swXsMZ88cFYNUGbxqogRWTZOjbJ8IRMno2XRHbdN0nzYwG9EA_r3cYupAHXh3bGbBQuT9YgGuYd3cIcnhKHjaMrnJSLMJ-Ji3NfaWmYNCI1Ta_7aE9gI3AWvontRPkDzwy2671gbfmr6OPHvvt4pR0gA3Q%3D%3D)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with "MURDERER" scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=11b3ec6ccfe44f3db2a5fba1e2571ef9&_e=WuBAFedWRtvQrhM32y8L_Px2D-U923WuJuq6L0gq7vJdr3YkD6L8n2z-xywtSN_LsVhaq1kZmH-fDirgIHM3ffQg20vuVQnl7Xnn4iNN7Ex1yW4PvAZnRxGDI3s4Jo8hqQIf9TQiowWDWfGzUnBDe0rvi1Q6ZiNMBf9N6qi5xEU-mMhXeR6KMAOs6ulPIJWBWgJ1JMIlgq1CuYCVDIqOXWBS_OAfXBr0CfgIH-sV1N5ZcaiSk4WW4c5d3tY7swXsxIxnWCTYrM9jmNCh0vGt8eSTHfn5x-aablFa9cJy5jtjSo7lnjhSwrUFaVyrJKQqU6stR3lMzzWtD1RpsN_-FrDuKfgCNtGx-FkqHSAKbxxfl5HjlJAneXXqCzlwfCqtTRN2bqPiGcp9c1vkmp5qbA%3D%3D)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families - at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=11b3ec6ccfe44f3db2a5fba1e2571ef9&_e=WuBAFedWRtvQrhM32y8L_Px2D-U923WuJuq6L0gq7vJdr3YkD6L8n2z-xywtSN_LsVhaq1kZmH-fDirgIHM3ffQg20vuVQnl7Xnn4iNN7Ex1yW4PvAZnRxGDI3s4Jo8hqQIf9TQiowWDWfGzUnBDe0rvi1Q6ZiNMBf9N6qi5xEU-mMhXeR6KMAOs6ulPIJWBWgJ1JMIlgq1CuYCVDIqOXWBS_OAfXBr0CfgIH-sV1N5ZcaiSk4WW4c5d3tY7swXsfg-eKZ3R0nPcDhjD-pfozHlqGDnK9UMwTVLlwEBRaVQhTRrIYw_B-2xjghdrwmTBpycQflafMVUjlYP5yyBwDF818cy2afO02u6TV8MFTRSiqPEZ5uWvR9MNuK9C9BaqHlUqII0lt0H9yV7NDRnE4Q%3D%3D)**

His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=11b3ec6ccfe44f3db2a5fba1e2571ef9&_e=WuBAFedWRtvQrhM32y8L_Px2D-U923WuJuq6L0gq7vJdr3YkD6L8n2z-xywtSN_LsVhaq1kZmH-fDirgIHM3ffQg20vuVQnl7Xnn4iNN7Ex1yW4PvAZnRxGDI3s4Jo8hqQIf9TQiowWDWfGzUnBDe0rvi1Q6ZiNMBf9N6qi5xEU-mMhXeR6KMAOs6ulPIJWBWgJ1JMIlgq1CuYCVDIqOXWBS_OAfXBr0CfgIH-sV1N5ZcaiSk4WW4c5d3tY7swXsop_eGlnMjEcEGVkT-jec-Zxnc-Od3_bp97yMOpKw3UU0z-JvuggJCbKzmhfpwtPKsISWtpDNrlZl9YghgDW14f7YTy9S4bRCp8tEc1fcPq-4duMDeJ35m2FgCKyyKRiUsa0uRxXsMhCr5MFkv85NoQ%3D%3D)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=11b3ec6ccfe44f3db2a5fba1e2571ef9&_e=WuBAFedWRtvQrhM32y8L_Px2D-U923WuJuq6L0gq7vJdr3YkD6L8n2z-xywtSN_LsVhaq1kZmH-fDirgIHM3ffQg20vuVQnl7Xnn4iNN7Ex1yW4PvAZnRxGDI3s4Jo8hqQIf9TQiowWDWfGzUnBDe0rvi1Q6ZiNMBf9N6qi5xEU-mMhXeR6KMAOs6ulPIJWBWgJ1JMIlgq1CuYCVDIqOXWBS_OAfXBr0CfgIH-sV1N5ZcaiSk4WW4c5d3tY7swXsXwhleLnQu0Ylf6Y1LCHr1AVyj4NX-Pl6frE7WuUrxvwG7X3mEvAe9AGF-M4M9mYcHgZ6RmD80lJt4-Y645alg-g_oBGsyHHbrY3cFYEuGdXm4NFes70xQDQ7i-sgwGC0VuoDtiSxcpU7pn41K3X6zw%3D%3D)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=11b3ec6ccfe44f3db2a5fba1e2571ef9&_e=WuBAFedWRtvQrhM32y8L_Px2D-U923WuJuq6L0gq7vJdr3YkD6L8n2z-xywtSN_LsVhaq1kZmH-fDirgIHM3ffQg20vuVQnl7Xnn4iNN7Ex1yW4PvAZnRxGDI3s4Jo8hqQIf9TQiowWDWfGzUnBDe0rvi1Q6ZiNMBf9N6qi5xEU-mMhXeR6KMAOs6ulPIJWBWgJ1JMIlgq1CuYCVDIqOXWBS_OAfXBr0CfgIH-sV1N5ZcaiSk4WW4c5d3tY7swXsTL6ataSQyTTLgSPeJ1VvpwqTg8sM79GrMV0PNxhvmgGJAoxyQBuNImXW6rlOemOYmULPKUy590Ua_QQBF8TPAApyTLnsTTCnuuX6Q56CcXsbJ2_3jVDfWEEh1DPwoKoXFatU5Zeaah18yY-VwarGWw%3D%3D)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

clean_body: If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason. Dear Fellow Patriot, If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason. She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars. But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward. Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over. My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate. That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him. James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over. With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer. We couldn't have been more wrong. You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud. The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with "MURDERER" scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down. When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class. My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe. But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago. But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo. James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband. It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him. By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense. My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case. And it still hasn't been enough. I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families - at their lowest moment. And we were at our lowest moment! Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband. You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible. And it's your that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

body:
Are you, friend?

Friend - on days like these, I like sitting back with a nice cup of coffee and thinking about all of the things I'm grateful for as an American.

_**[I'm thankful for living in the greatest country in the history of the earth.

| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/mxwBDR8H25hM38v-6KQcI87paIlS_i-9EFE4XDJQ1a-iOzFFNQaPva6GvoHaNhiztR-F9YSjcF2cg0qhktRjtG7_GyecYLF9e-XIKOSEKhXxjqxqCpZKS7Pm_eXxm4n4kO_RKQeXxtM8XvdMxQRXpZL5DsFr2PG2U6rO_tNOgI0ZXpBbvlQ-6PVLajUY1-VyPIoxxmDYfJh72zCkbjSP9z7RXZWD-1QK--GQvAd5HV_qjIqB7tvnqhH5qGs0QScrZqknR8nTaMW_yn0uZ9MrMIK8YYD9Ebox04iz4M2YZLTPxuvpk4LhuqEY4f65hl4hw2ZgElcMIAC7rxlhzrqTg7rWvGINXRvMa-mcr8t4-A-RwHDHt8KI7jmanLZrE9T-HCM75Am2CM51ehGYBaGaWXybQq9-IK4r7oI5LBI/UenOVrUCT2scfl1OUA6argC_-25gDdXb/6)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/Tn7j7v2deJPKONyNcFLWZZjFYaHdjupnO4M0U0JgQ5zWhJqt5MtQ9_thxOEt_--ivlMPc-n71Lpk6fXfq4I_YQjpj3ppEjNpyUycB1lS9FoE135xZL6X_ligxFPZ25t5ghtMOC9cnbLQHnFwZ9yv7iMl8PiG4f3vwdiAdJ7Z6SxNkuRLYR9z7QDK5g8lY2RBI74TA1XlTf_-O6V2nTh_XMa2U8vyvFGFKxOq31jmKnSWALfK-VUY51eCAJRDRFTisYfGqnqv8ZlMiJNz-5_aTH2jvy6BDG6ghOwDngzRGqSzBga7mo9V-nxQYOVdkLk7sADB-5SdbAUBjbvLqR-MSlS_wGWXGiF5HXYC5WvfapdCxiYYzUe0QeR2EM1cgSIcCXxWmB-zgB5uO3ODrsJlsyGd_wSEOxSsz43Y5NM/0Sc6LVafRfb49Ics7ZShGTgP-aI3IDl8/6)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/YIcAB3Tb0cDLeSoj8DDhRZWOUFDEOFfR8tozPUPcSUe1juDqTpDzSVjBj39F9lX_0yiEtcMyWinYRXmIggJuKqkkdl2ziw1Og9Mh8quxPefCDYSKy5H7ua6j6kuJoQVoldH2BUVEKIYXeyZM4YU0MMAhP0hSSOtwOAGUGAG1mcx6d005UM5IuBpRPGR5vGgABxXIbf1NTOmJGr_z1kE8AInMoCDZRxBdmLA4MKlS9bMrsqwPP1e2Wq6zP70uWDyPRQ6ANkqYwoHft_7hV-9jiKOpbWPz7A/mr1oWQnX6tvQ8pWGXlpydHvHf0qrUsSj/6)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/NTh-XkUkMWb5FMiWQyc9BbzB7oKCh1Yai7sQ7-STPZ7ZfsCGCqKktu3wAxD2El3hW_ypxtX_wegmrhaDaMg4-tS3cJMPIBSXc406koDu7CNBH-aoEyJnhMZ1Uhxw6WneCjEX2RFPegnry1dSToAP-jMzJU8FovRCORBDvkWdo1Sn3rEhT4Lx0U7WQOekF6xOiy2m2iWwaIjzxZdPykwkolZCowmUr3mx_DDd20rzxTrvOeis-B5SyoRP2hbJ87ONhRrCDKyYQ-nyTyhIrfjVMKV1wx1F27l4mFx6Qhay3s3OBXYRxAlQBxC3I9i_-pHuYK0xw_DzvkPq1Mn_g3qluIvv4i9XUq_E2DLkFPfOBEo-gKyjjYqO2n5lGFFqccdk2wHVRNVFn72RRaBgptm_5qNng6TvyWaTf7duz2k/n8mbmOcMbypVT1-YZsTCa9fomMkhTJl9/6)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/BzOaE1-gpMP3CO7NgqHUoG6d7QqE1Q4n554XkzA5zNlekiOWs7FTBiqSIkSFA9HXOoBwtoHhgXAANJ6qHsSgPqCwYsNfjyP9OTGxvY13aB527g4vhRD6KvlrcHlRLLVu7F3zm6grUrMdvCVptzjNmDYmHNdNiqSj1teQl-TJ-TFJxl-9Fh8IpubYFSZHtbXa29FhJT3AEY2jHtaXKotvIUUaaqd5UzeFXT5nxDjiuaBBNvBhw6QDM9mzcxH4SQ5cO_VZUqj9Nn3wR4zdtx46KkS9Nj8TcS_f1OTSJKgaCyIU5kpa7FuXt_GC1a7rPkSdzB3KPgqfOXRu40xzbHWw7bkq3yYkGZyCKPMLpXrSSErzPSQ6-PxA7Xu6QEhPVLCbjoOZRHj3L9eOpLfOGHA28R85W-bVel1P5VysYJ4/DbFrMUonj1OmCVBYsUlJ0qfI2urcGduQ/6)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. name: History Facts
subject: What Nebraska's abbreviation was before NE
body:
In October 1963, the United States Postal Service published an updated list of two-letter state abbreviations, 49 of which have stayed the same ever since. Nebraska is the sole exception, changing from NB to NE in 1969.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68dgvw80rai5aazvi5cfgpvloacad3pa3c0kt6vx2ubznloodbmf516619jf9kuosgwdt0vpv8w02s8gdli3z1n3t6c3avnaqvgt7e1mug7ijis3iqh9bs8t1epbg39tj56ctgkg1jhsqng5g&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sst0i0&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Nebraska’s abbreviation was changed from NB to NE in 1969.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sst0i0&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [U.S. History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sst0i0&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sst0i0&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| I n October 1963, the United States Postal Service [published](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sst0i0&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) an updated list of two-letter state abbreviations, 49 of which have stayed the same ever since. Nebraska is the sole exception, changing from NB to NE in 1969. State postal abbreviations originated in 1831, when there were 28 states and regions in the U.S. The initial abbreviations included “O.” for Ohio and “Mic. T.” for the Territory of Michigan, among others. As new states were admitted, the USPS updated the list in 1874, 1943, and finally 1963.
---
The 1963 list updated previous abbreviations that ranged from two to five letters long (including NEB for Nebraska), adopting universal two-letter abbreviations nationwide. However, six years later, the Canada Post unveiled an abbreviation list of its own, which shortened the province of New Brunswick to NB. The Canada Post asked the U.S. Postal Service to change Nebraska’s abbreviation in order to avoid any confusion when sending mail across North America. The request was met without resistance, and the abbreviation for Nebraska was [changed](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sst0i0&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) from NB to NE in November 1969.

## Kool-Aid was invented in Nebraska.
Kool-Aid was [invented](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sst0i0&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) in 1927 by Edwin Perkins, a resident of Hastings, Nebraska. While working at his father’s general store, the young Perkins grew fascinated by the idea of inventing new products. He performed various experiments with foods such as Jell-O, and even patented a tobacco-based medicine known as Nix-O-Tine. After moving to Hastings in 1920, Perkins introduced locals to a sweet beverage he concocted called Fruit Smack. This soft drink concentrate was sold in six flavors and became extremely popular, though the fragile glass bottles caused shipping issues. Ever the chemist, Perkins figured out how to remove the liquid and sell the product as a mixable powder in bright paper envelopes, which he renamed “Kool-Ade.” By 1931, the product was such a hit that Perkins moved operations to Chicago, and in 1934, he again renamed the drink “Kool-Aid.” Perkins later sold Kool-Aid to General Foods — the manufacturer of Jell-O — in 1953.

clean_body: In October 1963, the United States Postal Service published an updated list of two-letter state abbreviations, 49 of which have stayed the same ever since. Nebraska is the sole exception, changing from NB to NE in 1969. | I n October 1963, the United States Postal Service an updated list of two-letter state abbreviations, 49 of which have stayed the same ever since. Nebraska is the sole exception, changing from NB to NE in 1969. State postal abbreviations originated in 1831, when there were 28 states and regions in the U.S. The initial abbreviations included “O.” for Ohio and “Mic. T.” for the Territory of Michigan, among others. As new states were admitted, the USPS updated the list in 1874, 1943, and finally 1963. The 1963 list updated previous abbreviations that ranged from two to five letters long (including NEB for Nebraska), adopting universal two-letter abbreviations nationwide. However, six years later, the Canada Post unveiled an abbreviation list of its own, which shortened the province of New Brunswick to NB. The Canada Post asked the U.S. Postal Service to change Nebraska’s abbreviation in order to avoid any confusion when sending mail across North America. The request was met without resistance, and the abbreviation for Nebraska was from NB to NE in November 1969. | By clicking a link in this email, you're agreeing to our and . **[Could Trump
Dismantle The President Donald Trump has proposed a **historic tax overhaul,** including the **elimination of federal income taxes and the IRS,** replacing them with **tariffs on imports.** In a **January 2025 address,** he stated, _"Instead of taxing our citizens to enrich foreign nations, we should be tariffing and taxing foreign nations to enrich our citizens."_ This proposal aligns with the **Fair Tax Act,** reintroduced by Republican lawmakers, aiming to **[replace income taxes with a national consumption tax.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxskT1vpDAQQH-N6UD2mK8tKMhaFKdNl5yUayJjjxdnzYfAkLC__mRutdW1z2_0PBrZT86avSLFCwHorF4IAOE1AVg9_y3f31_nPb7dL3X8zQEDJ3B-qBs85UFJXYv1suVnvtx_vt7-jC9yY0_d7xM-5Uc0wV5aF2ghIl2lIJlREVasSFnK86wsoq6CTIMpqTmxljJTolZFmaXITm2rtIQ0shVQyCinJQOA7JSgbKlhbQaFOUllSpLSI5SYGdF3drjhrKV1e6LGPnJV5_20HB9rCDRuSqRzeLVyUHgdnQ4WgcbOS-zGcepGh3Eoxn4OE7xZff-5jOuskHDRzIhv_xoiNAjk4b1HbdeecCGU1w-mZD9Jex3-M0UhhpxA_jk4qwkXt34vl-zr1099wONMXIjLR32W6cdrNFd6-rbO2SUvSEqvx7phu62CvwEAAP___P2Wqw)** If implemented, this **sweeping change** could have **[major implications](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxskctu4yAYhZ8G72zhHwP2wos0yKt0MVIzUmdTUS4xDb4I42Tcpx_hibLq9vAdfRz9cpi9s1uL-AsC6J1eEAAiBwSwRvJbns-vYcuv36dDfidgUo7g-EBv8IRHJfVBrKcbO5Ll--_X25_pRd7KJx632Tzhh7Qwg3Q-pVxkuq1AllZlpi15VVaE0ZpnfcsprbG0VcM5xVQ3jOnK1rrmnFhmKclcCxgoJrguAYA2hZGf2JafFLhtpLI1qvAuKmwwJvZuvJqgpfNboaYh820f47zsH-sQdH4upPfm4uSozGXyOlEIOheW3E_T3E_e5MmYx5AapFvj8LFMa1AGEdEFY97-O0RyIGDpfTDarQMiQqioH5mSwyzdZfyhhSEHhoB9jN7p1KrPX7-uzb277uF-JiLE6f1wlNX7axZaPd-d925hHFX4ss9N624t_AsAAP__xzmVbw)** for **401(k), IRA, and TSP** accounts. Here’s how:

**Potential Benefits**
* ✅ **No More Taxes on Withdrawals****\- Traditional IRAs, 401(k)s, and TSPs may no longer be taxed** , allowing retirees to keep 100% of their savings.

* ✅ **Roth IRAs Become More Valuable.**

* ✅ **More Disposable Income for Investing** \- Without income taxes, individuals could have **[more take-home pay](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxskT2PozAQQH-N6UBmDIYUFNlYVFnpis1Je81qsIfgi_mQMdkjv_4EF6W69vmNnkeD_eRsu1aseGMAnTUzA2DiyACWIH7i5fLu1_j2OB_jbwG0cQanp3qHlzxoNEe1nO_yJObHn98fv8Y3vKcvPawTveRnNKEerdtooSJTZYBpqyOq0iJLMyHzsoi6SiMR5lzyg5HQpqBlK4u8NGlOBywbiGwFHHIueJkCQH5ICBvepk0ORXtA3ZYs43soaT1R6OxwI2_QujXRYx-5qgthmveP1QxqNyXoHF0tDpquozObxaC2fo7dOE7d6CjeinHw24Sol9B_zePiNTGhak_08a-htgYDub33ZOzSM6GUDubJNPYT2uvwnykOMUgG8mtw1jChmsYPpQo_Lrcd7mcSSp0_jyfMPt8jX5np2zpnZ1mwjF_3dbft7hX8DQAA___TQJaG)** , potentially increasing contributions to retirement accounts.

**Potential Negative Impacts**
* ❌ **Uncertainty Around Tax-Deferred Growth and current benefits.**

* ❌ **Consumption Taxes Could Reduce Purchasing Power** \- retirees **[might end up paying more](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxskT1vpDAQQH-N6UAw5msLis1a6IpNl5wu10SDPV58MR8yhhz59Sdzq63SPr_R82hwmK3Re8OqJwbQG7UwAMbPDGD1_Ce-vj67Pf74up7jTw4UOIPLXd3gIY8S1Vms16288OXr75-X39MTbtlD9_tMD_keTWhAYwOtRKSaHDDTMqImq_Is52VRV1HfVBoUB006rVWXSTzxuuQ5dXVd1B1CFZkGUihSntYZABSnhLBLddYVUOkTSl2zPD1CiXZEvjfjBzmFxu6JnIbINr3383J8rGXQ2jlBa-lmcJR0m6wKFoPWuCW20zT3k6U4FGPvwgRvVz-8L9PqJDEuWkf08r8hQoNBGd4HUmYdGBdCenVnEocZzW38ZiqFGEoG5ftojWJcqPxX-WPdQfIDHmfiQlzfzhfM354j16j501hrlrJieXo71g3bbQ38CwAA__-_GZYN)** on purchases, diminishing the benefits of tax-free withdrawals.

* ❌ **Market Volatility & Investment Uncertainty.**

* ❌ **Employer 401(k) and TSP matching contributions** could decrease or be restructured.

While some believe this could be a **major win for retirees,** others see **risks that must be carefully navigated.** Within the **Internal Revenue Code (IRC) Section 408(m)** lies a **little-known provision** that could provide a **powerful advantage** in protecting your savings. | | The corrupt elites in Washington D.C. thought they could silence the truth, but we're about to prove them WRONG.Every day, fearless patriots inside the federal government are risking their lives to expose the corruption running rampant in our nation's capital. _**And that's where _YOU_ come in**_. We've seen firsthand the toll these whistleblowers take -- targeted, smeared, and often financially ruined for simply telling the truth about what is happening in our government. But with your help, we can CHANGE that. That's why I'm creating the **Citizen Journalism Foundation.** CJF is a non-profit**** dedicated to empowering and financially supporting whistleblowers who expose corruption at the highest levels of our government. I've been exposing government corruption for years. But this year -- 2025 -- is our chance to take things to the NEXT LEVEL. Make no mistake, there are hundreds (if not thousands) of potential whistleblowers who are thinking about coming forward with earth-shattering evidence of the obstruction and corruption. Individuals serving in the department of Justice, CIA, Pentagon, and so forth. Our fight is just beginning, and we need your support now more than ever. The so-called "deep state" is doing everything they can to keep their dirty secrets buried -- but with your donation, we'll continue to give whistleblowers the resources they need to _bring the truth to light_ and take down the rot from the inside. _**[_**Will you chip in $25 today to make sure the voices of whistleblowers are heard?**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/gE4JdYgD0kzPz-gPZgOAbBueYE3f2Ex5YIhKhaK0_DNrtQmP0GcZTjoum4JIHUf94Goj6X8C1Z_86ElYKsOXpYgczxJmZbNSzsLGwkO1jZVo-8lqTpXrieCKMEnmjycD2cyZLAM02TId9U79B5sw2cjeAx0Rxpy8AkewyUQo8f2N8ylcuhuZ1VELaEDfPmmv2x1lXocpSHmcmAa5owQ4Ja-L-t8oZJAZ2nwR44MntjNj2E_tKeM5pnO1VQqD-szwzvRd5FIRv8OVfpHUKwyxTNgqaX6WIL9pFKM2D3LwyZYBuNdiCr5mBqdFGttqgLm_ANXCsqVq9GDJvmXnJ5Zh2Uo9BmkWjHpmYcPBCXAzOWR7emCyCl9-PrT13pBB90voeZYqnmpPJZYEj-pWsgO11BeznF-YfffsKGU__3itZ9QJ5TLxBbOrma4PoPapqMNeOXy7M2OKoQh1h_blFXJdb0hWSRAyQ77e9GXB/lBKvwW35e_1YWCo40sqCHbb9Skk7Gy_g/6)**_ Already a generous supporter has pledged a $100,000 matching gift, doubling every donation. __[_**That means your $25 donation will double to $50**_. ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/dvK-3s_HbgE_LWQz_SRVWA-3262B6dFNc4-hog6dZrjmexyFcvPs0Zd_fqfA1h9F8lwuFeOuCBWkxHxYAhA2s4Cmi9ww0vlUBFU16af79ic_IxRNd0eH3g52ejsAfJ0crwfNd9k2T2zUIQ-2agG4hZx7l2BjJpIRJjfwUeQSgFRsvmCd0YG7J-O0gwP-nPqncU2v00yLp8fNeC_fo5QVmMT-JmdLe9cNrFUYWPIcXquFVimny6kVgaWjvBQ1hRyo6EK4chGHMk21a8OxkoF_fihd4MP3E4axcHiwH7VpGMKbFJM05jHbHrizzUUdW6sOcKid4KlMOiKbtfRTwx5ObEcmNxSOBSkOFNj44PNVxbo00ee7fNo5RBpwr64HhDHilbVTyRjBXSXTHJvWKa6Vj5CckF7U1RdcWDFOraLf0z7cDyn2WphK69BHRGdEq_QYSSCU85XdqkKpL8czYprAvrwgPVNotqbqZbC5/uaPiVFkmSAkK7ONq38QMPwpBfO3ponHq/6)_We're counting on you._

clean_body: 2025 is the year of the whistleblower. Fasten your seatbelts. | | | | | | | The corrupt elites in Washington D.C. thought they could silence the truth, but we're about to prove them WRONG.Every day, fearless patriots inside the federal government are risking their lives to expose the corruption running rampant in our nation's capital. And that's where YOU come in. We've seen firsthand the toll these whistleblowers take -- targeted, smeared, and often financially ruined for simply telling the truth about what is happening in our government. But with your help, we can CHANGE that. That's why I'm creating the Citizen Journalism Foundation. CJF is a non-profit** dedicated to empowering and financially supporting whistleblowers who expose corruption at the highest levels of our government. I've been exposing government corruption for years. But this year -- 2025 -- is our chance to take things to the NEXT LEVEL. Make no mistake, there are hundreds (if not thousands) of potential whistleblowers who are thinking about coming forward with earth-shattering evidence of the obstruction and corruption. Individuals serving in the department of Justice, CIA, Pentagon, and so forth. Our fight is just beginning, and we need your support now more than ever. The so-called "deep state" is doing everything they can to keep their dirty secrets buried -- but with your donation, we'll continue to give whistleblowers the resources they need to bring the truth to light and take down the rot from the inside. Already a generous supporter has pledged a $100,000 matching gift, doubling every donation. counting on you. In truth, James O'Keefe | | | | Citizen Journalism Foundation** PO Box 717,Westwood, NJ 07675 Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: A fair, efficient, and simple tax system
body:
Fair, efficient, and simple are words you probably don't associate with our tax system.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0a2921464c554fc19312e9f460762991&_e=BsziOMrJHEYzGtCnb4AekpkLhrCvwYN63HcUalKSHBCY8P7ct0Mqe0p4ue5HZV6FqzEAlvzX9vsfC3VdvPVD88FlZ1snWl--ov1SCWrycpiC45SmMLPpe_UdUXUfO11gw1HKueToNMhQZ5CipWiHytzRqrNY2UT415yy53Okfs4wkAM-XyO_rkeOMFNLUYXgRCpHzfXuvS6FMvH39lW2r3ab-baRylOrRhIX3dv2SzzlKdX4J1lUHWJGRFw4UwCdGRx_YfmQSLCzsHns0Aq7tAmx8OpVg3gkx-c0BxqIOWN5yU7d5Tps5hoU9SrtjuDzOl5mXCHDII1jVp7rwVPaNf3Drv8ABVwvbg0UDqBJVzs%3D)
---
---
| | Dear Friend, [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0a2921464c554fc19312e9f460762991&_e=BsziOMrJHEYzGtCnb4AekpkLhrCvwYN63HcUalKSHBCY8P7ct0Mqe0p4ue5HZV6FqzEAlvzX9vsfC3VdvPVD88FlZ1snWl--ov1SCWrycpiC45SmMLPpe_UdUXUfO11gw1HKueToNMhQZ5CipWiHytzRqrNY2UT415yy53Okfs4wkAM-XyO_rkeOMFNLUYXgRCpHzfXuvS6FMvH39lW2r6-fwJYyLspT3RlsPby6V74oXyrWz3QWoWZktLH8L4BM8gADDptjmBhC-oira6Hl-FZbMuo21fCMr8zHZGqyOvzbd-n1_QKQFu7MfXM2LjqfmZ9KXwmZJPXqXze7JhAh0_vD9Wvl9vREoFaMwl6nK0E%3D)
Fair, efficient, and simple are words you probably don't associate with our tax system. But what if they could be?

Unfortunately, the federal income tax is a complete mess.

It's not efficient, fair, or simple. It fosters tax avoidance and cheating and costs billions of dollars to administer. First proposed in 1981 by Hoover fellows Alvin Rabushka and Robert Hall, the flat tax was intended to simplify the federal tax system by replacing the progressive federal income tax system with a low and simple flat tax. They believed that the flat tax was the fairest, most efficient, simplest, and most workable tax plan.

The flat tax plan would give an enormous boost to the US economy by dramatically improving incentives to work, save, invest, and take entrepreneurial risks. It would also save taxpayers hundreds of billions in direct and indirect costs.

As we navigate the complexities of our present tax system, it becomes evident that change is necessary. The classic book, _The Flat Tax_ , critiques the flaws in our highly progressive tax structure and introduces a practical, efficient, and workable alternative.

Hall and Rabushka explain that:
* All income should be taxed once, and only once, at a uniform low rate.
* A flat tax would eliminate the distortions of the present tax treatment of business.
* It is not an academic abstraction but a workable solution that has been implemented in many countries.
* If meaningful, systematic tax reform is to succeed, it won't be birthed in Washington. It will come from millions of taxpayers demanding fairness in taxation.

That's why we want to share this Hoover Classic with as many Americans as possible, starting with you. By requesting your free copy of _The Flat Tax_ eBook, you not only gain access to invaluable insights but also become part of a community engaged in reshaping our thinking on taxation.

As you delve into the pages of _The Flat Tax_ , you'll discover not only the critique of the current system but a practical alternative that has been a guiding light for those seeking fairness, efficiency, and practicality.

Join us in unlocking the legacy of _The Flat Tax_. Claim your free copy now and become part of a movement for transformative ideas in tax reform. You can get your eBook copy here: [https://resources.hoover.org/the-flat-tax](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0a2921464c554fc19312e9f460762991&_e=BsziOMrJHEYzGtCnb4AekpkLhrCvwYN63HcUalKSHBCY8P7ct0Mqe0p4ue5HZV6FqzEAlvzX9vsfC3VdvPVD88FlZ1snWl--ov1SCWrycpiC45SmMLPpe_UdUXUfO11gw1HKueToNMhQZ5CipWiHytzRqrNY2UT415yy53Okfs4wkAM-XyO_rkeOMFNLUYXgRCpHzfXuvS6FMvH39lW2r9hg9YaDvQusyPjKbU7qxSASU2dPAK2RhLBz8Tg8Gn6R8wHAd7-s7tbrHSiNVkM0s5IDFIL-z4FdHT-VLQ6p3T6sNOh3u0KEwp3QomvorgHYysUdz3-isKc_mA3Oam58zPxk0qHr1uYm4Ah-aXICC5Y%3D)

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover 's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA 94305
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---

subject: A ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris

| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/CsdHshisSk7F8ZkP_aaylKNM4s8peDqU7T8OR2Rn0qRsJfVxZhbEjef9joNsVNvafS3K1gEjBB4U-xK0Nrc_q8eL0Sp3AL9MoORIaj_StEVDKjHwhjH3qpw0X6CJHOd0yQw7eS0L4udDbcUWVjfs7hFilcNe0333ir3TE7ddLZhuVWiqrO5HH6LDrzeXYbeRr4YwljzhNP3sfbZkoQ0UEAIdL8Fs4CR4_CMAkNbyb99dyna_A7kRJRbHmxFnJFhLiy90JXBD483Y6tV41l-7zoMBpQbZBM2Hv92Ls_PADSkPGmIyhAQ5DUqvmAHoeNOF2CaxYTkH9i3LTljOTBIA2uzWMoQUT63ySVlNihgwS8wMUraHe4ruVUOol_gBlXKGX7OWV5p3PQJx19QA_eIZyy_hZD7GcAIombZPRs69/ZOBo-i8Jx-WAvxfnzDyPWIrZIcDtUnhW/6)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/z1wC-yKB399_zLqhD7CtCeIQM9NVxVLtnawVkn5vLdGAj6ZxnyaCIM5mztgjK0GBubNmy_I86JC1zR_WbAIwndFkuozbp0043pBzSFJzxwZ21a9MnGLjz_N99cRlZZ_WclN_2pbVH4VJKS32qfTlGSKiTnw5ftNXjrwA5LUZAM3mZZ_9pgZ7Jr_IXAkrUf0dN4BH1h-1YVTxI9s58yRJbzc2AlV4Qn7neDIyRlPVCQ7HJPhjcgb2w1Eb_lpo4yjhfzC2bij6VrE3PUR-xg7hUexXtYt_QwNfQuyDoHln4ZcIkHtp5Cr5C-B4Cxvs7Wa9QG_8-BdZc9xvJhgNERkVNl1JFybJtcFjzs-7-HZpRv4AqG_xP8UzLBbgQCtQ_WpJdZ-hMezVTCVWk3dMjxhLSo48di8EROm6AZeBEp3g/ArGXDTFruvEvIVNBSs84Jy-OJk9iUFhp/6)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/DVKRbksEhpVyCYNv87KV6y-HkTWuSFyi_9WJiS6m0Np-w6CP0vjdJyqDTjW8nXUcJPmoGGwWVhlDIALPingDT0QrUDGz8EG5Qtt3gsRx4sIxUTzrx6h6ufrBkMNqW4iPYb0GZuwXoeGMGYFZa-_bW8DXtftYNpLkBWQe-B2T_U41ao4SPGXkoxN_5yO2ySh1NnYgtLdoqYWtMWbHBynuLxevN2UhGkJ31Zt2EGc7ohj4vVYHtf2_kKKFgcvWHWci9H27dapTG2a5K3-MMcUi_67M32TBeg/aDiqWG8PjhPYD6C2MVruV9tbsTtfyZcH/6)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/-0mvqL7hnXwDiLNA0q3ww4Ao5L3NOdmH5j1IUAoYM5EWwevMhleKSHiIU959TvureKj21bmd-Dhy5Flqfr-wsoR17IU2Rqs6qeEiJRSoTYuSoKlsqq4Bh5v3t0HNtJQBkqXuw2BH4HD5TkiW1wRwjh0NXnnEalRGWj8L2h56cEP87n2iWpGDKrxcyinxSO27N5m3KEQBPfS64y-1Pdj6pFkJh8tXJekvvYgBSoowA7uy3KtybKaUjnNwF6OodBd2KmdvAPorXYPTyiYAG6vEUIQWm8D4mlQWmI3TOjgLndqhZyatjCLkxeK4J1iw15TcGx7tu69UuJ49ptmlQiWEmrkQER1P5DNMiW99fyxS8On1Vg-M4X6_dqi9phQg_T6DvAIUrCfVc-wsG5gmUDykR9i5VQqVuy_TjYJvyDo7/G0t8w5ZJLF0kP5ZJmXLGdkcpaw2NS4gM/6)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/efm3IfOLAepJIC4LCKGwjbKtTZ53cdd_uIR162WfeVeqp6yRRc9bTntThcoxV4SsjsYi3YgK98ZTnfcX7e4abyzlShbZlCXtKa7CR5DWjXN51FtcToWrfgfNHFCGfgIS5tahO43nfU0uJgJG1S6CJNVGyFH1hS4llyqRW4mrA3dhqrRInm32OZr1zAVtqW35AEo-on10h_xT3E4agIBxmtzUzldBgi8l7yXhCXBZ7cgha8TTrp-RRxKVvNtZuklM3LfmU2dz0G9eVSbvASXWeaT5z1KykVXBVbyIcgn7Y-33F3F8rFU_ALbZ-_PuqoSo23lrah5RHXysfOIibhwhW1A3h_JUMVIT8RL8SMFtJ2850NTA4JXfyAAcVR-rFVKvWJjTzd8PEBGKJMJw1NrTNg59EI0_d5cRlRfky6Xx/97_FZx8fmZdDc4ij7ngskokeBaAiZpAJ/6)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/5Y1t-yvryYo9M2DqOgOxoSoJkZryzWmSq43fYnlA7AyXVRFoj_ZDg-EoP_xHKOFEOzIRvaxOOpGYK7Ge4IF3JLR4GFKcrD_KHDMWtAMRi5NGgOyzurvTUjFnB1eC6E-o5i-_ggfqZonRWVev2-Jas8A5LAF9wkdCT2R6Tew8deMwh1jdX_LaCvE8tl9p3rMOFvj1bkLoG9rxKvqoEv9cHyL7EgbhYkqMWFn9zX2QcmtRsalM5CCPEHPrqRNuGIIwZnUj3Ks2uMYK84qLZtLJyhKEySzd4ga7S8NzZsJBylKC7eq-W9RZDxnZx187ELe24sKvTFvL-PnMuuPmdmo42OxgZbqOFT2iKFqHg5-dtHMXKtxXMdqd2M9MXO3jAAdbUX8wQGGPRBCoj3yxWeuzHxWHwp9pLnOb3IFINkML/vVnxjlZf-gn4U7rphxSMlXJaYZRdxDJ7/6), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – **[your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/Dl37D141UzOhzsAPQqzKS8UF8zTkcwAumIf130tUdYpopUalpaUj_97q3yLQUcMSaZtXggwXuI1zrt4Do72tdfZ0uGbWBtuip4yE77SsBp-4dHH00lfy9oqaYPnmx1nlU-09x17QdTJbQguAptllV7J1iKEoejpH0jDxIswVGOu2iXBIPgQUEFb4vtJohoq-mbbxxrdb139gODZEs9N7qrUO0kOW88ntx038jboQ6XkXOUG3dMiffjG-aZTvki5Nqns-dvfj_Z4_Rpwe9cjqTOMyw2Y29eVLQOt4lh7SZDmuzvyectDL_YmZ4qLv0eyZJBX9VAulD1DQNd_emHNF6WRfrkcWg7UFFmoXRIpBlNqViAnZOh7rzM7W9i--xD1yQxNY0mbSXh8UGOvgqTxIIn_YfBtwP-Qpt-1pX5CY/3TiTdmbellJLKokVbz-I8h3QtT1Z2vhS/6)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote

clean_body: It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. | | | | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. | | | | “A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president. So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”~ Elon Musk | | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives and the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is already being watered down in Congress. Your vote is already being watered down in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully canceled out in future elections. American elections should be decided by American citizens., here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was before the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices. Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues. Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. But I can’t do it without you. No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,honest elections... none of it matters.Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have expressly banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020. This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. , I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions. The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. It means we can’t be bought. On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling billions to dark money “non-profit” groups to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting and banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. It’s not rocket-science. And it shouldn’t be controversial. Yet, the radical left is pouring billions into their scheme to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate. Nothing less than an amendment to the U.S. Constitution will suffice when it comes to stopping this threat. P.P.S. It’s imperative that you and I help President Donald J. Trump hit the ground running - especially when it comes to defusing the ticking timebomb left behind by the previous regime in the form of “open borders” and allowing non-citizens to vote. | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 | Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

subject: Defeat DEI Survey
body:
It’s time for merit to make a comeback.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/9bVubXJqj3BLE3X6RBIGwlwsOUtmg-wSwXBCaK9380Q-YZjxk1SgEY7r2GtaVf5-UCBl80cKFOklrdV64uHqu1Vv6kw9G6lrhsj95PHgK-S-vURw1m7dO6yzvjgpU0_ica8jvc8C5YX8oF3hy8aTpatvLu3wQbPIqdIK507QabXs1Zi4tmM3PmYx2n_mX4bnEGuqZKReCeK2jDfonEF_zX6vOBLwPcbFIdilTFV8AIzHEd7eSHohFrC7xQ1KmYYkeiDYawyuGUFkZdGVLsgay9atICDf0CjY-M2cRja8qmPPtMI9jjJWshBOocOLyMA5bBS2C_L4rCXzbiojvFTRoJCm_m8xkQBhlk3rTWlldJZuLPyT1P-ThyYk0ID3sXyCVjhxLI0ysrPYBdo7QwxOdXqw-ufiwBG-grB7IAyyjBXvGOxugsngF187hrQJxg/eOGvlOajvS_-mOi2X85SW7uLP0V_2syF/6)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

It's time for merit to make a comeback.

[That's why I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/sQGDpLZvdQM61cCr8m5oUpwT_vns4wke_SH4CnMDKHekYmbeuiw6WCMuwp2DMOhS63Xi0J1mfyov_O84gMjI2zqFjeW7b_l4uXD2JHwR_Lh5U-B2xfLetdR1es-iiPSjRddZkOr_trhMBOl2I1oUbXY3nCsr7ZzXLtvty3vjhQJkFsu9pVpFvXjQ4n9jwwT5i9kCgA_WVSYkdQ0qt6Ewj3cZIgJ3SgC5Lmp0iOsLOGz8bM1IptOr9NCBn3ZTKMskrYN57Qdb7KKsIYwp5XWSNCx04_KNOU_dBieQ-HSm4v_5nbVhmyQCx7uSUKZPARooAFLxww616od2EAeFlRTRADEkKf_lYyFPWFCxzT_fkExEhQOgfJLLpnwS-RSGPTDuslYTXO6tareKlZXaMEdSA2Kfb0bxp_3y34bbbC841i9nMezBVMYnhisxaoQUDg/HWbHszwj86zNOsU9cK25ZvHDfyMWPX05/6).

Like many Americans, I'm sure you're all too aware of the damage that has been done to our country by policies implemented in the name of "Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion" or "DEI."

Race grifters and hustlers make _millions_ perpetuating DEI lies, including...

* America is a nation built on slavery, not freedom.
* All racial disparities are indisputable evidence of systemic racism--and if you question this conclusion, you must be a racist.
* Students in K-12 schools can be divided into oppressors and oppressed based on their skin color.

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Hillsdale College, where I am president, is engaged in a nationwide fight on the battlefield of education to save young Americans from this anti-American agenda.

Since our founding in 1844, we have offered "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty."

To do this work well, we need a clear understanding of **what informed Americans like you think about DEI and how best to fight it.**

So please share your views by completing the **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time.

Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept any government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations.

**We remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities have rejected their founding statements and embraced radical and dangerous ideologies.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** , which you can access at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/UqHp84Nf2WRI6ZTr2_BxMCCHkhffAgQqPaMjE63EWVLnlqy7EGPn_fbvKOcGtzaK3YKLPSmtG7xLSdCmzLC6aY5OTsumjThvpDV3UGCScslv4mwFKuu9hTsaHgWvifcvnGVMbRnhK7ev-cfV4YWMDx5GQn39SiAmPz8va-JhVOVCptJKYlSmpgKHP7__wKUc9Gu_1faUNkLH1MbwEZ0FfxdkJMcba-4JpojGrHxymoZnJI_DZ_Ni6F9BJwEs-q6Zw2e9YbzQBKU6GdxJlqYsCh-kiLOSvJdcF2yHspDlF6dPwn2sLtbbtSKJag0BMv3EmvotDlu8igjjqjX7xuGIq1n3ihzOSckmeUwspy_tUKoZSwvzEFOXImrM5-ZlZs5VVdib7USMjRIvQPKsZo6REDyIE1WG-4uMyNmoMe4Y_8v83FbRr7GOwxpCRYZ85Q/71EnHsREoT_r5mYIUC6qny041SCzwdPv/6)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. Please fill out your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. Your answers will help us to defend excellence and merit against the tyranny of DEI. Today, DEI affects almost every aspect of American life. This endangers lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

You can take your survey at the secure link below. It will only take a few moments of your time.

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/7S1SrdZxPFP5nc3R6B8PSy32a25Ep2doUe2t5Jj4rVmprz2RzswZGTp_sgbwBnIIOgJ6vzPIGUeMt_lUi5DZozaLoAEd5cbSs9aSz1I0TJnoG8ACI6c8aonN7qLYxS779uc8mHukOZx0t36TrjUuWkLDGcIkJIEPPJAIfoLKUYhkI5N3Ca_lSsILT14bze3bT4gbJDJSFJbAjqXKMNYskY2SXR5spN4eCb0GwQHtC_nEwLuW2rNQnQjW6t1RO2GNkX--Kx79y5vJArcPFzZ6PvYtakYmtgYdeKWDq05NbuLQAxfwit-YlJJs_vnKDPr-nOP4JV0WeIaE9-z5hhOzy8GiDJln3PDJfJrojTN9MJjodSpMhozA64GT5F4axJGa8WYk2I4lJgwRmzgm7stvHeBfeD_fBJD5rratqWUV6TvAf-acWM2vBhXAtqnyLg/33x3kvpuYal-5YlgDNKKJaxQahPmrgrc/6)

Thank you!
---

body:
Whose message won? President Trump & the GOP or the Democrats?
Peter,

President Trump just delivered his _FIRST_ Address to a joint session of Congress, outlining our Party's unified vision to Make America Great Again!

_But immediately after, Democrats sent out one of their Senators from a TOP battleground state to give the official rebuttal and viciously attack the President 's speech._

**[The President spoke. The Democrats attacked. Now it's time for the _PEOPLE_ to weigh in and decide whose message won over the heart of the country.

My situation is in your hands, Fellow American. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I was working hard in our capital. **Seriously** _**, a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!**_
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Fellow American. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage._If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short. _ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**
