name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Why the legislative gridlock in Jackson?
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/visionaryvsvoid?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend, I wanted to share with you why, despite a clear conservative mandate, the Mississippi legislature is in danger of gridlock.

**Governor Tate Reeves has a vision for Mississippi.** He wants to promote economic growth and eliminate the state income tax. He’s also pretty big on law & order, efforts to improve the education system and work force development.

Agree with him or not, it’s undeniable that he has a plan for our state.

**So, too, does the Speaker of the House, Jason White. He’s made an income tax elimination bill his number one goal for this session.** Under Speaker White’s leadership the House has also passed bills to extend school choice and reduce the red tape that restricts healthcare. The House is moving forward with purpose.

**But what about the Senate? What’s Lieutenant Governor Delbert Hosemann’s plan? **

Two months into a three-month session, it remains a mystery. Mr. Hosemann has yet to share with us his plan for Mississippi.
---
| Instead, the Senate leadership has spent the session saying “no” to nearly every proposal on the table. School choice? (Almost) killed in committee. Restoring the ballot initiative? Denied. Income tax elimination? Don’t hold your breath.

**The Senate leadership has blocked conservative reforms at every turn— _without offering any ideas of their own._**

This is baffling. Mississippians have overwhelmingly elected conservative leaders to every statewide office. Yet here we are, watching the Senate leadership stall policies that align with the values voters supported, all while failing to present an alternative path forward.

Normally at this stage of a session, if the House and Senate were gridlocked, you would expect a negotiation.

**How can the House negotiate with a Senate leadership that****struggles to articulate what it wants?**

This isn’t a one-off. We’re seeing a pattern emerge.

**First, the House signals its intent for reform—think Speaker White’s focus on income tax elimination and school choice this year, or school funding reform last year.** Then, the Senate responds with silence—no counterproposals, no vision.

**Finally, when the House sends its bills over, Senate leadership works to kill them, often without a serious alternative.** Is this really the best we can do?

Contrast this with Washington. **In just over a month since President Trump began his second term, we’ve seen a flurry of bold initiatives.** He’s accomplished more in weeks than some Mississippi leaders have in years. Our taxpayers deserve better than a legislature that can’t agree on basic conservative priorities like empowering parents in education or cutting taxes.

For too long, the process in Jackson has been shrouded in mystery. Bills “die in committee” with no explanation, no accountability, and no recorded votes. We’re told the support isn’t there—yet no one sees the tally. It’s time for transparency.

**That’s why the Mississippi Center for Public Policy (MCPP) is stepping up.** We have four clear goals for this session:
1. Public-to-public school choice
2. Income tax elimination
3. Anti-DEI legislation
4. Certificate of Need repeal

**Bills addressing each of these priorities have been drafted.** By session’s end, every lawmaker will have had the chance to support them.

Soon, we’ll launch an online tool for our 80,000 subscribers statewide, showing which Senators, Representatives, and statewide officials earn “four Trump thumbs up”—and which one’s side with the progressive agenda. **Mississippians deserve to know who’s delivering and who’s dodging.**

The roadblocks to good conservative policy must be exposed. With your support, we’re shining a spotlight on the legislature and holding our leaders accountable.

Have an awesome weekend!
---

body:
This is OUTRAGEOUS!
| **BREAKING from the New York Times:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stop-musk/?source=VPP_20250308_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=6&akid=19169%2E878179%2ETe_4sL) | [**35,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: DEMAND CONGRESS PASS THE NOBODY ELECTED ELON MUSK ACT! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stop-musk/?source=VPP_20250308_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=7&akid=19169%2E878179%2ETe_4sL)
---
_This is a NIGHTMARE_ — unelected, unconfirmed billionaire Elon Musk wants to REMOVE any judge who stands up to him and Donald Trump!

**IF we sit idly by,** Musk will NEVER be held accountable as he continues to turn our democracy into a far-right authoritarian regime! NO!!

**BUT IF we pressure Congress to pass the Nobody Elected Elon Musk Act,** Musk will be completely POWERLESS. _Our democracy will be SAVED!_

[**We need to reach 35,000 signatures by MIDNIGHT or our grassroots momentum will plummet: Add your name to pass the Nobody Elected Elon Musk Act and STOP Elon Musk for good! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stop-musk/?source=VPP_20250308_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=8&akid=19169%2E878179%2ETe_4sL)

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19169%2E878179%2ETe_4sL). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19169%2E878179%2ETe_4sL).**

name: Winsome Sears [R-VA]
subject: MSNBC Liberal: 'Black mouth' for 'White supremacist practices'
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
My husband is black. My children and grandchildren are black. I am black. Why is it that when I speak out in support of conservative policies, my motives are immediately questioned?
Friend - Yes, I’m a proud black conservative, and it drives liberals crazy!

Friend, I'm tough. I'm battle-tested. I am ready to take on the liberal media head-on and call them out for their hypocrisy.

My husband is black. My children and grandchildren are black. I am black. _Why is it that when I speak out in support of conservative policies, my motives are immediately questioned?__

Liberals just can't wrap their heads around the fact that I dare to think differently, that I am not beholden to their political agenda simply because of the color of my skin.

When I became the first woman Lt. Governor of Virginia - of either party - the liberal media just couldn't handle that I was a conservative Republican.

Trust me, I have been called lots of names over the years. But these attacks from the liberal media only embolden me to keep fighting to spread our conservative message. _

**Here 's the truth:****I used to be a Democrat. I believed that the Democrats were the party that would put average people like me first. Guess what? I was wrong!

Republicans are the ones fighting to lift folks out of poverty and away from being dependent on the federal government -- access to a quality education -- free of indoctrination. Good-paying jobs in the private sector and a safe and secure community are the principles I am fighting for every single day.

Frankly, when I hear liberals on MSNBC attacking me, I know I must be doing something right! **

subject: You did it!

body:
The SAVE Act is completely unnecessary. It’s also actively harmful. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103476938/532300176/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250308_f_IWD_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmIzOTE3MC0yZGZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NSuoi0QaDlsRTdowsuWvXBMvV85OjyB55wVYRpRqPRo=&emci=25ee4103-8dfb-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=9bb39170-2dfc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1037277)

| | Today is International Women’s Day — an opportunity to honor the accomplishments of generations of courageous women who have fought for gender equality. It’s also a sobering reminder of the setbacks we’ve faced. The fundamental freedoms that have been ripped away. The long distance we still have to go. And today, it’s important to recognize that we’re up against a new potential threat. Extremists in the U.S. House of Representatives are racing to pass a voter suppression bill called the SAVE Act that could **disenfranchise millions of Americans — disproportionately hurting young people, low-income people, communities of color, rural residents, and women.** Under this proposed law, every time someone registers to vote or updates their registration, they’d have to prove their citizenship by showing documents like passports or birth certificates. Millions of Americans simply don’t have or can’t easily access those documents. **And as many as 69 million women in America wouldn’t be able to use their birth certificates to verify their citizenship and register to vote. **That’s because they changed their names when they got married and don’t have those new names on their birth certificates. The bill would also lead to problematic voter purges, functionally end mail-in and online voter registration as well as third-party registration drives, and upend automatic voter registration. At Fair Fight Action, we’re exposing the damage that legislation like the SAVE Act would do to our democracy, and we’ll keep working to ensure all voters can make their voices heard in our democracy. [**But we’re counting on grassroots support to fight back against voter suppression. Let’s be clear: the SAVE Act is completely unnecessary. It’s already against the law for people who aren’t citizens to vote, and false claims about noncitizen voting have been widely debunked.
This bill is also actively harmful. It could fan the flames of noncitizen-voting conspiracy theories — setting up future attempts to challenge (read: overturn) the results of free and fair elections. And it could restrict access to the ballot box for communities that already face too many barriers.
But anti-voter extremists are trying to ram it through Congress as part of their anti-democracy agenda.
And you know who’s a big fan? Elon Musk. Here’s something he tweeted last year about the SAVE Act: “Those who oppose this are traitors. All Caps: TRAITORS. What is the penalty for traitors again?”
Actually, there’s nothing more patriotic than standing up for fundamental American values like equal participation in our democracy.
And we will keep pushing back against a wave of new anti-voter legislation — analyzing and exposing the bills’ impacts, lobbying alongside allies, building public pressure, and ensuring voters have accurate information about their rights and registration requirements.
[**Please chip in right now to help protect the freedom to vote, and help defend our democracy from attempts to make access to the ballot box even more unequal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103476970/532300202/-814815813?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250308_f_IWD_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmIzOTE3MC0yZGZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NSuoi0QaDlsRTdowsuWvXBMvV85OjyB55wVYRpRqPRo=)

clean_body: The SAVE Act is completely unnecessary. It’s also actively harmful. | | | Today is International Women’s Day — an opportunity to honor the accomplishments of generations of courageous women who have fought for gender equality. It’s also a sobering reminder of the setbacks we’ve faced. The fundamental freedoms that have been ripped away. The long distance we still have to go. And today, it’s important to recognize that we’re up against a new potential threat. Extremists in the U.S. House of Representatives are racing to pass a voter suppression bill called the SAVE Act that could disenfranchise millions of Americans — disproportionately hurting young people, low-income people, communities of color, rural residents, and women. Under this proposed law, every time someone registers to vote or updates their registration, they’d have to prove their citizenship by showing documents like passports or birth certificates. Millions of Americans simply don’t have or can’t easily access those documents. And as many as 69 million women in America wouldn’t be able to use their birth certificates to verify their citizenship and register to vote. That’s because they changed their names when they got married and don’t have those new names on their birth certificates. The bill would also lead to problematic voter purges, functionally end mail-in and online voter registration as well as third-party registration drives, and upend automatic voter registration. At Fair Fight Action, we’re exposing the damage that legislation like the SAVE Act would do to our democracy, and we’ll keep working to ensure all voters can make their voices heard in our democracy. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Let’s be clear: the SAVE Act is completely unnecessary. It’s already against the law for people who aren’t citizens to vote, and false claims about noncitizen voting have been widely debunked. This bill is also actively harmful. It could fan the flames of noncitizen-voting conspiracy theories — setting up future attempts to challenge (read: overturn) the results of free and fair elections. And it could restrict access to the ballot box for communities that already face too many barriers. But anti-voter extremists are trying to ram it through Congress as part of their anti-democracy agenda. And you know who’s a big fan? Elon Musk. Here’s something he tweeted last year about the SAVE Act: “Those who oppose this are traitors. All Caps: TRAITORS. What is the penalty for traitors again?” Actually, there’s nothing more patriotic than standing up for fundamental American values like equal participation in our democracy. And we will keep pushing back against a wave of new anti-voter legislation — analyzing and exposing the bills’ impacts, lobbying alongside allies, building public pressure, and ensuring voters have accurate information about their rights and registration requirements. = = Thank you, The Fair Fight Action Team = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Today is International Women’s Day
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250308-1259-foote&t=1001&akid=1259%2E342411%2EP5lZJX ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Today is International Women's Day, a day to honor the incredible
contributions and impact of women around the world. Today also serves as a
reminder of the ongoing struggles women face in securing their social,
economic, and political freedom.

Right now in the U.S., women’s rights are under attack by the Trump
Administration. Since the U.S. Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade in
2022, we’ve seen horrific consequences: nearly 1 in 3 women are now
without legal access to abortion, and Republican-controlled states
continue to push for even more drastic restrictions on reproductive health
care.

This isn’t just a setback, Peter,
it is the start of a dangerous rollback of
rights that will directly impact millions of women – and the chaos doesn’t
stop there.

The Safeguarding American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act is one of the many
legislations being pushed with the goal of disenfranchising millions of
women, elderly Americans, and naturalized citizens. This bill would impose
unnecessary barriers to voter registration, particularly affecting women
who’ve changed their names after marriage, in a direct attack on their
right to vote.^1

Peter, in the
face of these and many other attacks, our Squad is not backing down.
Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida are working to amplify critical
legislation that pushes back against the erosion of women’s rights,
combats harmful misinformation about reproductive health, and advocates
for policies that protect and expand women’s access to health care,
justice, and equality.

Our Squad is fighting for a future where women can make decisions about
their bodies, their health, and their futures without fear of government
overreach or political interference. But they can’t do this alone.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250308-movement.K7jnjT&refcode=em20250308-1259&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1259%2E342411%2EP5lZJX ]This International Women’s Day, please consider standing with the Squad
and supporting their work with a donation of $3 or more
today.

Your contribution ensures that our Squad can continue to fight back
against this administration’s harmful agenda and work toward a future
where all women are truly free.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250308-movement.K7jnjT&refcode=em20250308-1259&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1259%2E342411%2EP5lZJX ]Contribute ››

Together, we can protect the progress we’ve made and push forward toward
true justice and equality for all women.

In solidarity,

Squad Victory Fund

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

This isn't a chaotic coup; it's a calculated takeover designed to gut the federal workforce and replace it with a corporate dictatorship. The Local Democracy Project is rallying for everyday Americans who deserve leaders that truly represent their interests. Our mission is clear: to elect Democrats up and down the ballot and reclaim our democracy from the clutches of those who seek to dismantle it. **If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** This isn't conspiracy theory—it's happening before our eyes. And when Trump made his cryptic promise to Evangelicals, it hinted at a future where democracy is sidelined. name: A.G. Holder
subject: Peter, we are not powerless observers.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
The work we do now will be critical to advancing the fight for our democracy in 2026, 2028, and beyond.
|
---

Peter,
Throughout our nation’s history, we have seen far-right leaders go to extraordinary lengths to bypass democratic principles — _all in their relentless pursuit of power._
From onerous voting requirements to partisan and racial gerrymanders that allow politicians to choose their voters, they have systematically worked to undermine the fundamental right of Americans to have their voices heard at the ballot box.
**But Peter, we are not powerless observers.** Indeed, our grassroots movement is working across the country to secure fairness in our democracy and ensure every American has an equal say in our government. And when we work together, we can make it happen.
[**That’s why today, I’m personally asking you to make a donation to All On The Line to power the movement for fair maps in the months and years ahead.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103478710/532305324/-766669867?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_EHHMarchNOR_email_20250308-AOTL-Tier1-EHHMarchNOR-AG_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250308-AOTL-Tier1-EHHMarchNOR-AG_&utm_campaign=EHHMarchNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU2NDQwMWZmLTJkZmMtZWYxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TsPs2mMn8iOTlNCO4dj4NUF9IqHCrR6LfSxlw9P1CK8=)

I often say there is no “off year” in the fight for fair electoral maps, and 2025 is no different. The work we do now will be critical to advancing the fight for our democracy in 2026, 2028, and beyond:
→ Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, is actively involved in **court cases that could affect the makeup of up to eight or even nine congressional districts** — where we must make sure voters are fairly represented.
→ We’re preparing to **stop potential efforts by partisan actors to steal more congressional seats** through extreme gerrymandering — including in Ohio, where Republicans will oversee a process to draw new congressional maps this year.
→ And we must stay ready to **protect the 2030 Census from efforts to tamper with it,** to ensure an accurate count and fair representation.
[**We need you with us every step of the way. Will you make a donation to All On The Line today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103478717/532305358/-766669867?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_EHHMarchNOR_email_20250308-AOTL-Tier1-EHHMarchNOR-AG_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250308-AOTL-Tier1-EHHMarchNOR-AG_&utm_campaign=EHHMarchNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU2NDQwMWZmLTJkZmMtZWYxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TsPs2mMn8iOTlNCO4dj4NUF9IqHCrR6LfSxlw9P1CK8=)
Sincerely,
A.G. Holder

clean_body: The work we do now will be critical to advancing the fight for our democracy in 2026, 2028, and beyond. | Peter, Throughout our nation’s history, we have seen far-right leaders go to extraordinary lengths to bypass democratic principles — all in their relentless pursuit of power. From onerous voting requirements to partisan and racial gerrymanders that allow politicians to choose their voters, they have systematically worked to undermine the fundamental right of Americans to have their voices heard at the ballot box. But Peter, we are not powerless observers. Indeed, our grassroots movement is working across the country to secure fairness in our democracy and ensure every American has an equal say in our government. And when we work together, we can make it happen. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = I often say there is no “off year” in the fight for fair electoral maps, and 2025 is no different. The work we do now will be critical to advancing the fight for our democracy in 2026, 2028, and beyond: → Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, is actively involved in court cases that could affect the makeup of up to eight or even nine congressional districts — where we must make sure voters are fairly represented. → We’re preparing to stop potential efforts by partisan actors to steal more congressional seats through extreme gerrymandering — including in Ohio, where Republicans will oversee a process to draw new congressional maps this year. → And we must stay ready to protect the 2030 Census from efforts to tamper with it, to ensure an accurate count and fair representation. = Sincerely, A.G. Holder Eric H. Holder, Jr. 82nd Attorney General of the United States = is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: Voting with my newborn son
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Absolutely nothing could stand in my way from being in the Capitol to vote against their cruel and dangerous bill.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T097049a2-0add-4f8f-893e-2ed0be55b7c7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Hi Peter, Congresswoman Brittany Pettersen here — Blue Amp Action said I could reach out. Last week, I traveled across the country with my newborn son to vote against the GOP’s outrageous plan to rip away health care from millions of kids, seniors, pregnant women, and so many more — all so they can give tax breaks to their billionaire donors and friends. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta03c06fb-6708-4145-88fc-f8b1dd7be0b3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Republican Leadership blocked my ability to vote remotely after giving birth to my son, Sam. It’s outrageous that they would force new parents to choose between caring for our newborn and representing our constituents — but absolutely nothing could stand in my way from being in the Capitol to vote against their cruel and dangerous bill. You better believe that I’ll be there — no matter how challenging it might be — when Republicans are trying to strip away critical programs like Medicaid and SNAP. That’s why I voted against the GOP’s plan to rip away health care, take food off of people’s tables, and make life more expensive for hardworking families — all so they can hand out trillions of dollars to billionaires and wealthy corporations. Peter, I promised that I would fight every day for regular families — and I’ll always be there to hold Republicans accountable when they’re hurting hardworking people. No matter what is thrown our way, I will do what’s right for the American people — but I could really use some support at this moment, because we know this won’t be the last of their attacks. [Our team is powered by grassroots supporters like you, Peter, and every dollar makes a difference. If you could split a donation between our team and Blue Amp Action, it would mean so much to me.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1066c1ee-09bc-4e65-b297-aac5ab4bc913/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
| Thank you, Brittany Pettersen

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T67e42a0b-e19d-48fe-920e-9211b079e8cc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Tony Johnson
subject: Show your support for America's ICE agents
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1l9drlfosgdfedxq32ki84r2t3pwg7jzfn3w7fxy8551f51xt9tv12rji4r9t6nmxlwnn8gjgeqv83mh71m&__stmp=sst91o&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sst91o&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dfm2ud79t1655doyazho8sk9zsb7y7amqx8yzh87rp7phko5l86wu6lj22j9taq9rxqk3t04pe7jofbhrfjdou6dk800qmotcc3l6tusbeifbrzguu57rth782s9k7h367l95eeiwuqa0xbm73tk&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sst91o&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sst91o&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sst91o&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sst91o&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dfm2ud79t1655doyazho8sky1oxvxgj2e01vdn98o2m9n85civb9qak9k4rc26lrafzhes4eviilzxabpz655y7nsp7h8ol4w893h4f67qgx98m5cm21sd85tfsuf68kjaejc6ot7saa0372kd12&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sst91o&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sst91o&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Today, on International Women’s Day, we celebrate how far we’ve come since the suffrage movement. But despite the progress that’s been made, extremists’ attacks on women’s reproductive rights are at an all-time high – especially here in Florida. [**Before I go on, will you chip in $5 to help me fight for reproductive rights in Congress for millions of Floridians?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103479785/532308087/571999290?amount=5&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.03.08_IWD_B1_F1_S1_C1_140DA_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWE4YWMxNS0zMGZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gGuj0Agmdl3tvFnA8ZJ6P2oSbo2HtN7uCD8vV4rNs3c=) [CHIP IN $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103479786/532308088/571999290?amount=5&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.03.08_IWD_B1_F1_S1_C1_140DA_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWE4YWMxNS0zMGZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gGuj0Agmdl3tvFnA8ZJ6P2oSbo2HtN7uCD8vV4rNs3c=) Right now, Florida has one of the most extreme abortion bans in the country: **a cruel 6-week ban that strips women of their reproductive freedom before many even know they’re pregnant.** We had the chance to overturn this ban in November. And we came so close – just 3% short of the 60% needed to pass the amendment. Now, a new bill has been filed to repeal this dangerous restriction and restore reproductive rights in our state. _This is Floridians’ chance to fight back._ I’ve always stood for reproductive rights because every person deserves the freedom to make their own healthcare decisions. And now more than ever, Floridians need leaders in Congress who will step up and defend reproductive rights at every turn. clean_body: Extremists’ attacks on women’s reproductive rights are at an all-time high – especially here in Florida. Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. If you want to receive fewer emails, click If you want to unsubscribe, click | = Today, on International Women’s Day, we celebrate how far we’ve come since the suffrage movement. But despite the progress that’s been made, extremists’ attacks on women’s reproductive rights are at an all-time high – especially here in Florida. = = Right now, Florida has one of the most extreme abortion bans in the country: a cruel 6-week ban that strips women of their reproductive freedom before many even know they’re pregnant. We had the chance to overturn this ban in November. And we came so close – just 3% short of the 60% needed to pass the amendment. Now, a new bill has been filed to repeal this dangerous restriction and restore reproductive rights in our state. This is Floridians’ chance to fight back. I’ve always stood for reproductive rights because every person deserves the freedom to make their own healthcare decisions. And now more than ever, Floridians need leaders in Congress who will step up and defend reproductive rights at every turn. I’ve made this my mission, but I can only keep up this fight with your support. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = In solidarity, Jared | | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P.O. Fellow American,

In 2024, I traveled the country campaigning not for myself, but for President Trump and battleground Senate candidates. Thanks to you, we raised over **$1.2 MILLION for President Trump and U.S. Senate candidates** across the country and secured Republican leadership in Washington.

**That's a significant amount of money, making me the Democrats' #1 target going forward. Now, I'm up for re-election, and the Left is ready to put up a serious challenge against me.**

**[Our strong Senate majority will rely on winning seats like mine in 2026, so this time, we must step up for our OWN campaign!](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3dba7f79d3f24fb4a0d9e3f5c9a2a487&_e=58aBzkjfmpFmqSt4juBgd3wrIq7cW3RhqoYJX-o3P5fi_TjVyT4-ncGOtcn3OaXdgNUtaqNGHOd-JinEWtaeepdSbW13xQTtmaV_vys26en7HDvyfPTSW4c-8LKiySkTexhOV_LdR_iDVWo5pT-B63o_-XhrVWuTdCtqRPtlX6X-FiV_ZKj8dziottcsOoNwjqPpp8mNSRV5CHDw36AbQAYNmRuMic6Vwm3azOREIz1FY1KRCQNAJ3oSCawysIUqKzWJhWizERK36mm6D4PgkPD7AI6MQoZO8hPH-5VT2DnlV827mM677-pcFawHvLpBmoas52OOKuwShIiyB4dzcBxor2qDk3701478Pk5r4qXNh_h2akB7mh6x3_3Tmbov5wd9OnwY3aMRJ07pKpK3gS-VPQ38SBO-uk5BqU7e3UU%3D)**

clean_body: Fellow American, In 2024, we raised over $1.2 MILLION for President Trump and U.S. Senate candidates nationwide to secure Republican leadership in Washington.... | Fellow American, In 2024, I traveled the country campaigning not for myself, but for President Trump and battleground Senate candidates. Thanks to you, we raised over $1.2 MILLION for President Trump and U.S. Senate candidates across the country and secured Republican leadership in Washington. That's a significant amount of money, making me the Democrats' #1 target going forward. Now, I'm up for re-election, and the Left is ready to put up a serious challenge against me. I am compiling a list of my re-election campaign's FOUNDING DONORS to kick start a strong campaign and quiet the Left's attempts to take this seat from us. My team's founding donors will be the building blocks of a successful campaign and will help fend off any early attacks from the Left. BECOME A TEAM GRAHAM FOUNDING DONOR! | Thank you, Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. clean_body: | Fellow Conservative, As we stand at the forefront of the battle for , I'm reminded of the Radical Left's relentless pursuit of power in Battleground States like North Carolina. They'll stop at nothing to seize control, and it's our duty to ensure they don't succeed. Recently, we've seen the devastating consequences of their actions. From to , the Left will do whatever it takes to undermine our democratic process. But we can't let them win. Not now, not ever. That's why I'm urging you to to support Republican election integrity efforts in North Carolina, the nation's #1 Battleground State. We must stand strong against the Radical Left's attempts to erode our electoral system and ensure that every vote counts. Together, we can make a difference. We can protect the integrity of our elections and safeguard our democracy for generations to come. | | | ---|--- | | Sincerely, Matt Judge Executive Director, NCGOP

name: David Hogg
subject: Young people are up to this challenge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Peter, I hear the same frustrated reaction to Democratic fundraising a lot:

“Why the heck are you asking me for $5 when Trump is destroying our country and Democrats aren’t doing anything about it?”

I can’t speak for every group, but I do know what sets Leaders We Deserve and groups like Fight for Progress apart.

We represent a generation of people who have walked out of their schools, marching with millions of their peers to demand action on gun violence and mass shootings.

Young people are at the forefront of progressive movements, fighting for solutions on issues like gun reform, climate change, student debt, and Gaza, to name a few.

Now, these same young leaders are old enough to actually run for political office, right at the time when we need a massive movement of young people in power.

Leaders We Deserve and Fight for Progress are here to transform these movements into political power. Running for office is more expensive than ever — and these young leaders need our support to help lead their movements into state legislatures and Congress.

We know that the billionaire class isn’t showing up to bankroll these campaigns, so it’s not an exaggeration to say they can’t win these fights without grassroots support.

Peter, can you contribute $25, split between Leaders We Deserve and Fight for Progress, to power our transformational movement?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-ffp-lwd-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-07_3&amount=25

The young candidates that Leaders We Deserve supports are gamechangers. They will revitalize the Democratic Party and revolutionize our government.

Our candidates are leading the fight to rebuild our political system. And they aren’t rebuilding the same political system that brought us school shootings, climate change, and all of the bullsh*t younger generations have to deal with in America.

They’re building something better — a system that actually works for the people.

I believe that a big part of the answer to Donald Trump is building a movement of young people who will take back the reins of our government from the far right.

Young people are up to this challenge. If history has taught us anything, it's that great generations aren’t born, they’re made in the crucible of awful circumstances.

So when you split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Fight for Progress, you aren't just throwing out money at the status quo. You are investing in a different vision for what’s possible.

Please — pitch in $25 now, to be split between Leaders We Deserve and Fight for Progress, to join our movement and fight for our future.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-ffp-lwd-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-07_3&amount=25

We can only do this work with your support. I deeply appreciate your generosity.

Thank you,

David Hogg

------------------------------------------------------------
Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.

Fight for Progress PAC
PO Box 15320
Washington, DC 20003
United States

CONTRIBUTE NOW (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-ffp-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-07_3&amount=25)

CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-ffp-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-07_3&amount=25&recurring=1)

Emails are crucial for communicating with top members of the Fight for Progress PAC team. However, If you would prefer to receive fewer emails, click here (https://secure.everyaction.com/v-2Z896y7kmqy4L-8l09Ew2) .

If you would like to stop receiving email communications from us, please unsubscribe here (https://oneswitchboard.com/email_subscriptions/73023f30-5e44-4357-a2fd-676a4082fd86/?e=ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20=&m=OTYxODE4NDU=)

name: Majority Leader Scalise
subject: READ THIS SPECIAL ELECTION MESSAGE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Scalise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit Scalise For Congress and Eye Of The Tiger PAC
body:
| Not interested? [Unsubscribe here](https://links.house-republicans.org/unsubscribe?e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_e8766d13d6ec2f85fc863c649a4&n=1).
---
| In case you missed it: The Florida Special Elections are officially ONE month away.

This is Majority Leader Scalise.

Our candidate, _MAGA Warrior Randy Fine_ , is facing an EXPENSIVE race in FL-06 and needs some extra support in these final days. _**[I STRONGLY urge you to read his message and consider pitching in today.](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFKa_1iGCjqh_2PTdXXuhxvzSn92maSNaDK7mYEo3BTVDSoSrwhkQbTZfFZQ417RlXnwc4IeCNi67Te3oYgG3OxHf3gsm-rJAVBmA0ceaVNHzI_MMAhU0O0Tk-u5QsRBhGBB8qfYRrubrabIKxCnsy-uYAk8KTZPV8rOwQD8MMgcVDLTOvfOmmKBN2aurRDSZo1gIuSOtHm7RjwhqDpZYUvW7TdUtUkrdo60hQH9uGBypq_mhYobyFr6xdMm4Hm2qwY&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_e8766d13d6ec2f85fc863c649a4&n=2 "I STRONGLY
urge you to read his message and consider pitching in today.")**_

Remember:

_Supporting our Special Election candidates is the only way to SAVE our House Majority from the Democrat Machine!_
| | [READ THIS SPECIAL ELECTION MESSAGE](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFKa_1iGCjqh_2PTdXXuhxvzSn92maSNaDK7mYEo3BTVDSoSrwhkQbTZfFZQ417RlXnwc4IeCNi67Te3oYgG3OxHf3gsm-rJAVBmA0ceaVNHzI_MMAhU0O0Tk-u5QsRBhGBB8qfYRrubrabIKxCnsy-uYAk8KTZPV8rOwQD8MMgcVDLTOvfOmmKBN2aurRDSZo1gIuSOtHm7RjwhqDpZYUvW7TdUtUkrdo60hQH9uGBypq_mhYobyFr6xdMm4Hm2qwY&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_e8766d13d6ec2f85fc863c649a4&n=3 "READ
THIS SPECIAL ELECTION MESSAGE")
---

To victory,
_– Steve_

**STEVE SCALISE**
House Majority Leader

**– ORIGINAL MESSAGE FROM RANDY FINE –**

Hi, this is Randy Fine.

This is probably the first time you’ve ever heard my name, so I’ll get to the meat of my email:

**1) I just won the GOP nomination for the FL-06 Special Election, 2) I’m running to backfill for an American hero, Mike Waltz, as he joins Trump’s Administration****, and 3) if the Democrats win this Special Election, they could sweep back into power in the House.**

I’m campaigning my heart out to make sure Republicans hold the House so we can deliver President Trump’s MAGA agenda.

But the Democrats won’t go quietly.

They’re already unloading $10M into toss-up districts, they’re raising money hand over fist to win the Florida Special Elections, and the Liberal Propaganda Machine is firing on all cylinders to attack President Trump.

_**[That’s why we need your help today. I’m partnering with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $100,000 before the end of the day to help fight back, win key races like my Special Election, and win big for Trump!](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFKa_1iGCjqh_2PTdXXuhxvzSn92maSNaDK7mYEo3BTVDSoSrwhkQbTZfFZQ417RlXnwc4IeCNi67Te3oYgG3OxHf3gsm-rJAVBmA0ceaVNHzI_MMAhU0O0Tk-u5QsRBhGBB8qfYRrubrabIKxCnsy-uYAk8KTZPV8rOwQD8MMgcVDLTOvfOmmKBN2aurRDSZo1gIuSOtHm7RjwhqDpZYUvW7TdUtUkrdo60hQH9uGBypq_mhYobyFr6xdMm4Hm2qwY&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_e8766d13d6ec2f85fc863c649a4&n=4 "That’s why
we need your help today. I’m partnering with Majority Leader Steve
Scalise to raise $100,000 before the end of the day to help fight
back, win key races like my Special Election, and win big for Trump!")**_

I’m humbly asking you to join us and pitch in a few bucks to help out:
| | [PLEASE JOIN US HERE](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFKa_1iGCjqh_2PTdXXuhxvzSn92maSNaDK7mYEo3BTVDSoSrwhkQbTZfFZQ417RlXnwc4IeCNi67Te3oYgG3OxHf3gsm-rJAVBmA0ceaVNHzI_MMAhU0O0Tk-u5QsRBhGBB8qfYRrubrabIKxCnsy-uYAk8KTZPV8rOwQD8MMgcVDLTOvfOmmKBN2aurRDSZo1gIuSOtHm7RjwhqDpZYUvW7TdUtUkrdo60hQH9uGBypq_mhYobyFr6xdMm4Hm2qwY&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_e8766d13d6ec2f85fc863c649a4&n=5 "PLEASE
JOIN US HERE")
---
| [](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFKa_1iGCjqh_2PTdXXuhxvzSn92maSNaDK7mYEo3BTVDSoSrwhkQbTZfFZQ417RlXnwc4IeCNi67Te3oYgG3OxHf3gsm-rJAVBmA0ceaVNHzI_MMAhU0O0Tk-u5QsRBhGBB8qfYRrubrabIKxCnsy-uYAk8KTZPV8rOwQD8MMgcVDLTOvfOmmKBN2aurRDSZo1gIuSOtHm7RjwhqDpZYUvW7TdUtUkrdo60hQH9uGBypq_mhYobyFr6xdMm4Hm2qwY&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_e8766d13d6ec2f85fc863c649a4&n=6 "Randy Fine")
---

Look,

Special Elections are tricky. They’re _expensive_ , the _stakes don’t get any higher_ , and the timeline is very _tight_.

**On the first point:** Democrats typically unleash millions of dollars to win a single Special Election.

**On the second:** Republicans have one of the slimmest Majorities in a CENTURY – this race is critically important to stopping the Democrats from taking full control of the House.

**And on the third:** These move quickly – we only have a few short weeks until the election, so we need to move right here and right now.

We have THREE Special Elections this year alone. We need to win all three of these seats to save our House Majority and help President Trump usher in the Golden Age of America.

_**[So please: Would you be able to pitch in a few bucks to help Leader Scalise and I hit our goal today?](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFKa_1iGCjqh_2PTdXXuhxvzSn92maSNaDK7mYEo3BTVDSoSrwhkQbTZfFZQ417RlXnwc4IeCNi67Te3oYgG3OxHf3gsm-rJAVBmA0ceaVNHzI_MMAhU0O0Tk-u5QsRBhGBB8qfYRrubrabIKxCnsy-uYAk8KTZPV8rOwQD8MMgcVDLTOvfOmmKBN2aurRDSZo1gIuSOtHm7RjwhqDpZYUvW7TdUtUkrdo60hQH9uGBypq_mhYobyFr6xdMm4Hm2qwY&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_e8766d13d6ec2f85fc863c649a4&n=7 "So please: Would you be able to pitch in a few
bucks to help Leader Scalise and I hit our goal today?")**_
| | [PLEASE JOIN US HERE](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFKa_1iGCjqh_2PTdXXuhxvzSn92maSNaDK7mYEo3BTVDSoSrwhkQbTZfFZQ417RlXnwc4IeCNi67Te3oYgG3OxHf3gsm-rJAVBmA0ceaVNHzI_MMAhU0O0Tk-u5QsRBhGBB8qfYRrubrabIKxCnsy-uYAk8KTZPV8rOwQD8MMgcVDLTOvfOmmKBN2aurRDSZo1gIuSOtHm7RjwhqDpZYUvW7TdUtUkrdo60hQH9uGBypq_mhYobyFr6xdMm4Hm2qwY&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_e8766d13d6ec2f85fc863c649a4&n=8 "PLEASE
JOIN US HERE")
---

Thanks for all you do.

To victory,
_– Randy_

**RANDY FINE**
GOP Nominee for the FL-06 Special Election

name: Sarah McBride
subject: My Taco Bell/KFC order
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I don’t eat the same meal every night, but I do fight for Delawareans every day.
#
Hi, it’s Sarah McBride.
If there’s one thing you should know about me, it’s that I am constantly on the go, fighting for Delawareans.
From early morning meetings to late-night policy work, my days are packed — so much so that I usually don’t even stop for breakfast or lunch.
And sometimes, that means grabbing a late-night meal from Taco Bell/KFC on the way home.
My go-to? _Nachos and cheese, four hard tacos, one soft Taco Supreme, three crispy drumsticks, and an eight-piece chicken tender._
**Don’t worry, I don’t eat the same meal every night, but I do fight for Delawareans every day.** And while I’m grabbing a quick bite, I’m still thinking about the work ahead — on how to lower costs, expand opportunities, and make sure every Delawarean gets a fair shot.
Whether it’s fighting to bring down costs or working to hold the Trump administration accountable for their chaos and corruption, **I’m in this for one reason: to deliver results for the people of Delaware.**
[**I rely on grassroots supporters like you to keep up this work. If you’re able, can you pitch in $5 to our campaign today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250308-1?refcode=em20250308-1802&amount=5&refcode2=1802_21716_NSMjCR&akid=1802%2E21716%2ENSMjCR)

Thank you!
Sarah McBride

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I’m hitting the road.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
If everybody reading this chipped in that $5, we’d raise enough to fund my campaign for the entire year.
#

Peter -
I know your inbox is probably full of emails like this, but I hope you’ll take a minute to read this one.
I’m asking you for $5.
Yes, just $5.
$5 because I’m hitting the road.
$5 because I’m gonna do “Save Medicaid” town halls in rural Arizona, deep red parts of my state.
$5 because if Republicans are too scared to meet their own voters, I’ll do it for them.
And, yes, $5 because I’m gonna need your help to make it happen.
$5 might not seem like much after Elon Musk spent hundreds of millions of dollars electing President Trump.
But if everybody reading this chipped in that $5, we’d raise enough to fund my campaign for the entire year. We’d have what we need to take the fight to the GOP on their home turf and stop them from firing thousands of workers and gutting Medicaid.
So, how about it?
[**Help me get it done and chip in $5 today.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar25.cQPUMp&refcode=em250308-1-f&t=1&akid=3750%2E734936%2EAJ-_cx)

name: Mike Schmuhl
subject: Thank you, Hoosier Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
My Fellow Democrat, This year has brought extremely high stakes for our democracy and shared values. Hard-core partisanship in both Washington and Indianapolis puts ideology before common sense, division before unity, and power before the people. The supermajority Republican Party in Indiana continues to push policies that systematically hurt working families, undermine public education, and erode basic human rights. Meanwhile, in DC, we see a Republican Party with loyal commitments to chaos, obstruction, and foreign dictators rather than progress, solutions, and standing with our allies. Here in Indiana, Democrats have stood our ground and are building a party for working Hoosiers, reproductive rights, public schooling, and economic mobility for everyone -- not just the wealthy and well-connected. But we will need the resources to organize, mobilize, and get our message out in order to win the battles ahead. It has been a true honor for me to work alongside all of you for the last four years. One week from today, we will elect our new state party leaders and set the stage for the crucial election cycles ahead. For the next couple of weeks and beyond, I urge you to invest in our party. Your support will help us recruit candidates, expand our grassroots outreach, and counter the rich Republican machine that has dominated our state for too long. Every contribution strengthens our fight for a better Indiana. Let's show our neighbors that Hoosier Democrats will not back down. [_**Join us at https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rebuild2025 today and help build a party that will truly represent our values and deliver real results.**_ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103482344/532313562/1764064610?refcode=250308chair&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzQzODE4OS0zNGZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tq5-mhwiQ7N8cFAtrXz6TIom5uKP4pNpVgGNRQD693Q=) Thank you for your commitment to our cause. Together, we can bring more balance to Indiana. In solidarity, Mike Schmuhl
Chairman, Indiana Democratic Party

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: America is Back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1c31574541db/be-the-difference-today-33466?e=561a28864e)
---
|
---
[](https://scottfitzgeraldforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c59bc0db5e945d61b14749b2b&id=1fe6b0c5c2&e=561a28864e)
| | | | |
---
|
##
Hello ,
What an incredible moment we witnessed this week as President Donald Trump delivered a speech that was nothing short of historic. His unwavering leadership and bold vision for America was an inspiring message for us all to stay strong in the face of adversity and continue fighting for our nation's future. I was embarrassed for the Democrats that refused to stand for some of the most moving, unifying moments. It was shameful.
In his speech, President Trump laid out a clear plan for America's path forward—one focused on putting American workers first, securing our borders, and standing up to the radical left that seeks to undermine everything we hold dear. His words were a powerful reminder of why we need leaders who are unafraid to fight. I want to continue to be that leader.
As we lead this movement, I need your support. The radical left is doing everything they can to stop us. They attacked me for doing a town hall and standing up for our beliefs. I guess it should be a badge of honor being attacked by the women on View...
But we cannot let them win. Please join me in standing alongside the President and ensuring that our message continues to reach the American people. We have to go around the liberal media machines fueled by the left and talk directly to the voters.
That is why I am reaching out to you now. Today, I’m asking you to take action. [Donate now to help me continue spreading the message of hope, patriotism, and unwavering commitment to making America great again](https://scottfitzgeraldforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c59bc0db5e945d61b14749b2b&id=5bf66cac8b&e=561a28864e).
Every contribution counts—no matter how big or small. Together, we can ensure that we have the resources we need to keep fighting, and make sure we do not lose Republican control of Congress.
Please join us in this fight. The future of America is at stake and, with your support, we will keep fighting for the America we know and love.
Thank you. Together, we will win!
Sincerely,
Congressman Scott FitzgeraldWisconsin’s 5th Congressional District

P.S. The battle for our nation’s future is happening RIGHT NOW. The Left is raising millions to defeat us, but we can’t let them win. I ask that you stand with me by [making your contribution today! ](https://scottfitzgeraldforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c59bc0db5e945d61b14749b2b&id=eac1d9ac88&e=561a28864e)

subject: Only a miracle can win our race
body:
| |
---
(I believe we’ve found one) According to ‘conventional wisdom ‘and the ‘very smart consultants’ in DC, this race is already lost. However the facts on the ground point to something different. | [View in browser](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ4MzE5NzE2NTQzMzAwNjg5LFwiclwiOjE0ODMxOTc3OTE5NDY2ODQ4MH0iLCJzIjoiYWYzNDg5YTZhOWQwOTY2YyJ9)

---
|
---
Friend,

I am going to shoot straight with you.

According to the ‘very smart consultants’ in DC, our Democratic campaign in the special election Florida’s 6th Congressional district has **_already lost_** this election _._ They say:
* The district is too red and that Trump/MAGA are too powerful, triumphant, and near omnipresent.
* The narrow pathway to retaking the House via winning the three special elections in 2025 is impossible. Democrat’s only shot of retaking the house is in 2026.
* It would take a _literal miracle_ for us to win here.

When Democrats don’t try we lose. Despite what the institutional losers in DC say (yes the same ones who played a decisive role in our 2024 loss) this race is beyond winnable.

Seeing is believing, and over the past two and a half months, I have seen with my very eyes the rise and rapid scaling of a campaign that could win this.

In these past two months we’ve raised over _$7.3 million_ (what most representatives raise in a two year cycle), have recruited tens of thousands of volunteers in district and from all fifty states, have hired a team of _over a hundred_ _paid staff_ the majority being canvassers who are knocking over _10,000 doors_ a day.

**Even if they were right that a literal miracle would be required to win, I believe we are on the cusp of one.

**_Miracles are happening every day for us._ Just last Friday we were more than $53k off from our vital end of month target, donations were rapidly slowing down, and less than three hours remained on the clock. Not hitting our target and being unable to pay out our massive payroll.

| | [ ](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ4MzE5NzE2NTUzNzg2NDUxLFwiclwiOjE0ODMxOTc3OTE5NDY2ODQ4MH0iLCJzIjoiN2MyMTk2Mzc4ZjY1MThhMyJ9)
---
|
---
_Screenshot of where we stood on ActBlue last Friday night after my desperate call for support._

|
---
I sent out an emergency request for aid, and our supporters delivered a small miracle (see above). But faith alone and our past achievements will not yield the miracle we need here.

_Will_ is what brings miracles to life. Collectively hundreds of thousands of your peers from every corner of this nation are making it happen. You are flying in to knock doors, phone banking, sending postcards, __donating__ , and more. That work is what will materialize the miracle in Florida’s 6th Congressional District.****

|
---
**[You have the power to will a miracle into existence. Will you make a donation of anything you can spare to usher in a miracle, take back the house in 2025, and set the tone for the next four years with a defiant shot across the bow?](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ4MzE5NzE2NTU2OTMyMTgwLFwiclwiOjE0ODMxOTc3OTE5NDY2ODQ4MH0iLCJzIjoiZGE5NDk0OWJiNmUzNzg1OSJ9)**

clean_body: | | (I believe we’ve found one) According to ‘conventional wisdom ‘and the ‘very smart consultants’ in DC, this race is already lost. However the facts on the ground point to something different. | | | | | Friend, I am going to shoot straight with you. According to the ‘very smart consultants’ in DC, our Democratic campaign in the special election Florida’s 6th Congressional district has already lost this election . They say: The district is too red and that Trump/MAGA are too powerful, triumphant, and near omnipresent. The narrow pathway to retaking the House via winning the three special elections in 2025 is impossible. Democrat’s only shot of retaking the house is in 2026. It would take a literal miracle for us to win here. When Democrats don’t try we lose. Despite what the institutional losers in DC say (yes the same ones who played a decisive role in our 2024 loss) this race is beyond winnable. Seeing is believing, and over the past two and a half months, I have seen with my very eyes the rise and rapid scaling of a campaign that could win this. In these past two months we’ve raised over $7.3 million (what most representatives raise in a two year cycle), have recruited tens of thousands of volunteers in district and from all fifty states, have hired a team of over a hundred paid staff the majority being canvassers who are knocking over 10,000 doors a day. Even if they were right that a literal miracle would be required to win, I believe we are on the cusp of one. Miracles are happening every day for us. Just last Friday we were more than $53k off from our vital end of month target, donations were rapidly slowing down, and less than three hours remained on the clock. Not hitting our target and being unable to pay out our massive payroll. | | | Screenshot of where we stood on ActBlue last Friday night after my desperate call for support. | I sent out an emergency request for aid, and our supporters delivered a small miracle (see above). But faith alone and our past achievements will not yield the miracle we need here. Will is what brings miracles to life. Collectively hundreds of thousands of your peers from every corner of this nation are making it happen. You are flying in to knock doors, phone banking, sending postcards, donating , and more. That work is what will materialize the miracle in Florida’s 6th Congressional District. | | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ** | As a supporter you have brought a literal miracle to within arms reach. From the bottom of my heart, thank you. Jackson McMillan Josh Weil for Congress Finance Director | | | | | | | Mail Checks to : Josh Weil for Congress PO Box 350345 Palm Coast, FL 32135 | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Josh Weil for Congress PO Box 350345 Palm Coast, FL 32135 | |

subject: The DOJ threatened me
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMFywiAQhp-G3MzAAsEcOGgtPbR1prYda28IROkEiRCT8e07Wut199v9v_l16FrfnCUScwSw9zYjAERnCOC4GUM6_YTnp8lq7NaTY7UM_LKFhxs6wB0-GP1Nlv2a8vdN_hp2_hiTHcgd78-du8O30NIF7dvLVCwKK2ljMSucJIIRxmqKcbGXzDJBjKgdFeCYaGqrYWuo03VFqOVN4SVg4JjiKeEcOCsr7BjDWmM6dU5vHWL4mlPq4JI3muR-1CnFGEoTQ9HKfd93-SqmEKgxxfJwMq075b8zEwMCdVNGoAYE6nH1Fj4-12p2RlRdS6OLV6xjZnr-UiRpu9G3rc-VQAzv_t8Ug4TfAAAA__9Q4G-8)
| | Together we can hold the DOJ and the deep state accountable.

| |
---
| | [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8FuozAQhp_G3ED22MbJgUNTQqSutiulq3a7FzRgJ3GFMTEmqPv0KyKUiyV__jz__OiGzp6-C6J2BOBi9UgACH8iANfP2YXpy_04pMd5-Eiv-auTyys8r-oNHnLf4l_2Gj-4fPsc_9zO9uqDvrGHHr8H85DX0Mw4tN1CVZnogp80FYkpmBJMiC2nNLkUWinghimxNbk0bd4YTQ1XyDhDsaWY2AIoSMrphkkJUmQ5NUJQRMo3xmBjiKD3nAydCbZFNsYZQ_DeZa13SVdcYhzG-2IVgUr7HqPJWhvtP9N_-Sn02NnRnfzUa4zW98s3AhUqyZpT3qSgeJMKzGWKVMuUQcMb3ELb6s0ykldTdPXop9AawstdeUiP-3cC-YKd0XZyhJf7nyuJJiz3ObAVtOgGtOee8HJtmte78lA_v1R1-eulPu7f67ffT8d0OZJQ6GG2XWfHXBFBz_fmS89bAf8DAAD__62wlko)
---
Three years ago, The DOJ threatened me and other journalists with _**criminal charges** _in connection to the explosive Ashley Biden Diary. Heavily armed FBI agents burst into my residence and ransacked my personal property. They raided two of my fellow journalists homes too. To this day, they refuse to show me the evidence they used as probable cause to conduct a heavily armed raid of my residence. From day one my lawyers and I knew the case against me was purely political – and it succeeded in suppressing politically damaging contents of the Ashley Biden diary. As soon as Attorney General Pam Bondi was sworn in, the charges against me were suddenly dropped. But do you really believe that the corrupt actors at the DOJ that sent armed FBI agents with battering rams to my house are suddenly going to see the light? Remember, this this the same weaponized DOJ that: **\--- > Investigated moms who spoke at school board meetings ** **** **\--- > Turned a blind eye to our reporting of corruption and abuse in federal prisons** **** **\--- > Attempted to censor our reporting of voter registration irregularities in Georgia.** Now they’re playing possum – some of them might think they can just wait Trump out like they did last term. As a journalist, I refuse to let them hide in the shadows. We must expose them now. That’s why I’m laying the groundwork for our lawsuit against the DOJ. We need to expose the ringleaders. We need to uncover all internal communications. The career corrupt actors who’ve been weaponizing the DOJ for years aren’t going to go down without a fight. We’ve seen their playbook before. During the first Trump administration, my reporting caught DOJ officials plotting to “resist from the inside” because “they couldn’t really get fired”. But with your help, we can expose these bad actors and hold them accountable. When we win, It's going to be a win for the first amendment. And if we can prove that they broke the law, you can be sure that we will push for criminal prosecutions. My friend, this political witch hunt against me has already cost me hundreds of thousands of dollars. But we’re not going to cure the rot at the Department of Justice by nibbling the edges. We need to go in there with our own battering ram. My lawsuit will do just that. [That’s why I’m calling on you to join me in this crucial effort by making a $25 tax-deductible contribution to the Citizen Journalism Foundation today.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8FuozAQhp_G3ED22MbJgUNTQqSutiulq3a7FzRgJ3GFMTEmqPv0KyKUiyV__jz__OiGzp6-C6J2BOBi9UgACH8iANfP2YXpy_04pMd5-Eiv-auTyys8r-oNHnLf4l_2Gj-4fPsc_9zO9uqDvrGHHr8H85DX0Mw4tN1CVZnogp80FYkpmBJMiC2nNLkUWinghimxNbk0bd4YTQ1XyDhDsaWY2AIoSMrphkkJUmQ5NUJQRMo3xmBjiKD3nAydCbZFNsYZQ_DeZa13SVdcYhzG-2IVgUr7HqPJWhvtP9N_-Sn02NnRnfzUa4zW98s3AhUqyZpT3qSgeJMKzGWKVMuUQcMb3ELb6s0ykldTdPXop9AawstdeUiP-3cC-YKd0XZyhJf7nyuJJiz3ObAVtOgGtOee8HJtmte78lA_v1R1-eulPu7f67ffT8d0OZJQ6GG2XWfHXBFBz_fmS89bAf8DAAD__62wlko) Together we can hold the DOJ and the deep state accountable.
---
Thank you for your support,
---
| | James O'Keefe

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Thank you, Senator Cotton
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE VICTORY FUND
body:
For his ringing endorsement | [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=69d818fbcc954ed99ffb155c6024a916&_e=lYh9NS4Pj2fYw6QBuafMkvx2lu6Y4jCuR1I4L2ed9gZKh-pPFNacXvthS0PaMlDpRWgaleqLjPyo2A3gibB2MDMVErmz6JbsTtQVQS_vy599WuarYAk-W6S5fI-HmIRpQPisLtwKtSKnn5UowA1K536L7kgjeMpxlNvpjPsykUOy8KkOqur8DE1wDdgnRSrYmMC-as4S9uQYIGJsaj_9V4vbYsK3lduYlEoCMxZcd8R0_kNDtrg7Z4lO7HzOmGPjYuULwnzs0YzSP70aOTy9TRp_e79ELdtwUKHXLA_UIVOHOgBbLI_VZzRy8STrEy7xzMUxIU-CP2TJc592zFCbxg%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

I’m a Hall-of-Fame College Football Coach. I know that your football program is only as strong as its supporters who contribute to supporting it, whether it’s passionate fans, dedicated boosters, or just maintaining positive relationships with other tried and tested programs.

**That’s why I’m proud to endorse Senator Tom Cotton for his re-election campaign.** Tom has been one of America-First’s most influential Senators. We need him in the Senate if we’re going to fully implement President Trump’s Agenda after the 2026 midterms.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=69d818fbcc954ed99ffb155c6024a916&_e=lYh9NS4Pj2fYw6QBuafMkvx2lu6Y4jCuR1I4L2ed9gZKh-pPFNacXvthS0PaMlDpRWgaleqLjPyo2A3gibB2MDMVErmz6JbsTtQVQS_vy599WuarYAk-W6S5fI-HmIRpHAUC1P9YmCNx50kFIeupmUETrPH5fkH7AdMyrlRcfm3ZSIYjbJx8KtVcwNZJ3f08kgxfJvNLRerTxDfMprOFNxT2vKIqPSI7LqvCW2SfUpaIx8mfsBeTAXcWd716lRfjFhrtwMjqH2Vq48q8F3FsW09BKBckPECfbiGEz-p3tZN_mimAVVgmsIgkXswq0OhEOGPtNS4uEr2hzTQZQ-EKuw%3D%3D)
[**Now, I’m humbly asking you to join me in supporting Tom Cotton.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=69d818fbcc954ed99ffb155c6024a916&_e=lYh9NS4Pj2fYw6QBuafMkvx2lu6Y4jCuR1I4L2ed9gZKh-pPFNacXvthS0PaMlDpRWgaleqLjPyo2A3gibB2MDMVErmz6JbsTtQVQS_vy599WuarYAk-W6S5fI-HmIRpQPisLtwKtSKnn5UowA1K536L7kgjeMpxlNvpjPsykUOy8KkOqur8DE1wDdgnRSrYpQ2HOE_updnBQnFRcAppJGELQqC9qZMlJ5kED8bmhVBcecFd8s6W9wZBf6ytOCaG6_c4D28qkvTw_QylObN9Js_cM-ZpnKHfqBUk2STQusHR7XBfcOcRO_eKAaoztkITxtQ_GoYoqbAU-83C2wFU7A%3D%3D)

**It may not seem like it, but he’s in a vulnerable position right now.** The Radical Left is in a full-out UPROAR over Republicans enacting President Trump’s agenda, even though he overwhelmingly won last November.

Deep State Democrats are already starting to fundraise millions and millions of dollars to flip his seat. I’m committed to helping Senator Cotton stay in the Senate, and I need you to join my efforts.

[**Can you rush just $15 or more before my midnight fundraising deadline?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=69d818fbcc954ed99ffb155c6024a916&_e=lYh9NS4Pj2fYw6QBuafMkvx2lu6Y4jCuR1I4L2ed9gZKh-pPFNacXvthS0PaMlDpRWgaleqLjPyo2A3gibB2MDMVErmz6JbsTtQVQS_vy599WuarYAk-W6S5fI-HmIRpQPisLtwKtSKnn5UowA1K536L7kgjeMpxlNvpjPsykUOy8KkOqur8DE1wDdgnRSrYWrzOk0GEU4KA8Dp5Iq0RHK2JXZ1FbYgdL-5Z3CX1GhpGpN9lAVh9K6_T-GjDBp0KSsS4COV2f-_uYLufBxCQrzgrNpeCy9qxG1auFEy8KJuEI60qUQiCAR3GfzEMramRICTxtZdSdan5GqfMjII0nQ%3D%3D)

Thank you for helping,
Coach Tuberville

name: Alan Cohn
subject: Stunning Quote from Alito
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103483203/532316300/1096283482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTM0MmEzNWUtMzZmYy1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ihJrkftNh6ygdBnqPZkaWdB0YIAWql8m87LS92EktGw=&emci=4d43a686-d1fb-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=9342a35e-36fc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=16746905)

Hi Friend,
If you did what Supreme Court Justice Samuel Alito just did... you’d be fired.
If you held elective office and did what Alito just did... you’d be voted out of office the first chance voters had.
But Alito has a job for life, and he doesn’t care what you think.

As a legal analyst just wrote,” The message couldn’t be clearer: Republican presidents deserve kingly deference, while Democratic presidents require constant judicial constraint.”

Together, they’re proving that leadership, innovation, and thinking big can change everything. Our kids deserve to know what real leadership looks like. They deserve to know the truth. ** For God, country, and our children’s future, The Kids Guide Team

name: Team Truth to Power
subject: [Survey] Help us set our priorities!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39499%2E3422442%2ESoA6Dd)
Derek,
Katie Porter wants to know what’s on your mind as we work to support the next generation of leaders. **[Can you take our short issues survey to share your thoughts with us?](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/ttp-survey-em-20250308?source=em20250308-39499&akid=39499%2E3422442%2ESoA6Dd)**
Unlike many in Washington, Truth to Power is committed to supporting candidates who _actually_ listen to what the American people need–not what special interests want. We rely on surveys like this to help set our priorities.
**[So please, will you take a moment to complete this brief survey as we lay the groundwork for 2026? Your answers will help us strengthen our movement across the country.](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/ttp-survey-em-20250308?source=em20250308-39499&akid=39499%2E3422442%2ESoA6Dd)**
[Take the Survey](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/ttp-survey-em-20250308?source=em20250308-39499&akid=39499%2E3422442%2ESoA6Dd)
Thank you for your time,
Team Truth to Power

Former U.S. Congresswoman Katie Porter founded Truth to Power to support the campaigns of her fellow Democrats. Truth to Power supports candidates who will stand up to Donald Trump, fight to lower costs, and protect the environment. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20250308-39499&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39499_3422442_SoA6Dd&akid=39499%2E3422442%2ESoA6Dd)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39499%2E3422442%2ESoA6Dd).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

PragerU empowers MOMs to teach their teen about American Patriotism

Monday, March 10, 2025

1pmPT/ 2pmMT/ 3pmCT/ 4pmET

❓ How can you lead bold, meaningful conversations with your family, friends, and community?

By combining the power of PragerU with Cottage Meetings—and we’re showing you exactly how.

Introducing our brand-new 6-part webinar series for moms, where you'll learn to pair PragerU's free resources with Cottage
Meetings materials to raise confident, informed, freedom-loving families.

We’re starting with TEENS—because raising the next generation of courageous leaders starts NOW.

🔹 What to Expect in Session 1:
Join Jill Simonian of PragerU as she shares how to integrate PragerU Kids content into our Cottage Meetings for Teens curriculum.
You’ll leave with practical tools to lead intentional, values-driven conversations—starting with your teens and expanding to your
whole community.

You'll walk away with:
🎬 How to blend PragerU Kids videos into your Cottage Meetings
🧠 Conversation tools that spark critical thinking
🇺🇸 Free K–12 materials to support truth, history, and leadership

And this is just the beginning! Future sessions will equip you to build stronger relationships and lead impactful discussions
across every generation.
