name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Let’s call these distractions what they are
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
He must think we’re really dumb.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250308-1&t=1&akid=1828%2E587540%2Ewa_IRN)
**Peter, Donald Trump must think we're really dumb.**
It’s abundantly clear that he’s doing things like declaring English the official language of the United States and renaming the Gulf of Mexico as the Gulf of America because he thinks he can distract us from his deeply sinister agenda.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250308-1?refcode=em20250308-1828&amount=5&refcode2=1828_587540_wa_IRN&akid=1828%2E587540%2Ewa_IRN)
During the election, Trump and the MAGA Republicans ran on the promise of lowering costs for Americans – but they’re doing the exact opposite, imposing devastating and costly tariffs and launching a trade war with our closest allies.
Trump is letting unelected billionaires like Elon Musk run roughshod over our federal government, causing countless workers to lose their jobs and putting vital funding for everything from cancer research to our national parks in jeopardy.
The Republicans understand that every minute we spend “looking the other way” and arguing about the real name of the Gulf of Mexico is another minute they can fleece working people and loot our federal government on behalf of billionaires.
Trump wants us outraged – and we should be. But he also wants us distracted and outraged about the wrong things. That’s how he gets away with the worst sh*t.
Leaders We Deserve exists because the only way out of this terrible timeline is the election of a wave of young progressives who will fight MAGA and enact a bold agenda that actually addresses the problems Americans are facing every day.
**[Peter, we rely on grassroots folks like you — not billionaires – to accomplish our mission. Will you power our work with a $5 contribution right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250308-1?refcode=em20250308-1828&amount=5&refcode2=1828_587540_wa_IRN&akid=1828%2E587540%2Ewa_IRN)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250308-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250308-1828&refcode2=1828_587540_wa_IRN&akid=1828%2E587540%2Ewa_IRN)**
Thank you,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250308-1&t=2&refcode2=1828_587540_wa_IRN&akid=1828%2E587540%2Ewa_IRN)**

| Dear Congressman Al Green,

I am writing to express my deep disappointment and outrage at your shameful behavior during the State of the Nation. Your decision to interrupt this sacred institution was a slap in the face to the millions of Americans who voted to put America First once again.

Your actions were a stark reminder of the disrespect and contempt that many Democrats have for our country and its institutions. It's unacceptable that you would use this moment to grandstand and score cheap political points.

I demand that you apologize to the American people for your boorish behavior. Your actions were not only a disservice to the office of the President, but also to the country as a whole.

Furthermore, I call on your colleagues in the Democratic Party to condemn your actions and take steps to ensure that such disrespect is not tolerated in the future.

Make no mistake, Congressman, the American people will not forget your behavior. We will remember your lack of respect and decorum, and we will hold you accountable for your actions.

The America First movement will not be deterred by your attempts to disrupt and undermine our efforts. We will continue to stand strong and united in support of our values and our country.

Sincerely,

name: A Quick Poll [DOTL]
subject: re: Elon Musk buying MSNBC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
Only a few hours left to submit

|
---
**Peter, is receiving this message because they have not completed our poll about Elon Musk’s proposed buyout of MSNBC!**

**Here’s the problem, Peter:** Trump gave Musk unrestricted access to American’s private data and the power to cut critical federal programs like Social Security.

If Elon Musk buys MSNBC, he could build a right-wing media monopoly – **giving him control of both the federal government and the media.**

We think an unelected billionaire shouldn’t have this much power in a democracy, but we need to hear from top Democrats like you:

Trump has made “more than 60 major moves” that “align” with Project 2025
---
He lied. We should not be surprised by that.
[**FIRST:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103485903/532322342/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250308_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTFkNDAxNS0zN2ZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wfGphrApf-ejj2X_8jRdi4A3dAl9HrmbLO9u8CTwjyA=) Donald Trump SWORE that he “knew nothing about” Project 2025, the far-right manifesto that would send us back into the dark ages and prioritize tax cuts for billionaire MAGA donors on the back of the American people – if implemented.
[**THEN:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103485904/532322343/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250308_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTFkNDAxNS0zN2ZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wfGphrApf-ejj2X_8jRdi4A3dAl9HrmbLO9u8CTwjyA=) Trump and his unelected Co-President Elon Musk spent the last month creating havoc in a hostile takeover of our federal government and plotting to DESTROY our lifesaving initiatives for the American people, including the Affordable Care Act, Social Security and Medicaid that millions of Americans rely on.
[**NOW:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103485905/532322344/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250308_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTFkNDAxNS0zN2ZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wfGphrApf-ejj2X_8jRdi4A3dAl9HrmbLO9u8CTwjyA=) The NYT is reporting that Trump’s cruel and destructive actions have closely aligned with Project 2025 after all[**– _just like we knew they would._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103485906/532322345/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250308_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTFkNDAxNS0zN2ZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wfGphrApf-ejj2X_8jRdi4A3dAl9HrmbLO9u8CTwjyA=)

---
** WHY RUN NOW? **
---
President Trump winning re-election in November was not just another political victory - it was a seismic realignment for our country. He won every swing state. He improved his vote share of minorities and young voters. We won the House AND Senate. And heck, he even won the popular vote.

---
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4fc9bbb28cd341dfaecca6605339f64e&_e=Cfs83djBWu8GJN-HYEuoWKw1WWxhEkXeVdn-WEpL7Csojjcaux-ydljH8_R0ghIpBn6ghfUZfIb5ENUF10K7kWMtugTR-8L78UPkTVoAq-LIq3DyC8bySPHhzaPE1OHZVuZjyTjZGAdtGj4fepL9NLoKqYEIgnmiLqwxly9uuT6jHlW6DKhNhRhdG6qO-CfmwQgqbjHmYDN1x-fCrBJr8qTMsOb__VrF5e3d4x9FN1D88fKWnoDq87QPjgaanRyqODO-nyhxhJ9rzcQw0fAE075-cuHwvv98giJBhkRACFV1SA9M6G4iuG6rFtZRSC7m9EYuCGAlLtDua9POxOd6cNciitzcwxkb4aCPUyKo-iZKj8K-_k4DWPXoWXXOyTA6e3HG2yPy0YOltO2vnIjVqBJmfPKzfU8yUEOdjviOtkk%3D)
---
It was the honor of a lifetime to rally voters in battleground states, campaign on college campuses to turn out Gen-Z for Trump, and promote his America First vision at rally after rally.

---
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4fc9bbb28cd341dfaecca6605339f64e&_e=Cfs83djBWu8GJN-HYEuoWKw1WWxhEkXeVdn-WEpL7Csojjcaux-ydljH8_R0ghIpBn6ghfUZfIb5ENUF10K7kWMtugTR-8L78UPkTVoAq-LIq3DyC8bySPHhzaPE1OHZVuZjyTjZGAdtGj4fepL9NLoKqYEIgnmiLqwxly9uuT6jHlW6DKhNhRhdG6qO-CfmwQgqbjHmYDN1x-fCrBJr8qTMsOb__VrF5e3d4x9FN1D88fKWnoDq87QPjgaanRyqODO-nyhxhJ9rzcQw0fAE0-T9P50NDOos4LZQ-n5D6lJveXY7YDHmWOdLdskbQn2ePgBlQrFm6S7_sxPgGqB_avgLViII-a0dSgAwlMkyOnU8_dAFw7PrFfFMUSdztgKPQvlaH6VtXlh2dP_JTshayLYMua-1gFkUNzreAdbx_kg%3D)
---
Right now, we have a once-in-a-generation chance to make real, lasting change to the country we know and love. It's an opportunity to not just ticker around the edges of the Federal Government, but to upend it completely.

This is our moment to GUT the managerial bureaucracy, FIRE anyone connected to the weaponization of our own government against us, SLASH the size and scope of the administrative state, and usher in the GOLDEN AGE for America!

But the Deep State is already putting up the fight of its life. They're resisting change at every turn. Make no mistake - we can't afford to squander this historic opportunity. That's why President Trump needs trusted partnerships at the state level RIGHT NOW!

---
** WHY OHIO? **
---
This one's easy. I was born and raised here in the Buckeye State and graduated from St. Xavier - a Catholic high school in Cincinnati. My wife, Apporva, and I live outside Columbus, raising our two boys here. I've started multiple businesses in Ohio. I've also known JD Vance since college and campaigned all over the state for our excellent new Senator, Bernie Moreno.
---
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4fc9bbb28cd341dfaecca6605339f64e&_e=Cfs83djBWu8GJN-HYEuoWKw1WWxhEkXeVdn-WEpL7Csojjcaux-ydljH8_R0ghIpBn6ghfUZfIb5ENUF10K7kWMtugTR-8L78UPkTVoAq-LIq3DyC8bySPHhzaPE1OHZVuZjyTjZGAdtGj4fepL9NLoKqYEIgnmiLqwxly9uuT6jHlW6DKhNhRhdG6qO-CfmwQgqbjHmYDN1x-fCrBJr8qTMsOb__VrF5e3d4x9FN1D88fKWnoDq87QPjgaanRyqODO-nyhxhJ9rzcQw0fAE03luTHWJwhMGdj-pFh92DnAlKQBg7xov9-FbbvcYVCVs-uVO_bqC5KI_CT0nGqlbuAR4zv7ohU8ZSzJhWp4AkBm2NM7PKCX2leC6fJIXLsjNGRRRklxWn9Q8X83H_mPYGSQ2nQYThSZfNscDXlLHjdc%3D)

| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4fc9bbb28cd341dfaecca6605339f64e&_e=Cfs83djBWu8GJN-HYEuoWKw1WWxhEkXeVdn-WEpL7Csojjcaux-ydljH8_R0ghIpBn6ghfUZfIb5ENUF10K7kWMtugTR-8L78UPkTVoAq-LIq3DyC8bySPHhzaPE1OHZVuZjyTjZGAdtGj4fepL9NLoKqYEIgnmiLqwxly9uuT6jHlW6DKhNhRhdG6qO-CfmwQgqbjHmYDN1x-fCrBJr8qTMsOb__VrF5e3d4x9FN1D88fKWnoDq87QPjgaanRyqODO-nyhxhJ9rzcQw0fAE0_72sxH7uRvCOiq3aB4AWzuRLNps-1WqdulB__oE-PGrfvboT7gRvVehhwFd0wUtPJvGeOblHMmeEOmVR4ijIMVwZHGQIwG3to5_3U5Eq1nrF10WyF0L3QYaJgLieTMzGYB0BWzQEX3EX995DE3s5ec%3D)

On the other hand, we now see President Trump act quickly and decisively to fix our country by deporting illegal criminals, moving to cut taxes, securing our border, gutting DEI, and obliterating the Deep State. On the other hand, we now see President Trump act quickly and decisively to fix our country by deporting illegal criminals, moving to cut taxes, securing our border, gutting DEI, and obliterating the Deep State. True leadership can change everything. | That's why I'm running for Governor in my home state of Ohio. I will partner with President Trump - just like I did on the campaign trail - at the state level to Make America Great Again. "I will be a change agent for our state and set an example of efficient, conservative governance for the rest of the country." So there you have it. That's the "why" behind my run for Governor. "It would be the honor of a lifetime to have your support now that I’ve officially launched my campaign. I’m humbly asking you to become a Founding Donor today with a gift of any size." | | | | | | | | Thanks for taking a minute to read this email. I appreciate your time. God bless you and God bless America, Vivek Ramaswamy | | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201

Trump’s address to the Joint Session of Congress was a slap in the face to the American people.

Not only was his speech filled with lies, but it also revealed his clear plan: an authoritarian takeover. Our children do deserve a country ruled by a dictator.

**_[We must do everything in our power to stop authoritarianism from taking over this country. Donate now to help us show Donald Trump and Republicans we’re not backing down without a fight.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvGtKFwsLSzeDpaj11bS3Rb-s4QYEo5qIFdxG4zXRjkdiCSw13TaNVWMMt0HD9sGHlxTg7CL635BpNrzCCcKknEvuTvsSuQtiQGkNYK_MMx0-0M60k1NozCbjL_ZXa-kdjtzK1LkAWLhLlK8rU4MBzWl94SZfNDuwfpWWvmFW8YbcIXUGrsKEEc-eyJbq76U43jggbu9J6QVq6X97vUUZnTSNfeCNANGLxqjdCBSTPGyhPDVTmk48Tq38LZnGrN-NseswhYw2Iz5MwGC8xV2ZUjiX8aMEHEhu0vKcDMhD7FprNxPXmsoZpZxasDdhNwgnmMYWw6me4EHdZw4hpbQkFR/4em/TDYS7g4nTf-hEeHi4BD_JQ/h1/h001.DlEk0imtS4MAQuyv9tQQZLP1FyUyyF9YRnoS165_Abo)_**

Congressional Republicans are going to extremes to prove their cult-like allegiance to Trump. From cutting billions of dollars from Medicaid — which provides healthcare to 50% of American children — to introducing legislation that would make Trump’s birthday a federal holiday to trying to amend the Constitution to allow him a third term, Republican lawmakers are proving their loyalties lie with Trump and not the American people.

We can’t ignore their actions as petty politics. If Trump and Republicans have their way, there will not be an American democracy for our children to participate in the future.

**_[Chip in whatever you can to help us fight back against far-right extremism before it’s too late.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvGtKFwsLSzeDpaj11bS3Rb-s4QYEo5qIFdxG4zXRjkdiCSw13TaNVWMMt0HD9sGHlxTg7CL635BpNrzCCcKknEvuTvsSuQtiQGkNYK_MMx0-0M60k1NozCbjL_ZXa-kdiE9utB0LFca_6dlp-HCg4g7KaH60O2rp2o5xarrAbSG2ZUSKjBXDDv4Dy4XIyZH4kkOmLVUn6jD2asdcq5MRqzuC-uck_D_UwlHK4IuR0oK1UYMGwDaKszYa0hqAmKpmCNxjC7fIYs_FESJUkITOxNJQ8K-0dPz6-KnEMekS7wqhKunEBHKqGeW9IAdjlGV4mPc3PCbVWgWu6IWz9-KJjh/4em/TDYS7g4nTf-hEeHi4BD_JQ/h3/h001.PrEL-Xod-6mG7ISv2JcHvv2QdLSbyS2oLi-VqaavciE)_**

Until the kids are alright,

Annie Andrews

As the future of Roe v. Wade remains uncertain and resources for working families continue to be cut, we must continue to fight and ensure every woman is guaranteed equality and the ability to support herself.

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103486756/532324431/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250308_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTc3MTRlMS0zOWZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KBG8Et_Ng0aKXUqfGuC-TG-32zTIe1BPhtx3SrbH4Ik=)

Peter, This week started with Donald Trump and J.D. Vance shamelessly berating Ukrainian President Zelenskyy and doing Vladimir Putin’s bidding straight from the Oval Office. It continued with Trump recklessly starting a trade war with Mexico and Canada, our two closest trading partners — a move that made U.S. stocks fall and caused widespread panic among consumers. And just a few days ago, we listened to Trump spread more harmful lies during his joint address to Congress. Peter, a _lot_ has happened this week. That’s why I wanted to take some time today to reach out to you and ask how you’re feeling. **[Will you fill out this survey to share your thoughts with me? It won’t take long and I’d really appreciate your response.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103486757/532324432/370440058?contactdata=xVMtkxhMHzL6plXZEPoTKpvEN8cLcZIh7ZEYXB6KT11BwnUP1QDmQt9Oc1R/OaBRfrEiIkrKVLSjU1OQBV3oSXUSIlmumSMGxMlhq6AJH3TM42g02G4RFbH1syrOd2ej6JQbppiGoX5S9xsVIhamFRAkMwGsMX9Sqt45Jd6X1TI=&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250308_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTc3MTRlMS0zOWZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KBG8Et_Ng0aKXUqfGuC-TG-32zTIe1BPhtx3SrbH4Ik=&emci=969e1186-8afb-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=357714e1-39fc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=43402272)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103486758/532324433/370440058?contactdata=xVMtkxhMHzL6plXZEPoTKpvEN8cLcZIh7ZEYXB6KT11BwnUP1QDmQt9Oc1R/OaBRfrEiIkrKVLSjU1OQBV3oSXUSIlmumSMGxMlhq6AJH3TM42g02G4RFbH1syrOd2ej6JQbppiGoX5S9xsVIhamFRAkMwGsMX9Sqt45Jd6X1TI=&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250308_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTc3MTRlMS0zOWZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KBG8Et_Ng0aKXUqfGuC-TG-32zTIe1BPhtx3SrbH4Ik=&emci=969e1186-8afb-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=357714e1-39fc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=43402272)
---
Recently, I joined Senators Peter Welch and Bernie Sanders for a virtual town hall. It’s clear that Vermonters are deeply concerned about the Trump administration’s illegal attacks on working families and our democracy.
I heard from seniors worried about Trump’s plans to slash Medicaid, mental health care providers concerned about the safety and well-being of trans and non-binary youth, and teachers and students terrified about the steps Trump is taking to dismantle the Department of Education.
**While I know that many of you share those concerns, Peter, I also know that you have your own stories to tell.** **[That’s why I hope you’ll take a moment to fill out this survey and share what’s on your mind.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103486760/532324434/370440058?contactdata=xVMtkxhMHzL6plXZEPoTKpvEN8cLcZIh7ZEYXB6KT11BwnUP1QDmQt9Oc1R/OaBRfrEiIkrKVLSjU1OQBV3oSXUSIlmumSMGxMlhq6AJH3TM42g02G4RFbH1syrOd2ej6JQbppiGoX5S9xsVIhamFRAkMwGsMX9Sqt45Jd6X1TI=&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250308_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTc3MTRlMS0zOWZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KBG8Et_Ng0aKXUqfGuC-TG-32zTIe1BPhtx3SrbH4Ik=&emci=969e1186-8afb-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=357714e1-39fc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=43402272)**

clean_body: | = Peter, This week started with Donald Trump and J.D. Vance shamelessly berating Ukrainian President Zelenskyy and doing Vladimir Putin’s bidding straight from the Oval Office. It continued with Trump recklessly starting a trade war with Mexico and Canada, our two closest trading partners — a move that made U.S. stocks fall and caused widespread panic among consumers. And just a few days ago, we listened to Trump spread more harmful lies during his joint address to Congress. Peter, a lot has happened this week. That’s why I wanted to take some time today to reach out to you and ask how you’re feeling. | Recently, I joined Senators Peter Welch and Bernie Sanders for a virtual town hall. It’s clear that Vermonters are deeply concerned about the Trump administration’s illegal attacks on working families and our democracy. I heard from seniors worried about Trump’s plans to slash Medicaid, mental health care providers concerned about the safety and well-being of trans and non-binary youth, and teachers and students terrified about the steps Trump is taking to dismantle the Department of Education. While I know that many of you share those concerns, Peter, I also know that you have your own stories to tell. I’m so grateful to have you in my corner. Thanks for being a key member of this team. — Becca mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05402

## Call to Action
Today on International Women's Day, follow and support these amazing creators on Substack:
* [Pari & Eve, MPH](https://open.substack.com/users/215799239-pari-and-eve-mph?utm_source=mentions) \- Reproductive health and justice

* [Equal Entrance](https://open.substack.com/pub/equalentrance?utm_source=mentions) \- Women's empowerment and activism
* [Julie Oliver](https://open.substack.com/users/36763450-julie-oliver?utm_source=mentions) \- Grassroots activism and leadership

## This Week's Articles and Podcasts
* **Saturday:**[It's Women's History Month--Men, We Must Do Better](https://substack.com/redirect/ff7b5a52-3a89-47e6-8260-14b6e76109dd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Celebrate women's history--elevate women and stop the men denying women justice
* **Sunday:**[Invite Your Friends](https://substack.com/redirect/10cbe580-7ebd-4757-a9b0-6e6e57c4ef1f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): As billionaires buy up media companies and censor dissent, your support to help us build our own platforms is more vital than ever
* **Monday:**[The Qasim Rashid Show Episode 161](https://substack.com/redirect/9e3980bb-5348-4941-8747-6baeb71f952a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Poverty lawyer Salaam Bhatti joins to discuss how the new GOP bill will increase poverty--and how we counter it
* **Tuesday:** [The Sinister Plan Behind Ambushing Zelenskyy](https://substack.com/redirect/e9cd61ca-a971-42bd-b3fc-249c70affd9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Trump is preparing to commit mass war crimes--here are the receipts and how Dems must respond
* **Wednesday:** [Trump 2025 Joint Session Fact Check](https://substack.com/redirect/5a1f5b5b-7a42-4d3b-96ef-d02b8ddc659e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Debunking Trump's 100 minute long disinformation speech by providing you all the receipts
* **Thursday:**[Former WWE Promote to Dissolve Dept of Ed](https://substack.com/redirect/9e7c307d-daf8-43f6-8f52-0af9a383296e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): As the White House readies to gut Dept of Ed--here are 6 steps to fight back and protect our children
* **Friday:**[10 Dems Join MAGA to Censure Rep Al Green](https://substack.com/redirect/40689227-54db-4280-bd14-fb6f3411134c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Rep Al Green condemned Trump's plan to gut $880B from Medicaid--see the 10 Dems who censured him

This Ramadan I asked my Spanish Muslim friend what he's having for iftar/dinner? He replied "_EnshaAllahdas_."

President Trump and Republicans in Congress were elected because most Americans know we have to get our country back on track.
But that hasn’t stopped the radical Left from going back to their disruptive playbook. They are attacking Republicans across the country, including me.
Why? Because President Trump and Elon Musk are exposing the federal government of waste, fraud, and abuse, and the radical Left can’t stand it. They’re protesting, screaming, and trying to stop real reform.
Their goal is to scare Republicans into getting squeamish about supporting DOGE.
But I’m not backing down. I stand with President Trump and his efforts to clean up Washington. Do you?

They are furious that President Trump and Elon Musk are exposing the federal government of waste, fraud, and abuse.
As we continue to progress further as a country, the Left wants to push back and stop any forward movement.

name: Jane Fonda
subject: If I got lost today, who would find me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Trump is laying off park rangers and gutting protections for our public lands.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103487446/532326648/1328794144?refcode=ea.9ac1c7b6-3afc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.9ac1c7b6-3afc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlhYzFjN2I2LTNhZmMtZWYxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=J4iresxsaPexP5H2nAJsTe1NG40o92funb7xkB7n96c=&emci=2f2eaec2-8cfb-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=9ac1c7b6-3afc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105)
---
I know what it’s like to be lost in the wilderness. In 1989, I was hiking deep in Sequoia National Park when I got separated from my companion and lost above the timberline. Night fell. The temperature dropped. I had no choice but to hunker down in the snow until morning. If it weren’t for the Forest Service sending a helicopter to search for me the next morning, I might not be here today. I’ve had many occasions to witness the courage and essential work performed by park employees. With Donald Trump’s administration gutting our National Park Service, I can’t help but wonder: If I got lost today, who would be left to find me? Nearly 1,000 National Park Service staff have been laid off, and nearly twice that amount have been let go from the U.S. Forest Service. Essential leases for visitor centers and ranger stations have been abruptly canceled. And at the same time, Trump wants to fast-track logging in our forests, roll back protections, and turn over hundreds of millions of acres of public lands to oil and gas drillers. In the U.S., people are already too cut off from nature. National parks are some of the last remaining spaces where people can step away from the pressures of daily life and experience nature firsthand. They also protect endangered species, fragile ecosystems, and cultural history. But instead of safeguarding these sacred spaces, this administration is stripping protections and offering them up as yet another resource for extraction and exploitation. We’re not letting that happen without a fight. Last week, off-duty park rangers and everyday people took to the streets in protest. At parks across the country, including Yosemite and Muir Woods, people are demanding that our parks be protected and that their staff be reinstated. They’re proving we won’t sit by while Trump sells off something that isn’t theirs to sell. I’m with them. **And I want to make sure every decision-maker in Washington knows just how much our national parks mean to us.[Will you add your name to our petition to protect our parks and the people who care for them? clean_body: Trump is laying off park rangers and gutting protections for our public lands. | I know what it’s like to be lost in the wilderness. In 1989, I was hiking deep in Sequoia National Park when I got separated from my companion and lost above the timberline. Night fell. The temperature dropped. I had no choice but to hunker down in the snow until morning. If it weren’t for the Forest Service sending a helicopter to search for me the next morning, I might not be here today. I’ve had many occasions to witness the courage and essential work performed by park employees. With Donald Trump’s administration gutting our National Park Service, I can’t help but wonder: If I got lost today, who would be left to find me? Nearly 1,000 National Park Service staff have been laid off, and nearly twice that amount have been let go from the U.S. Forest Service. Essential leases for visitor centers and ranger stations have been abruptly canceled. And at the same time, Trump wants to fast-track logging in our forests, roll back protections, and turn over hundreds of millions of acres of public lands to oil and gas drillers. In the U.S., people are already too cut off from nature. National parks are some of the last remaining spaces where people can step away from the pressures of daily life and experience nature firsthand. They also protect endangered species, fragile ecosystems, and cultural history. But instead of safeguarding these sacred spaces, this administration is stripping protections and offering them up as yet another resource for extraction and exploitation. We’re not letting that happen without a fight. Last week, off-duty park rangers and everyday people took to the streets in protest. At parks across the country, including Yosemite and Muir Woods, people are demanding that our parks be protected and that their staff be reinstated. They’re proving we won’t sit by while Trump sells off something that isn’t theirs to sell. I’m with them. And I want to make sure every decision-maker in Washington knows just how much our national parks mean to us. | We’re collecting these stories and delivering them straight to Congress and the White House so they know what the American people expect from their leaders. Thank you for fighting for the places we love, Jane Fonda | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Moderate Democrats want to move further right and abandon small-dollar donors
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Did you see this, Peter?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250308?refcode=em20250308-36487&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36487_1203867_DuIcPp&akid=36487%2E1203867%2EDuIcPp ]A post on X from @AdamWren reading: 'New @playbookdc: Last month, a
group of moderate Democratic consultants, campaign staffers, elected
officials & party leaders gathered in Loudoun County, Virginia, for a
retreat where they plotted their party's comeback. We got their
takeaways.' The post included an image reading: 'Those gathered then laid
out 20 solutions for how Democrats can regain working-class trust and
reconnect with them culturally. More than a few stuck out to Playbook: The
party should “embrace patriotism, community, and traditional American
imagery”; Democrats should “ban far-left candidate questionnaires and
refuse to participate in forums that create ideological purity tests” and
“move away from the dominance of small-dollar donors whose preferences may
not align with the broader electorate”; They should “push back against
far-left staffers and groups that exert a disproportionate influence on
policy and messaging”; Candidates should “get out of elite circles and
into real communities (e.g., tailgates, gun shows, local restaurants,
churches)”; and The party needs to “own the failures of Democratic
governance in large cities and commit to improving local government.”'

It seems moderate Democratic leadership is continuing to learn nothing
from 2024 and would rather blame the left for its massive failures at the
ballot box.

Instead of listening to the Party’s base and disconnecting from the same
corporate and billionaire donors who support Trump and MAGA, the
Democratic establishment is planning on moving even further right and
depending less on small-dollar donors.

We wonder why winning elections with small-dollar donations from
working-class people is so threatening to billionaire-bought politicians,
consultants, and party leaders?

If the Democratic Party refuses to clean up shop on its own and reject
corporate PAC and millionaire/billionaire contributions, then we’ll do it
for them by recruiting working-class progressives to challenge them in the
2026 primaries.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250308?refcode=em20250308-36487&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36487_1203867_DuIcPp&akid=36487%2E1203867%2EDuIcPp ]Fuel our Candidate Recruitment work with a grassroots donation of
$5 or more to help us unseat the corporate-backed
establishment and replace them with true representatives of the working
class →

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250308?refcode=em20250308-36487&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36487_1203867_DuIcPp&akid=36487%2E1203867%2EDuIcPp ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250308-36487-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36487_1203867_DuIcPp&akid=36487%2E1203867%2EDuIcPp

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36487%2E1203867%2EDuIcPp

name: Rep. Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: We need more working-class women like me in Congress
body:
Happy International Women’s Day!

| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103489102/532327512/1566825623?&refcode=E12442-20250308-MarieIWD-Image-Holiday&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVmNzI2YzNmLTNjZmMtZWYxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5JsIxACZUrmHUcGQgsxCWIboEeBWKPb2Mp5YYNlyQoc=) Hi Peter, It’s Congresswoman Marie Gluesenkamp Perez, and today is International Women’s Day. As the co-owner of an auto repair shop, the mom of a toddler, and someone who lives in a rural county, my perspective is a rarity in Congress. But so many Americans do share my experiences–like struggling to get a mortgage or not having enough childcare options near my home. I’m not your typical member of Congress, but that’s why I’m able to get things done. I’m fighting to make a real difference in people’s lives and bring power back to our local communities. **As a co-chair of the Blue Dogs this cycle, it’s important to me that we support the next generation of working-class women to do the same thing I have done. Trust me, if there were more of me in Congress, we would get a lot more done.** [_**So I hope you will join me today on International Women’s Day by making a donation to help elect a few more normal, working-class women like me to Congress.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103489103/532327513/1566825623?&refcode=E12442-20250308-MarieIWD-SL-Holiday&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVmNzI2YzNmLTNjZmMtZWYxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5JsIxACZUrmHUcGQgsxCWIboEeBWKPb2Mp5YYNlyQoc=) _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5 →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103489104/532327514/1566825623?express_lane=true&&refcode=E12442-20250308-MarieIWD-EG-Holiday&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVmNzI2YzNmLTNjZmMtZWYxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5JsIxACZUrmHUcGQgsxCWIboEeBWKPb2Mp5YYNlyQoc=) | [DONATE $25 →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103489105/532327515/1566825623?express_lane=true&&refcode=E12442-20250308-MarieIWD-EG-Holiday&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVmNzI2YzNmLTNjZmMtZWYxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5JsIxACZUrmHUcGQgsxCWIboEeBWKPb2Mp5YYNlyQoc=)

clean_body: | | | Peter, I wish I could say I’m shocked. But after watching the Democrats sit on their hands, stone-faced and silent, as we fought for justice for Laken Riley, Last night, the Democrat Party refused to acknowledge the truth: And not just her—thousands of innocent Americans have been murdered, raped, and assaulted by illegal aliens that this administration welcomed into our country with open arms. And what did the Democrats do when we honored Laken Riley’s legacy? NOTHING. They sat there, refusing to applaud, refusing to recognize Laken, refusing to show even the smallest ounce of respect for the To them, keeping their power and corruption scheme going is more important than securing our border and protecting American lives. They don’t care about you. They don’t care about your family. And they sure as hell don’t care about Laken Riley. I’ve been ramming through border security bills for YEARS – to be clear, that NEVER meant throwing more money at bureaucrats to “fix” the problem. My number one priority has been, and always will be, deporting illegal aliens and maintaining operational control of our border. Federal law enforcement must be empowered to arrest & deport violent illegal aliens. Not re-release them into the interior so they can wreak havoc in our streets and victimize Americans. That said, if the Democrats want to DOUBLE DOWN on their open border, pro-crime agenda... ** If you’re fed up with the Democrats running to the defense of criminal aliens... If it made you SICK seeing them refuse to acknowledge Laken Riley last night... We fight for Laken Riley. We fight for the thousands of American victims of Joe Biden’s illegal immigrant crisis. Because the Democrats sure won’t.** Are you with me? Chip Roy U.S. Congressman, Texas | | | | Paid for by Chip Roy for Congress | | 6705 W. Highway 290, Ste. 50295 Austin, Texas 78735 |

Peter — On this International Women’s Day, I’m thinking of the women whose access to reproductive health care is jeopardized because of the Trump administration. Trump and his loyal Republicans wasted no time in eroding women’s freedom. From rescinding executive orders that expanded access to abortion and contraception, to scrubbing information about these essential services from government websites, to pardoning anti-abortion extremists — substantial steps have been taken to diminish reproductive rights. As GOP lawmakers fall in line with Trump’s anti-abortion executive actions, House Democrats remain steadfast in our commitment to restore and preserve reproductive rights for all Americans. **[Today and every day, we continue our fight to defend our fundamental rights. Sign on to join the fight against Republican attacks on reproductive freedom today>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103489604/532328731/-191145309?refcode=AU_FSP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250308_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzliNWJlYS0zY2ZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iOdZVa3J9rtBBDksPrYkdZYPJ-fEEw1gBNXEm2ihZKo=&emci=879b5bea-3cfc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=939b5bea-3cfc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=30620316)** | **[JOIN THE FIGHT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103489605/532328732/-191145309?refcode=AU_FSP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250308_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzliNWJlYS0zY2ZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iOdZVa3J9rtBBDksPrYkdZYPJ-fEEw1gBNXEm2ihZKo=&emci=879b5bea-3cfc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=939b5bea-3cfc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=30620316)**

name: Fetterman HQ
subject: We do things different
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
🥰🥰🥰
#
Hey Derek, quick question for you — do you get emails from other candidates + causes?
If we had to guess, you probably get a *lot* of political emails in your inbox. And not all of them treat you with respect. **In fact, some probably give you the ick.** 🙄
**"HURRY and we'll QUADRUPLE match your gift"**
**“[CRITICAL] FINAL NOTICE”**
**“We’re going to lose our majority!”**
^Look familiar? These are just a few of the scammy + straight up dishonest tactics used by campaigns to squeeze people for ActBlue donations.
**Well, we do things differently.** We know you’re not an ATM. We know real people are the backbone of our work — teachers, nurses, veterans, single parents, retirees, and grassroots supporters like you, Derek. And we couldn’t be more grateful.
We still have to ask for money, but we’ll do it honestly and humbly: **[John's work is funded by small online donations. Will you consider making one today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250308?refcode=em20250308-9972&refcode2=9972_434096_VY0-ua&akid=9972%2E434096%2EVY0-ua)**
**[Yes, I’ll chip in today »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250308?amount=5&refcode=em20250308-9972&refcode2=9972_434096_VY0-ua&akid=9972%2E434096%2EVY0-ua)**
Seriously, John has been crystal-clear from Day One of running for U.S. Senate that we will NOT allow our campaign to lie or use scare tactics in our online fundraising emails.
We’ll never trick you into a recurring donation or act like the sky is falling if you don’t give. In fact, every deadline we share is a real fundraising deadline that is either set by our finance team or by the Federal Election Commission.
**What we *will* do is explain how important your support is + give you the opportunity to chip in when you can.** (If you don’t today, that’s 💯 cool with us.)
After all, $3 might not always feel like much. But the fact is that John would never have defeated Dr. Oz, flipped PA blue, and became a U.S. Senator if it weren’t for many thousands of $3 donations. _That’s how powerful just a few bucks can be._
We have so much work still to do, Derek. We need to take on attacks on basic freedoms + rally support for popular legislation that actually helps working people. And all of that is going to require serious grassroots resources.
**[So we’ll just ask you without any of that scammy BS: Will you continue the work of our winning campaign + ensure John can have the biggest impact possible in the Senate by making a donation today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250308?refcode=em20250308-9972&refcode2=9972_434096_VY0-ua&akid=9972%2E434096%2EVY0-ua)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250308?amount=5&refcode=em20250308-9972&refcode2=9972_434096_VY0-ua&akid=9972%2E434096%2EVY0-ua)**
From the bottom of our hearts, thank you!
💛 Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20250308-9972-footer&t=1&refcode2=9972_434096_VY0-ua&akid=9972%2E434096%2EVY0-ua)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=9972%2E434096%2EVY0-ua)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=9972%2E434096%2EVY0-ua)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

A movement for reproductive rights across Latin America. | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103489613/532328826/2141984067?sourceid=1150500&utm_campaign=25emasl-0301aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=greenwave&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjliNWJlYS0zY2ZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZLorpBtuJ22b5pn_6QnEL4AP7X77GePFTJYJmS9pXUg=&emci=fef760e4-3cfc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=969b5bea-3cfc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103489614/532328852/2141984067?sourceid=1150500&utm_campaign=25emasl-0301aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=greenwave&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjliNWJlYS0zY2ZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZLorpBtuJ22b5pn_6QnEL4AP7X77GePFTJYJmS9pXUg=&emci=fef760e4-3cfc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=969b5bea-3cfc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237)
---|---
Peter—A wave is sweeping over Latin America.

[**Le Marea Verde**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103489615/532328853/-1972044104?sourceid=1150500&utm_campaign=25emasl-0301aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=greenwave&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjliNWJlYS0zY2ZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZLorpBtuJ22b5pn_6QnEL4AP7X77GePFTJYJmS9pXUg=&emci=fef760e4-3cfc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=969b5bea-3cfc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237)— _The Green Wave_ —is a powerful movement fighting for expanded abortion access throughout Latin America. United by their iconic green bandanas, its diverse members stand as a beacon of hope in the global fight for bodily autonomy.

**The Center for Reproductive Rights is proud to be part of the Green Wave movement and to fight for the rights of women around the world.** [**On International Women's Day, we celebrate the Green Wave's hard-fought victories—and the work still ahead.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103489616/532328854/-1972044104?sourceid=1150500&utm_campaign=25emasl-0301aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=greenwave&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjliNWJlYS0zY2ZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZLorpBtuJ22b5pn_6QnEL4AP7X77GePFTJYJmS9pXUg=&emci=fef760e4-3cfc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=969b5bea-3cfc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237) | 🟢 The liberalization of abortion in **Argentina** was achieved with a law in 2020. It was a landmark victory for the Green Wave movement, which emerged to push for legal changes and what's been called the "social decriminalization" of abortion by changing hearts and minds. 🟢 In **México** in 2021 the highest court declared criminalization of abortion unconstitutional and in 2023 decriminalized abortion on a federal level—a groundbreaking legal victory led by our partners at GIRE. 🟢 In **Colombia** , the Causa Justa Movement, of which the Center is a member, won a case before the Constitutional Court that decriminalized abortion up to 24 weeks. 🟢 The UN Human Rights Committee held **Nicaragua and Ecuador** accountable for violating the human rights of three young survivors of sexual violence who were forced into motherhood because of severe abortion restrictions. 🟢 In 2021, the Constitutional Court of **Ecuador** expanded the exceptions for legal abortion, including access in case of rape. Previously, exceptions were only considered when the woman's health or life was at risk. In 2024, the Justa Libertad Movement requested that the crime of abortion be declared totally unconstitutional.
---
The Green Wave has united and amplified the voices of millions and is a testament to the power of resilience, radical inclusivity, and collective action. These [**victories remind us that we can—and MUST—create a better, more equal world for women and girls everywhere.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103489617/532328855/2141984067?sourceid=1150500&utm_campaign=25emasl-0301aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=greenwave&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjliNWJlYS0zY2ZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZLorpBtuJ22b5pn_6QnEL4AP7X77GePFTJYJmS9pXUg=&emci=fef760e4-3cfc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=969b5bea-3cfc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237)

**Reproductive rights are human rights** , no matter who you are or where you happen to be born. Until the rights of every person around the world are upheld and respected, our fight is not over!

Thank you for being on our team, on International Women's Day and every day. 💚

In solidarity,

Catalina Martínez Coral
Senior Regional Director for Latin America and the Caribbean

clean_body: A movement for reproductive rights across Latin America. | | | ---|--- Peter—A wave is sweeping over Latin America. — The Green Wave —is a powerful movement fighting for expanded abortion access throughout Latin America. United by their iconic green bandanas, its diverse members stand as a beacon of hope in the global fight for bodily autonomy. The Center for Reproductive Rights is proud to be part of the Green Wave movement and to fight for the rights of women around the world. | 🟢 The liberalization of abortion in Argentina was achieved with a law in 2020. It was a landmark victory for the Green Wave movement, which emerged to push for legal changes and what's been called the "social decriminalization" of abortion by changing hearts and minds. 🟢 In México in 2021 the highest court declared criminalization of abortion unconstitutional and in 2023 decriminalized abortion on a federal level—a groundbreaking legal victory led by our partners at GIRE. 🟢 In Colombia , the Causa Justa Movement, of which the Center is a member, won a case before the Constitutional Court that decriminalized abortion up to 24 weeks. 🟢 The UN Human Rights Committee held Nicaragua and Ecuador accountable for violating the human rights of three young survivors of sexual violence who were forced into motherhood because of severe abortion restrictions. 🟢 In 2021, the Constitutional Court of Ecuador expanded the exceptions for legal abortion, including access in case of rape. Previously, exceptions were only considered when the woman's health or life was at risk. In 2024, the Justa Libertad Movement requested that the crime of abortion be declared totally unconstitutional. The Green Wave has united and amplified the voices of millions and is a testament to the power of resilience, radical inclusivity, and collective action. These Reproductive rights are human rights , no matter who you are or where you happen to be born. Until the rights of every person around the world are upheld and respected, our fight is not over! Thank you for being on our team, on International Women's Day and every day. 💚 In solidarity, Catalina Martínez Coral Senior Regional Director for Latin America and the Caribbean "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. (C) Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

# [Three Truths About Ukraine-Russia](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=158653482&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU4NjUzNDgyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDE0NTI5ODYsImV4cCI6MTc0NDA0NDk4NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0._Ro6SyggCmIICZ3q6GdFLFX70kNZ-v5b4zAPCuMklS4)
### Important background on the conflict for you to know from my time as an arms control negotiator with Russia
| | [Lucas Kunce](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---
| Mar 8
---
| [](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=158653482&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU4NjUzNDgyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0MTQ1Mjk4NiwiZXhwIjoxNzQ0MDQ0OTg2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTg2Nzc0MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.hMSwIybgROnDzO6i8tGLefRoY7r-YpwbGb-rnqnw56Y&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=158653482&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU4NjUzNDgyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDE0NTI5ODYsImV4cCI6MTc0NDA0NDk4NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0._Ro6SyggCmIICZ3q6GdFLFX70kNZ-v5b4zAPCuMklS4&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=158653482&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU4NjUzNDgyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDE0NTI5ODYsImV4cCI6MTc0NDA0NDk4NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0._Ro6SyggCmIICZ3q6GdFLFX70kNZ-v5b4zAPCuMklS4)
---
| | [](https://substack..mhxCN6t_QryjM7z2-SLxqmDdlGNYyx3YFoRCsc8r5kw?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/lucaskunce/p/three-truths-about-ukraine-russia?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Ukraine is popping in the news right now, with a lot of conflicting information and misinformation. I know a lot of people out there want to feel armed to address the situation with some clarity given the heated politics around the issue.
So today I'm going to give you three critical things to know based on the years I spent at the Pentagon representing the US military on interagency policy development groups and arms control delegations overseas with our NATO allies, Ukraine, and Russia.
Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9sdWNhc2t1bmNlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.tKIWwtdiycg0c5PYtm-hQAvOS-n2S21cCeVLC-SOvFE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=158653482)
1\. **Ukraine did not start this war and Russia had no lawful justification for invading.**
When Russia broadened the conflict in Ukraine into full-scale war in 2022, the military campaign was preceded by--and has since been accompanied by--a widescale propaganda campaign amplifying Russian misinformation, namely the lie that Ukraine started the war. Putin is no stranger to propaganda campaigns, long using trolls and bots to sow dissension in the West, but experts assumed that there wasn't "[much convincing he can do in the West. Not much influence he can have to convince people that Russia isn't the aggressor.](https://substack.com/redirect/9385702b-b12b-493d-b1b3-af527553cba4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)"
Turns out the experts were wrong. Because in the last month I've repeatedly heard, including from some otherwise serious people, that Ukraine or NATO or the US caused this war. With remarkable accuracy they parrot Russian talking points: that the West was behind the Maidan revolution, that the Ukrainian people are the same as the Russian people so [Ukraine is not a "real" country](https://substack.com/redirect/0a71778c-9fbb-43c2-a1ad-8caca39243f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and that Russia had to invade because the west provoked them and shouldn't have been meddling in "their" sphere of influence by letting Ukraine get closer to Europe and the West.
None of these are true.
Ukrainians, as a sovereign nation separate from Russia, made the decision that they wanted to have a free and fair democracy and that they wanted to associate with Europe rather than Russia. They proved this by [revolting against Viktor Yanukovych, the Kremlin's choice to lead Ukraine, not once, but twice](https://substack.com/redirect/47d73204-45c0-49cd-a4b0-b6813dfd96f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
In 2004, after Putin went to Ukraine, told the Ukrainian people they had to vote for his guy, and then did everything he could to help Yanukovych steal the Presidency through fraud, Ukrainians took to the streets in the Orange Revolution and demanded fair elections.
After the non-Kremlin guy was too corrupt, Ukrainians actually turned around and elected Yanukovych a few years later, but tossed him again in 2014 when he proved that he wasn't independent by succumbing to Russian pressure to back out of his commitment to sign an association agreement with the European Union. An agreement that the Ukrainian people wanted. Under Russian direction, Yanukovych attempted to maintain power through violence, failed, fled to Russia, and [then was ](https://substack.com/redirect/e9aef1ad-3cea-409c-a8f1-6311673d1c33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[legally](https://substack.com/redirect/e9aef1ad-3cea-409c-a8f1-6311673d1c33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ removed as Ukraine's president by its parliament](https://substack.com/redirect/e9aef1ad-3cea-409c-a8f1-6311673d1c33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
It's completely understandable that Russia wouldn't like these results, [but under no principle of Jus Ad Bellum, the law of going to war, are they legitimate reasons](https://substack.com/redirect/df612fbf-0525-4b09-b35a-9545abedf8a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for invading a neighbor.
It's like seeing your neighbor mowing his grass in a New England Patriots sweatshirt, walking over to his yard, and smashing him with a baseball bat because you don't like the Patriots and think they are cheaters.
Putin's own words in the speech he gave upon the invasion show that he invaded not because he had to, but because he wanted to: "The problem is that in territories adjacent to Russia, which I have to note is our historical land, a hostile "anti-Russia" is taking shape," he said.
Simply put, the people of Ukraine did not start this war by making their own decisions for their own future within their own borders under their own laws. This war was started by the country that massed its forces on its neighbor's border because they didn't like their neighbor's decisions and then crossed that border with military force. That was Russia.
2\. **Russian statecraft is based on realpolitik and the rest of the world, including anyone trying to bring peace to the region, must act with that in mind**. Realpolitik statecraft means that Russia's policies and actions are based solely on increasing its own power or preventing the reduction of its own power relative to other states. Moral or ethical considerations or principles do not influence their decision-making, no matter how much the rest of the world wishes that they did.
I saw this at every level of negotiation I was a part of while serving at the Pentagon, including while seated across the table from high-ranking Russian Generals and Admirals and even their Deputy Foreign Minister.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b23cd93a-83bc-4b43-a7d4-07de2d01aa2f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
On the far right, representing the US opposite Major General Pavel Zolotarev of Russia, far left
I'm going to give you an example of how Russian realpolitik played out during that time and then an example for how America could use Russia's realpolitik to achieve tangible gains.
**How it played out:**
In order to increase their power relative to other parties, including the US, Russia consistently violated all of the treaties and agreements I worked on at the Pentagon. This included the Conventional Armed Forces in Europe (CFE) Treaty, the Open Skies Treaty, and the Vienna Document, and also ones I was adjacent to such as the Intermediate-Range Nuclear Forces (INF) Treaty. Each of these treaties, transparency arrangements, and confidence and security measures are now dead because of Russian violations.
But the death of the agreements is not the takeaway.
The takeaway is that Russia spent years violating the agreements and simultaneously giving lip-service to coming back into compliance with them--stringing everyone else along and enticing them to continue following the rules. This effectively converted what were supposed to be peace-building agreements and limitations on military equipment and deployments into one-sided restrictions that gave Russia, who did not restrict itself, an asymmetric edge in developing power, deploying troops, and then going to war.
Remember, when dealing with a realpolitik state, it's important to realize that moral judgments and chastisement do not change its behavior.
Yet I spent years at the Organization for Security and Cooperation in Europe watching the European community fail to influence Russian behavior through moral coercion, as Russia continued to violate more and more agreements and take advantage of European dedication to a rules-based order. The Europeans believed so strongly in that rules-based order that they had decided Russia must believe in it, too, and that if they could just find common ground with Russia on the rules, Russia would come back on board. Which, of course, never happened.
That's not to say there is no way to work with a realpolitik-based state. Their policy is based on a classic methodology with deep levels of logic and clear power-based levers. But accepting that the other party has a different outlook and methodology is critical to making decisions that lead to favorable outcomes in international relations or any other area where realpolitik is rampant (current US politics, for example).
**How the US could use Russia 's realpolitik to achieve tangible gains:**
A recent example where the US could have applied leverage for a desirable outcome vis-a-vis Russia is the suspension of aid to Ukraine. (We are going to ignore the politics and domestic/personal agendas that might have played into that decision).
Since 2022, western countries have consistently criticized Russia for human rights violations for missile strikes on civilians and civilian infrastructure in Ukraine, hoping to shame Russia into modifying its behavior. This shaming hasn't achieved any results because Russia believes that the capability to bomb civilians and civilian infrastructure is a component of its power and, as we discussed, morality is not a part of realpolitik. Russia isn't going to voluntarily reduce its own power in the conflict just to feel good.
The largest tactical component of the recently suspended aid, and really the only irreplaceable part of US aid, was the Patriot missile defense systems. These systems made it so that Russia has to launch massive amounts of missiles in order to get any hits, significantly increasing the cost for the power they gain from being able to strike civilians and civilian infrastructure in Ukraine.
The US was exerting a cost on Russia that it has been struggling to bear. No matter what other reasons existed for suspending the aid, this was a clear opportunity for a no-cost concession from Russia by conditioning that suspension of aid on a reciprocal response from Russia. For example, conditioning the suspension on Russia stopping or even just limiting its missile strikes would have let America achieve a tactical/human rights objective in addition to whatever else we are trying to achieve in suspending the aid. Recognizing that Russia will always cheat if they think it will gain them relative power, there would need to be a power-based trigger hanging over their head in order to keep the agreement in place. Something like aid resuming after a certain number of strikes, or aid being held in reserve in case Y happens.
[Pausing intelligence sharing with](https://substack.com/redirect/108729aa-64ec-48f7-9586-31e49054fec5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Ukraine likewise could have come with real concessions from Russia, considering [the depth of our intelligence apparatus there](https://substack.com/redirect/85ed60c2-5552-488d-95a4-0aa05903b1f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
In the first case above, the reason it works is because Russia is trading power (strikes on civilians) for power (no Patriot missile systems), in a way that incentivizes them to behave according to Western wishes (not striking civilians) and that keeps them from breaking the agreement (because then the opposing power will re-appear).
This must be the framework for any agreement with Russia, including any agreement that purports to achieve lasting peace. Russia is not going to commit to long-term peace unless it believes that it secures more relative power by ending the war than it does by continuing the war (and, I should add, Putin must feel more secure in his regime, because right now Putin=Russia). That does not mean more territory, or even keeping the territory they currently occupy in Ukraine. It simply means that Russia must feel like they have more power through the ultimate deal than if they didn't make the deal.
But that end-state will be extremely difficult to achieve if we continue to unilaterally take leverage off the table and Russia is presented with opportunities to grow its power at low to no cost.
3\. **Our European allies bear a lot of responsibility for this war and should be covering more of the cost.**
I get that this might not be popular with everyone reading this, because the issue has become politically polarized, but I experienced it firsthand on arms control negotiations with our allies.
I consistently met with my military counterparts at NATO countries and presented significant intelligence on Russian military buildups and activities and asked their countries to take hard positions on Russia. Over and over, they responded that they understood the military situation but were unable to take a hard position on Russia because of the domestic politics in their countries.
In short, these European countries were buying gas from Russia and didn't want to jeopardize that "low cost" energy. The problem, of course, was that in the grand scheme of things the cost of that energy was much higher than the sticker price. Because Russia was taking the profits from its gas sales to Europe and using them to modernize its military and prepare to invade its neighbors.
This wasn't a secret, we all saw it, but the European solution, rather than to spend their energy savings on security to counter the Russian military threat they were funding, was to ask the US to send over more troops and equipment to protect them. Which we did. Under presidential administrations from both parties.
I've always believed that US money spent in Ukraine was important, because long term it is significantly less costly to keep the war in Ukraine than for Russia to succeed and then make an attempt at a NATO country. But it really is a shame that the American middle class and the people of Ukraine have had to subsidize Europe's energy needs by covering major costs of a war, in money for the US and blood for the Ukrainians, that European energy purchases made possible.
It's also a shame that now that Europe is being rapidly pushed toward the realization that they need to do something, they are talking about re-militarizing Germany and expanding their nuclear umbrellas. An expansion that would require increasing the number of nuclear armed states, because the arsenals of the UK and France are considered insufficient to cover European security. Nuclear proliferation is a huge step backward, not a step forward.
There are have been many tools at our disposal for more than a decade to get Europe to take greater responsibility for the situation, but we never used them (under any party or any President). And now, ultimately, it seems we are headed toward the worst possible result in all ways: a more militarized Europe, nuclear proliferation, an appeased Russia, an ongoing reliance on gas for European energy, a return to US gas company partnerships in Russia, and any savings from US spending in Ukraine going straight to the richest Americans through tax cuts for corporations and the highest wealth individuals.
It's not too late for other outcomes, but the current trajectory isn't promising.
I hope you found this information on the conflict in Ukraine useful and that it helps you with your own thoughts and conversations. If you have any other questions about my experiences and the conflict in Ukraine, or thoughts of your own, please let me know in the comments.
As always, if there is anyone who you think might find this useful, please share it with them!
Lucas

I know a lot of people out there want to feel armed to address the situation with some clarity given the heated politics around the issue. So today I'm going to give you three critical things to know based on the years I spent at the Pentagon representing the US military on interagency policy development groups and arms control delegations overseas with our NATO allies, Ukraine, and Russia. Ukraine did not start this war and Russia had no lawful justification for invading. When Russia broadened the conflict in Ukraine into full-scale war in 2022, the military campaign was preceded by--and has since been accompanied by--a widescale propaganda campaign amplifying Russian misinformation, namely the lie that Ukraine started the war. None of these are true. Ukrainians, as a sovereign nation separate from Russia, made the decision that they wanted to have a free and fair democracy and that they wanted to associate with Europe rather than Russia. They proved this by . In 2004, after Putin went to Ukraine, told the Ukrainian people they had to vote for his guy, and then did everything he could to help Yanukovych steal the Presidency through fraud, Ukrainians took to the streets in the Orange Revolution and demanded fair elections. name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: This race is going to be competitive
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
There’s no question that we have our work cut out for us, but I’ve never backed down.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=145%2E181023%2Euin7BQ)
Folks, can I be frank with you?
**Michigan’s 2026 governor’s race will be one of the most competitive in the country.** Here’s why:
* In 2024, Michigan’s Senate race came down to just 0.3 percentage points — or about 19,000 votes.
* Cook Political Report ranks Michigan’s 2026 governor’s race as a pure toss-up race — making it one of the most competitive races on the ballot.
* Washington Republicans have already ranked this as one of their top flip opportunities, and they are going to spend _millions_ to win this seat.

There’s no question that we have our work cut out for us, but I’ve never backed down from hard work. **I am ready to fight to make Michigan the best place to be a kid, raise a kid, and call home.**
I know you are, too. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today. We’re building a strong grassroots coalition to take on attacks, get our message out all across Michigan, and win this race — but we can’t do it without you.
[**Can I count on you to pitch in a few dollars to help us win this critical race?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/269?c0=jmb-em-q12025.KUgwrp&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250308_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=145%2E181023%2Euin7BQ)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
As Linda spends time fighting back in Congress, we need your support to ensure she has the resources to elect working-class champions across the country.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103490690/532332393/-898182107?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-03-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2FjYTZjMS0zZWZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LtwP_YD85UO-8l6Fp5s_ADLKRD2AoyHYPXGo4vt8bvU=)

| Peter,

The Trump administration is lining the pockets of the ultra-wealthy like Elon Musk while working and middle-class Americans are left in the cold. Linda is fighting back to protect Social Security and Medicare from Republicans’ reckless and dangerous cuts. Here’s our plan to fight back on the ground:

**1️⃣ **Last month, House Republicans narrowly **passed a budget proposal 217 - 215 that would gut programs like Medicaid and Social Security, all to give billionaires trillions of dollars in tax cuts.**

**2️⃣ **That narrow gap is our key to fighting back. As the chair of BOLD PAC, **Linda is at the forefront of our fight to win back a House majority that fights for the working class.**

**3️⃣ **As Linda spends time fighting back in Congress, we need your support to ensure she has the resources to elect working-class champions across the country. Peter,

I witnessed the most cringeworthy moment in U.S. House history as Congressman Al Green and his cohorts sang "Kumbaya" on the House floor. **This isn't a campfire sing-along – it's the United States Congress.**

The fact that they think this is an acceptable use of their time is a stark reminder of how out of touch they are with reality.

That's why Congressman Green's censure is well deserved. His actions are a slap in the face to the American people, and it's time he's held accountable. But I need your help to take a stand against this reckless behavior.

[**Will you join me with a $25, $50, or $100 donation today? I have repeatedly said we _**SHOULD**_ be having a major audit of where our spending is. **But we simply can’t do it without transparency and buy-in from the American people. If there is fraud, let’s see the evidence. Let’s see it come through Congress.**

I’ve heard from many of you who are horrified about the rampant cuts to critical social programs made by an unelected billionaire and his illegal access to taxpayer data.

I’m doing everything in my power to fight back. That's why I've introduced the CLEAR Act, which protects the American taxpayer from data overreach.

**And on the ground, I’m doing everything I can to ensure we have a majority that puts their country over their party and their constituents over unelected billionaires.[_MI-03 is one of the most competitive House districts in the country. name: Jim Jordan
subject: “ROGUE IMPEACHMENT”

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Our voting rights are under attack at the state and federal levels
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Expected in the House soon is a vote on the so-called SAVE Act, which would disenfranchise millions of eligible voters. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWhjwgQbOhxHTO-cvWg7573RZG6aIrn66Osch6Ry3I32ukJ-h3ci-moXQsLyZVN-Yql2aYuQBbEDJfLGA4XO9PERsciQMRU5Z4SZm_oxzC1oMjgEFfaR1j5D_KIwd_MPgnSfW4C-GNIEc09KwT8bsy5NoH6QUC6YF2xWNLCED2gUbipKDrDxkdBEdLB_Kad2VvzyFlu_AGdEYwJCBWPyA-9Xz2mq4-R-GFRZnYWTfBGGTNjgCbCCru2MJa7OTG0enS/4em/AHEaMmSgSY6HfzfRswwrdg/h0/h001.zOeOzWk4_GHlDhsWRBEp44rAi9qqUJT-BAzZ_-vDtyU)
---
Friend, Our voting rights are under attack. In the House of Representatives, a vote is expected soon on the so-called _SAVE Act_ , which would disenfranchise millions of eligible voters by requiring proof of citizenship in the form of a passport or birth certificate in order to register to vote. **Proof-of-citizenship requirements disproportionately affect people of color, people with low incomes, naturalized citizens, seniors, and women, who may be wrongly removed from voter rolls due to outdated or incorrect data.** Over 150 million Americans―roughly half of the U.S. population―don’t have a passport, and roughly 8 in 10 married women who changed their surname don’t have a birth certificate that matches their current name. Nearly 11% of American citizens of color don’t have easy access to the proof of citizenship required by the bill; that’s true of 9% of all American citizens of voting age. Elderly Americans are the least likely to have a passport or immediate access to their birth certificate. **If passed, the**** _SAVE Act_****would exclude commonly accepted forms of identification like Tribal IDs, student IDs, and driver’s licenses.** Only 43% of Native peoples have a passport, which is 13% less than the rest of the country’s population. Many older Natives were born at home on reservations and were never issued a U.S.-government birth certificate. Similar to the federally introduced _SAVE Act_ , Michigan Republicans recently introduced House Joint Resolution B, which would disenfranchise millions of eligible Michigan voters. Across the country, **more than 100 laws have been enacted at the state level to restrict access to voting.** **Thankfully, this week, Democrats in Congress re-introduced the**** _John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_****to ensure that every eligible American—regardless of race, income, or zip code—has an equal say in our democracy.** [**In the face of voter disenfranchisement on the federal and state levels, we must call for expanded access to the ballot box.** **Join me in demanding Congress and State Legislatures protect and expand our voting rights. Add your name today >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39Vp4gkIh90ovDrixVFaBLcogLYYdGpCLI1kHI1Q_a23hyqS0qKlSBh2sVqGuVeqWyiV6xNBP2oPsff9DeRhAMrj_i8vck8q6c4icSxbJ3EAPctUpkwJ9BgZ_PNAjxnkoueWUYqKFAQPAjdhLXwRAV0Q8fCZ9jETr74RM63kO5iO8OjlVoieHZjmMSTgRr_piiLIlVKtLEnE4gAfLDtX48RrjmtDjFyyssJXMf_DGfXKLPK6Ua_BhE9rTQNC8z224eCFPvKHAGKsok7QgyQvC1xwb3YKo11aiLfBM9nEq7a2pOxABTPqQL-d5LkuxeP5oVjuF93f0WLrn3ououkl7X0qh9W6W0q6mfqFD8DEZIduLnWPOF_N9_-1Iko538s2ffObnTEv_QzkfkM0cDabvtAHvq7tYVhhlOkylAtH4Z-Fg/4em/AHEaMmSgSY6HfzfRswwrdg/h1/h001.F5HJzd2FWGW0XigaZS4wf3vV1278nmoBDMTVll6JM-0) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39Vp4gkIh90ovDrixVFaBLcogLYYdGpCLI1kHI1Q_a23hyqS0qKlSBh2sVqGuVeqWyiV6xNBP2oPsff9DeRhAMrj_i8vck8q6c4icSxbJ3EAA7HaEnVWOvdt9nI3_ZcK2Wu8Cr8j5aTyTm5DWOpUGTOmglc_yVdioUsgEPoSNktjYkUtg5AQ0u8sK-S2726GKPb7CA46PaoMtf6Fb4fi1GWnQ9YAR3GbtsncnK-EM1d_-HQtZ6vpPjm2Osk_p2qtfjljyG8BHlG-ktedQiCyWaifaH00vBHJJzIcBmUdLXf7vSWhP23eV6GhJHk0TN1S8H51AKykLncX3hRA5F-0h7VkWC_NTZ2lC2aUm1HoikW8iqS3Xcd0f_IK5ifo4cCwMKEflhjH2MQiRGx8SsSN_QncYx_6bCAOHsciS6jdnSE_w/4em/AHEaMmSgSY6HfzfRswwrdg/h2/h001.lxJRNBkgTFjZtYFj0nxQzmBJmeEQP7_aTZN4tDytd1g)

Together, we will continue resisting this authoritarian administration and demand Congresspeople fulfill their constitutional duty to be a check on the Executive Branch. In this year’s special elections and next year’s midterm elections, we’ll work to win back the House and Senate and keep building a government that actually meets people’s needs so we can all thrive.
Yours in service,
Rashida

subject: The Golden Age Is Here, And The Democrats Are Melting
body:
Trump gave Laken Riley's mother the respect she deserved, and what did the Democrats do? They sat there, stone-faced, like they were at a funeral for their own egos. Disgusting!

# [The Golden Age Is Here, And The Democrats Are Melting](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=158588547&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU4NTg4NTQ3LCJpYXQiOjE3NDE0NTUyNTUsImV4cCI6MTc0NDA0NzI1NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.cV8AMwuWOCjgwfrlAH0ViHJH2JQ6MFrgwBYY8g6fMuE)
### Trump gave Laken Riley's mother the respect she deserved, and what did the Democrats do? They sat there, stone-faced, like they were at a funeral for their own egos. Disgusting!
Mar 8
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=158588547&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU4NTg4NTQ3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0MTQ1NTI1NSwiZXhwIjoxNzQ0MDQ3MjU1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.cuA3S1lbTrJAO0SM4smQhk8Wam1sILg_XwS5dQgw96w&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
