---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/27f6ef9e-f9f2-40e5-860d-f21e0521ecf0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**By Rudy W. Giuliani**
Folks, I've seen a lot in my time, but I've never witnessed anything quite like President Donald Trump's speech to Congress this week.
It was a masterpiece, a home run, a grand slam of truth and strength! The Golden Age of America has arrived, and it's all because of this man, this leader, this titan of our time. Trump didn't just speak--he roared like a lion, setting the tone for national pride and power like no president has ever done before. Believe me, I know a thing or two about leadership, and this was it!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..qoqSJM_N40Qs2phPrxB-X3wkBPpbCpUEHjINZuP0MlQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=158588547)
But you know what turned my stomach? Watching those petty, small-minded Democrats sit on their hands, refusing to stand or clap for the real heroes Trump honored. Take Laken Riley's mother--God bless her--a grieving mom whose daughter was stolen from her by a vicious murderer, allowed into this country by the chaos of an unsecured border. Trump gave her the respect she deserved, and what did the Democrats do? They sat there, stone-faced, like they were at a funeral for their own egos. Disgusting!
Then there's young DJ Daniel, a brave kid who faced brain cancer, made an honorary Secret Service agent by the president himself. A moment of pure American joy--and **[the Democrats couldn't muster a single cheer.](https://substack.com/redirect/933e1210-c801-4df7-80f6-68cc405a11df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** It's not just rudeness; it's proof they hate Trump more than they love this country. Shame on them!
_**(Piece continues below)**_
* * *
**[Presented By Gundry MD](https://substack.com/redirect/29f4fd32-bb72-48c5-8b48-51fb5bbdc542?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Heart Surgeon Begs Americans:"Stop Doing This To Your Berries"](https://substack.com/redirect/29f4fd32-bb72-48c5-8b48-51fb5bbdc542?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/29f4fd32-bb72-48c5-8b48-51fb5bbdc542?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Are you turning healthy fruits into highly unhealthy fruits, without even realizing it?
Fruit can be one of the healthiest things you can put into your body, but the majority of Americans are guilty of making **[this single mistake](https://substack.com/redirect/29f4fd32-bb72-48c5-8b48-51fb5bbdc542?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that can counteract all of the health benefits of fruit.
Eliminating this mistake could forever change the way we help increase energy levels, decrease brain fog, support digestion, and even lose weight.
**[Click here to learn the top 3 common foods](https://substack.com/redirect/29f4fd32-bb72-48c5-8b48-51fb5bbdc542?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that you would have never guessed were the cause of your fatigue.
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/29f4fd32-bb72-48c5-8b48-51fb5bbdc542?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
_**(Continued)**_
Trump's speech wasn't just words--it was a battle cry. He called on every one of us to fight with him, to stand shoulder-to-shoulder in this new era of American greatness. And let me tell you, he's dead right about our so-called "allies" Mexico and Canada. For too long, they've taken advantage of us--bleeding our economy dry with bad trade deals and laughing while we foot the bill for their border messes. Trump's tariff battle is a wake-up call: America First isn't just a slogan, it's a necessity! He's telling them, "Step up or pay up!" The least they can do is secure their side of our border--something they've dodged while we've been the world's doormat. No more!
This president's got guts--more than anyone I've ever seen in that office. He's not afraid to take on the world, to demand respect, to fight for every American. That speech wasn't some politician's fluff--it was a blueprint for strength, a promise kept to the forgotten men and women who put him there. He's bringing back jobs, crushing our enemies, and making sure every kid like DJ Daniel knows what it means to be proud of this flag again. I've said it before, and I'll say it again: Trump's the toughest, smartest, most fearless leader we've got. He's a street fighter with a heart of gold, and he's ushering in an America we haven't seen since the days of Reagan--maybe even better.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..qoqSJM_N40Qs2phPrxB-X3wkBPpbCpUEHjINZuP0MlQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=158588547)
The Democrats can sulk all they want, but the rest of us heard the call. We're not just spectators--we're soldiers in this fight for our nation's soul. Trump's leading the charge, and I'm damn proud to stand with him. The Golden Age isn't coming--it's here, and it's ours for the taking. So let's rally behind this president, slap those tariffs on, and show the world what America's made of. Mexico and Canada, you've had your free ride--time to pay the piper! And Democrats, get over yourselves--your bitterness won't stop this train. Trump's America is unstoppable, and I, for one, couldn't be prouder.
* * *

subject: “no town halls” is what you say right before you lose
body:
| |

This is exactly the kind of thing you say right before you lose your majority in a wave election... | [View in browser](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTQ4MzI1Mzc4Mjk2OTA2OTM2LFwiclwiOjE0ODMyNTQwNzA5MDgwNDE0NH0iLCJzIjoiNmM1ZDhkNTU2YTM4OGViMiJ9)

| Team,

MAGA is _aggressively_ moving to shut down dissent and protest.

GOP members of Congress have been taking flak at town halls and community meetings in their home districts for Trump's mass firings, reckless tariffs, and his utter capitulation to Vladimir Putin.

Donald Trump himself posted menacing messages on social media threatening protesters with imprisonment, deportation, and huge fines — while the head of the GOP’s campaign arm literally told Republican candidates to **_stop holding in-person town halls_** due to the massive backlash they’ve been getting:

---
| | [ ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTQ4MzI1Mzc4MzA2MzQ0MTIyLFwiclwiOjE0ODMyNTQwNzA5MDgwNDE0NH0iLCJzIjoiZGI4YWQ3YTA3OGJlNWFhMCJ9)
---
| But the truth is, Republicans ignore voter backlash at their own peril: **_“No more town halls”_ is _exactly_ the kind of thing you say right before you lose your majority in a wave election. **

It’s on us to make this happen, and the sooner the better. Our first chance to let Trump and his fascist MAGA friends know that we won’t allow them to strip away our Constitutional rights is to **win the upcoming special elections and retake control of the House**.****

---
|
---
**[National Ground Game is registering voters in these special elections and raising awareness so Democrats can win. Can we count on you to chip in $10, $25, or more right now to fight back against Republican attempts to silence the people's voices?](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTQ4MzI1Mzc4MzA5NDg5ODUzLFwiclwiOjE0ODMyNTQwNzA5MDgwNDE0NH0iLCJzIjoiY2FlMzFkZGJhNDczODcxNiJ9)**

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Dear Reader,**It wasn 't long ago that The New York Sun, one of my favorite papers, became the exclusive publisher of my columns. ****In the short time that 's passed, the Sun's mission has become more urgent than ever.****
**
---
[**Join the Sun for 1 ¢ ->**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=efa1cecd91574ea085fb721abe677326&_e=nWXSJ_XKtFDX65lWbZ2XbKN-sY6w4JEUfbdtdeeUYH2emDjSoi3XuQm_EPpiYq0ZA2mPXQRIeN16XykoPeeHV8gKO_MXOXelCFnyH5vKRypvUwNh_T--v7uAI336y1CeI_wM10izW5h0peqSxuzOc-OcBvqjTlmfNhreN1cQy2l8FZXHGuQJBpSg3i-pZaKKCg3npEf9l4fx5I5XQ_tlD0GCgMjrk_jFMzQgga5QR59dYFdxh3wPEOjlFGrebaXvPbWALmyHbp6h1QDyoJjlceAf0zjL3nKcWTrsozVqwsp-PUF07cSbkQGeIN2DM1K-W8k-PyuzPTRdir2BA3fYjpAD4802-1z_NIAt0-Cmc_CeV2iNZhaUvPJYMOfRuUAwm29qA9b_j_P_UNF1thac6_njx54RhxJb-873_X8VZvY%3D)

It's been obvious to many of us for some time that journalism in our country has become corrupted.

More dangerous than the ideological implication is the fact that we're left with precious few to hold our country's most powerful institutions to account. Our justice system, law enforcement, universities, major corporations and government agencies have become politicized beyond recognition and act with impunity.

The Sun is brave and relentless.Every day it tackles head-on the most important issues facing our country. It truly holds the powerful to account.

It acts as a true newspaper should, in the service of traditional American values and the American people.

The Sun has a long history leading the charge. Its commitment to the finest journalistic standards goes all the way back to its founding in 1833.

The Sun is now growing at a rapid pace, but we're up against some of the world's largest media conglomerates. To win, we need you to join us. Every single person counts.

name: Jena Griswold
subject: Moving forward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://jenaforcolorado.com/ [https://jenaforcolorado.com/]
Peter,
Today is International Women’s Day, and I want to take the opportunity to celebrate the strength, resilience, and achievements of women in Colorado and across the country. As the first Democratic woman elected as Colorado’s Secretary of State, I know firsthand the power of breaking barriers—and the responsibility that comes with it.
While women have made incredible strides, it is clear that our rights are under attack. That’s why I’m so proud that last year, Colorado voters took a stand and voted to protect abortion rights, ensuring that our state remains a safe haven for women seeking reproductive care.
No politician should ever come between a woman and her health care decisions. I will always fight to keep Colorado a place where women are free to make our own choices about our futures.
Women across the nation still face challenges, like the lack of guaranteed paid maternity leave and a persistent gender pay gap that holds too many back. We must continue working toward policies that support working women, ensure equal pay for equal work, and make it easier for families to thrive. Because when we invest in women, we invest in a stronger, more prosperous future for everyone.
On this day of celebration, let’s also recommit ourselves to the fight ahead—because when women lead, when women’s voices are heard, and when women’s rights are protected, we all win.
Thank you,
Jena Griswold
Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent.
Jena for Colorado
P.O. Box 270218
Louisville, CO 80027
United States

name: Lateefah Simon
subject: Honoring the women who refuse to back down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com [https://www.lateefahsimon.com]
Friend,
Happy International Women’s Day.
Today, I’m celebrating the strength, resilience, and power of women; women who have fought for generations to demand justice, dignity, and equality.
I’m also thinking of the single mothers working overtime to keep food on the table. I’m thinking of the young girls in classrooms across the Bay Area, daring to dream despite the obstacles ahead. I’m thinking of the women of color who have fought tirelessly, generation after generation , to carve out space for us in a world that too often tries to push us aside.
And I’m thinking about how, even now, we are still fighting .
Because the right’s desire to roll back our freedoms has never been more aggressive. Extremists are working around the clock to take away our bodily autonomy, strip protections for survivors of sexual violence, and push policies that make it harder for working women to make ends meet. They’re banning books, erasing our history, and gutting programs that make childcare and healthcare accessible.
And let’s not forget — Black women, women of color, and low-wage workers bear the brunt of these attacks . We fight harder, work longer, and still face significant wage gaps. And when Black women, like myself, campaign for our rights, we’re met with a similar fundraising gap that makes it twice as difficult for us to run, win, and lead.
And yet, despite all of it, we are still here. We are still fighting. And we are resilient.
So on this beautiful International Women’s Day, let’s do more than celebrate. Let’s organize, mobilize, and fight like hell to elect leaders who will protect our rights, not dismantle them. Can I count on you to join me in this fight by donating to my campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_250308_intlwomensday_act]
Thank you, and Happy International Women’s Day.
Lateefah

Now, as a 25-year veteran organizer and nationally recognized advocate for civil rights and social justice, she’s fighting this fight from the Capitol. In Lateefah, CA-12 has a proven champion.

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Who benefits if Trump walks back our NATO obligations?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We’ll give you one guess:
#
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-mar25.WvYIqH&refcode=em250308-1-f&t=1&akid=34230%2E3013755%2Exzm8Ko)
More concerning reports out of the White House this week.
Donald Trump and his administration have begun to signal that his administration would not defend a NATO ally if they were attacked.
Nevermind that NATO has kept the peace for 75 years because of the Article Five commitment each of its members make: An attack on one is an attack on all, and each member must come to their defense.
Nevermind the fact that this iron clad commitment has been invoked just one time — and that was when our NATO allies came to our defense after 9/11.
Nevermind the fact that Putin has made his expansionist aims clear.
NATO is the most successful alliance in history. American prosperity and global stability rests in large part on the success of that alliance. Abandoning that alliance is a gift to Putin — one he will happily accept.
VoteVets and our members will be mobilizing around the country and in Washington to push the administration to keep our word and uphold NATO. If they do not, we will all be less safe and less economically secure.
[**If you’d like to support that work, please:
Make a donation to VoteVets today. **](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-mar25.WvYIqH&refcode=em250308-1-f&t=2&akid=34230%2E3013755%2Exzm8Ko)

---

The team at VoteVets

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: The Common Sense Revolution
body:
| | | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JNVE26PJE2PQZRFMW7DMKA1Q_0)
---
| Peter- This week, President Trump delivered his first joint address to Congress since the election. President Trump laid out his priorities and dubbed his agenda the “common sense revolution,” which is the best way to describe these past six weeks. Meanwhile, I offered my analysis on the fallout of the White House meeting with Ukrainian president Volodomyr Zelensky and urged him to return to the table and accept the strong deal outlined by President Trump. **As always, thank you for your support. I am gearing up for re-election, and my March 2026 primary is just one year away. I need to stockpile resources now for a real fight. I have several primary opponents already announced against me, and Democrats will undoubtedly try to[meddle in my election like they have elsewhere across the country](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JNVE26PJE2PQZRFMW7DMKA1Q_1) to get a weak candidate they can beat in the general election. If I am going to win, I need your support. Please, donate anything you can to my campaign today as we gear up for this fight:**
---
| | [ CONTRIBUTE NOW >> ](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JNVE26PJE2PQZRFMW7DMKA1Q_2)
---
| Now, here's your brief.
---
| | | |
---
| **THE COMMON SENSE REVOLUTION**
---
| |
---
| President Trump delivered the first joint address to Congress of his second term this past week. This was the third address like this I’ve witnessed from Trump since being sworn into Congress in 2019, and I thought it was his best one yet. President Trump described his agenda in the first weeks of this administration as the “common sense revolution.” I think that is the perfect way to describe his second term. Just look at the highlights of the administration’s accomplishments since January 20 and you will agree:
* Keeping men out of women’s sports
* Reining in the waste, fraud, and abuse of taxpayer dollars
* Ending federal funding for the mutilation of children through transgender surgeries
* Unwinding racist DEI programs within our federal government and in the private sector
* Taking executive action to secure our border and deport illegal immigrants
* Combating the Mexican drug cartels with the full force of the American government
* Ending the Biden administration's war on oil and gas production

I could go on, and on, and on, but you get the point. The Trump administration has been so successful and popular because they are focusing on the most basic issues that Americans agree with. Like President Trump said: **America is back. **
---
|
---
| **MY REACTION TO THE TRUMP AND ZELENSKY WHITE HOUSE MEETING**
---
| |
---
| [**WATCH MY REACTION HERE**](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JNVE26PJE2PQZRFMW7DMKA1Q_3)
---
| During President Trump’s address, he read a statement from Ukrainian president Volodomyr Zelensky that came in the aftermath of the Oval Office meeting last Friday. I encourage you to read it in full: [https://x.com/ZelenskyyUa/status/1896948147085049916](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JNVE26PJE2PQZRFMW7DMKA1Q_4) The context of this about-face from Zelensky is of course the contentious Oval Office meeting between Zelensky, President Trump, and Vice President JD Vance last week. There is no doubt that Zelensky was at fault for the way that meeting devolved. Whoever is advising Zelensky should have told him this simple piece of advice: if you are a country in a dire situation with no path to peace without American support, do not come into the Oval Office and argue with the President and Vice President of the United States in public. Moreover, Zelensky initially torpedoed a mineral rights deal that effectively amounted to a security guarantee for Ukraine. If our economic interests are tied to Ukraine, then there is more of an incentive for us to protect Ukraine’s sovereignty. It’s that simple. I held a virtual town hall with constituents in Texas this week and was asked for my full analysis on the meeting, which you can watch in the video above. Ultimately, I am pleased to see that Zelensky at least recognizes that he needs President Trump’s support if he wants what is best for his country. Now it’s time for him to come back to the table and sign the good deal America has laid out for Ukraine.

subject: We want to hear from you at this unprecedented moment in American politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis — Donald
Trump and the Oligarchs, including Elon Musk, are destroying government
services and millions of people’s lives.

Medicaid and SNAP face drastic cuts. Federal workers are being fired by
the thousands. Social Security could end up gutted without a single action
by Congress. Widespread uncertainty threatens childhood education, student
loan forgiveness programs, the environment, entire government agencies,
healthcare, veteran’s benefits and airline safety.

So, we want to hear from Our Revolution supporters to understand how our
movement has been impacted by Trump 2.0. Can you take a quick minute to
fill out this survey and tell us about your experience under Trump and
Musk?

Here’s the first question: [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22366?source=email-20250308&t=1011&akid=7814%2E5885482%2Elg3SCG ]Have you or a family member been directly
impacted by one of Trump 2.0’s policies?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22366?source=email-20250308&t=1012&akid=7814%2E5885482%2Elg3SCG ]Yes, I have
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22366?source=email-20250308&t=1013&akid=7814%2E5885482%2Elg3SCG ]Yes, a family member has
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22366?source=email-20250308&t=1014&akid=7814%2E5885482%2Elg3SCG ]Not yet, but I expect to be
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22366?source=email-20250308&t=1015&akid=7814%2E5885482%2Elg3SCG ]No

Your responses will help inform our Citizen Action Team’s relentless
organizing and strategic advocacy, especially in key congressional
districts where pressure on swing Democrats and Republicans could decide
votes on Medicaid, SNAP, and tax cuts for billionaires. Sharing our
personal experience could make ALL the difference.

Organizing at this moment in history isn’t easy, but, together, our
movement can stop the worst of Trump 2.0.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22366?source=email-20250308&t=1016&akid=7814%2E5885482%2Elg3SCG ]When you fill out this quick survey, you will help our movement fight
back against Trump.

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

body:
We need to hear back from you. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=319fc674d314458cb7115261bfc0e84e&_e=M7XIGG7IYrSsCXxaPNBSaj32j0xLNXer8z386IsO9JUVmIjbfkeyWDLNz1FDuTg8xrEnJtiALHiYJ6yOcer4qvhinT7N-NEzpelywQWXt8uujUb2cFiktWSq2qVjsJI1nMXEcCNTosqBdj2Adfcf-xbHRRSK6-bQF5UUycWS62c-kLfkz6W_zDqM7ImahH1SbYbBAdAMZc2LKN26NKdC-59ZJGcbd8FNxBzt3GURuqtwYTrBsfbroBRocAv5SNdPjJ-dWzPnQIAy1qClN3xcNUCYQw2B5-72tGpZ60qFAJuS6I3bPkkuGec6OcCzAPkBf_pv_hl_cOdtoq6Lw6C2kpKx96uoX0zcN8XIsmx6nBLScd5LB8TbEqUsSLuBvDoP-pUkaI0VKKRofnIR0e5KwMKMrZChUMNnTi_zEwQ1oLbNqxSmEJ3np4_z7fpU7_2a4YUU4ZbGQDxY-7pRLyr6ug%3D%3D)
ATTN:Fellow American -

All the far-left media does is **_attack and berate_** President Trump and Senate Republicans for pushing through the _America First agenda._

We saw first-hand how far they will go with their blatant bias against the Republican ticket. If one thing is clear, it is this - _the media is aligned with the Democrats._

clean_body: Trump on $100 bill?! | = | Sometimes, on hot-button issues, we like to turn to members of the California Democratic Party to weigh in. That’s you! Republican Congressman Brandon Gill has introduced legislation to replace Benjamin Franklin with Donald Trump on the $100 bill. How do you think California Democrats should respond? You would think that Republicans would take a break from scaring the stock market and trying to cut Medicaid to actually help the American people. But instead, they are finding new and bombastic ways to bow before Donald Trump. Including this new proposal to kick Benjamin Franklin off the $100 bill and replace him with Donald Trump. We have some competing ideas internally on how we should respond to this. That’s why we want to hear from our loyal California Democratic Members...how do you recommend we respond to this proposal? Thank you for sharing your input, \- CADEM | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. body:
I fully support DOGE (Department of Government Efficiency) and their mission to expose fraud, abuse, and reckless spending hidden from Congress.
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=1e607ba662de4bd9af2d94a02120a40c&_e=5mRJtcRCF8mvVKVR8iJEaRvEb8_v4LJLLYLD9HNXYcE0fBZm_8C_qt1c0Y_xOPrZT5ezve0jYLBNssZ3jKsCyhhL5Zsja6xPnBIx8Jc4LNKoJfWWpZz_xXOii34kRg_1Ncrv2ub-k4gf0FA0gTSHEwkjPeaH7WGMDnbMdalZO4KX2LRv8q_JAu_YDFY_QbHnG_JL7lllf5geAn_xP7SNvnSHGpx0bmMZl03qihet96ew5T0MuQrZryFCAFirKle2XS67K-Uwv0Gf46qmc5O8QLIkgD2TcxmZIfSfRJ-x70e-eSk-9lSujiYbOa_q-l3x_WNmrGn1E5C2dbNuqlYZP4gb0mHt1s20UhNq5I2sDA_EZ4r1iFf1CUpyUv1YOzTLPM58ykDM-lnHqdQSogvfmtLIlc1curkDt7Khm6I1wrMYPTtyFeAo2810noAA4gQsQv9Pj0g5jMJcdv7ISn3x8FuFoLdA-My9dB9_SjfS0ycofWp_3vHlBZmsGeA1iaeW)
Fellow Republican,
For years, unelected bureaucrats have operated in the shadows, wasting your tax dollars with little to no oversight.
**[That's why I fully support DOGE (Department of Government Efficiency) and their mission to expose fraud, abuse, and reckless spending.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=1e607ba662de4bd9af2d94a02120a40c&_e=5mRJtcRCF8mvVKVR8iJEaRvEb8_v4LJLLYLD9HNXYcE0fBZm_8C_qt1c0Y_xOPrZT5ezve0jYLBNssZ3jKsCyhhL5Zsja6xPnBIx8Jc4LNKoJfWWpZz_xXOii34kRg_1Ncrv2ub-k4gf0FA0gTSHEwkjPeaH7WGMDnbMdalZO4KX2LRv8q_JAu_YDFY_QbHnG_JL7lllf5geAn_xP7SNvnSHGpx0bmMZl03qihet96ew5T0MuQrZryFCAFirKle2XS67K-Uwv0Gf46qmc5O8QLIkgD2TcxmZIfSfRJ-x70e-eSk-9lSujiYbOa_q-l3x_WNmrGn1E5C2dbNuqlYZP3abBYTU0ZjJZ92tPJTz4L_L-MPV6A5Vt_eMHW38bdaNvJoONJTAqN705hxZsiO-pYNtd2H_q2DRlD1xsOWdZanaNOocj1HELSiiyKMrlkIO6BxTvQfLTWcGn3AEyu5k5nH8sVkDEM-fM6NHWvXTWDg0WXyAS58yROJd6IMO4Q74)**
But let me be clear: The Deep State doesn't want this to happen.
DOGE's cutting-edge efforts are revealing wasteful spending at an unprecedented level.
[**This could be the turning point in restoring the federal government to what our Founders intended—a leaner, more efficient system where power and spending is kept in check.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=1e607ba662de4bd9af2d94a02120a40c&_e=5mRJtcRCF8mvVKVR8iJEaRvEb8_v4LJLLYLD9HNXYcE0fBZm_8C_qt1c0Y_xOPrZT5ezve0jYLBNssZ3jKsCyhhL5Zsja6xPnBIx8Jc4LNKoJfWWpZz_xXOii34kRg_1Ncrv2ub-k4gf0FA0gTSHEwkjPeaH7WGMDnbMdalZO4KX2LRv8q_JAu_YDFY_QbHnG_JL7lllf5geAn_xP7SNvnSHGpx0bmMZl03qihet96ew5T0MuQrZryFCAFirKle2XS67K-Uwv0Gf46qmc5O8QLIkgD2TcxmZIfSfRJ-x70e-eSk-9lSujiYbOa_q-l3x_WNmrGn1E5C2dbNuqlYZP8N73j0mB5u-_8IKC8Noxu9WFvyWSuCiddkvyzD02TxHaqEFVVzqjOqIME-bNoopPu8m2a0_nETdKYEj7Pfea2vy9UNyIeo9RPQukMyC54feHBVyvjjSBchaI0Qxk01G17N7Y-8P8bAZDjNLQYgbiioTarpMICXpAdtUrZgMtQES)
That's why the Establishment is fighting so hard to shut DOGE down.
[SUPPORT DOGE >> FIGHT BACK](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=1e607ba662de4bd9af2d94a02120a40c&_e=5mRJtcRCF8mvVKVR8iJEaRvEb8_v4LJLLYLD9HNXYcE0fBZm_8C_qt1c0Y_xOPrZT5ezve0jYLBNssZ3jKsCyhhL5Zsja6xPnBIx8Jc4LNKoJfWWpZz_xXOii34kRg_1Ncrv2ub-k4gf0FA0gTSHEwkjPeaH7WGMDnbMdalZO4KX2LRv8q_JAu_YDFY_QbHnG_JL7lllf5geAn_xP7SNvnSHGpx0bmMZl03qihet96ew5T0MuQrZryFCAFirKle2XS67K-Uwv0Gf46qmc5O8QLIkgD2TcxmZIfSfRJ-x70e-eSk-9lSujiYbOa_q-l3x_WNmrGn1E5C2dbNuqlYZP4Z1BWI_J-zJvhTOKRd9H4xN5c-pKLD2hsVNC27T1IKNKbFSqHCwHBs4AAWBj-Y-cpjhHkk1xBDZWSd6xOs2fBREUk9AQC0uIofh23GtSFyAx0lKeclDYN55LQGqgiL_YgGA6zxOdAlVWMhZZpbmjV4D3mwPujT5WurXkvR7_uvW)
_Radical judges and entrenched Deep State bureaucrats are scrambling to protect their own power._**_[They don't want transparency, and they don't want accountability.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=1e607ba662de4bd9af2d94a02120a40c&_e=5mRJtcRCF8mvVKVR8iJEaRvEb8_v4LJLLYLD9HNXYcE0fBZm_8C_qt1c0Y_xOPrZT5ezve0jYLBNssZ3jKsCyhhL5Zsja6xPnBIx8Jc4LNKoJfWWpZz_xXOii34kRg_1Ncrv2ub-k4gf0FA0gTSHEwkjPeaH7WGMDnbMdalZO4KX2LRv8q_JAu_YDFY_QbHnG_JL7lllf5geAn_xP7SNvnSHGpx0bmMZl03qihet96ew5T0MuQrZryFCAFirKle2XS67K-Uwv0Gf46qmc5O8QLIkgD2TcxmZIfSfRJ-x70e-eSk-9lSujiYbOa_q-l3x_WNmrGn1E5C2dbNuqlYZP6i0RbxbsK-jPtvYZUEXAcuNWHnLPF4pOKEwWt8NI28g8hYCoTaaw1xUfg-lC93d9RmcILv0aDn4N7wRi97iQS_aHJFm-EFxvAPyHy4tfmKYgL0x6GS2z4qyhzHUB1Ta1PHPXVLkd9Qp9yMzlNqB9YsyuyRaHaqq68bYggj1SEXf)_**
[**We must act now. Strengthening our Republican House majority is the only way to ensure that DOGE's work continues and that we rein in this bloated, out-of-control government.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=1e607ba662de4bd9af2d94a02120a40c&_e=5mRJtcRCF8mvVKVR8iJEaRvEb8_v4LJLLYLD9HNXYcE0fBZm_8C_qt1c0Y_xOPrZT5ezve0jYLBNssZ3jKsCyhhL5Zsja6xPnBIx8Jc4LNKoJfWWpZz_xXOii34kRg_1Ncrv2ub-k4gf0FA0gTSHEwkjPeaH7WGMDnbMdalZO4KX2LRv8q_JAu_YDFY_QbHnG_JL7lllf5geAn_xP7SNvnSHGpx0bmMZl03qihet96ew5T0MuQrZryFCAFirKle2XS67K-Uwv0Gf46qmc5O8QLIkgD2TcxmZIfSfRJ-x70e-eSk-9lSujiYbOa_q-l3x_WNmrGn1E5C2dbNuqlYZP9c9ZTLir6T1rHPA712sQ4diVjLcRG_bB6NQXLS9pME2MW8krPEyi1VW4PlEaIj2dIk9whNMeQdBdNAYtL6Vq_rro7Wtl_U2Q46awEioUU5ozQL3CRNJy3zqn1TsZ7G5I4N4i-EvSbUX_n3ylOqYs4RI76ENDJ701l9bp6AIs7iD)
In the coming year, Democrats will raise MILLIONS to defeat us. It may be early, but we can't afford to fall behind.
**[Only by shoring up our Republican war chest now will we ensure we have the resources to defeat the Radical Left in the next election and ensure the longterm success of DOGE.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=1e607ba662de4bd9af2d94a02120a40c&_e=5mRJtcRCF8mvVKVR8iJEaRvEb8_v4LJLLYLD9HNXYcE0fBZm_8C_qt1c0Y_xOPrZT5ezve0jYLBNssZ3jKsCyhhL5Zsja6xPnBIx8Jc4LNKoJfWWpZz_xXOii34kRg_1Ncrv2ub-k4gf0FA0gTSHEwkjPeaH7WGMDnbMdalZO4KX2LRv8q_JAu_YDFY_QbHnG_JL7lllf5geAn_xP7SNvnSHGpx0bmMZl03qihet96ew5T0MuQrZryFCAFirKle2XS67K-Uwv0Gf46qmc5O8QLIkgD2TcxmZIfSfRJ-x70e-eSk-9lSujiYbOa_q-l3x_WNmrGn1E5C2dbNuqlYZP6KHc5TilcIfCBj_dzoPTF74dPg1jm3Y-Bwj3Yurz_Fn1TbwR1IKuEgUXvbrJXzFRNCW7RZcpQ6JgelUklM8w9UGT7bRTl-rWDIEU5rmw8ITJCsffBdqraGGSHMV3eoJKR4MfL3ieJ_RO8wB3wC2yf87SGzk-YYN_JM27RTlq5e9)**
[**Will you please chip in $20.25, $50, or even $100 today?**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=1e607ba662de4bd9af2d94a02120a40c&_e=5mRJtcRCF8mvVKVR8iJEaRvEb8_v4LJLLYLD9HNXYcE0fBZm_8C_qt1c0Y_xOPrZT5ezve0jYLBNssZ3jKsCyhhL5Zsja6xPnBIx8Jc4LNKoJfWWpZz_xXOii34kRg_1Ncrv2ub-k4gf0FA0gTSHEwkjPeaH7WGMDnbMdalZO4KX2LRv8q_JAu_YDFY_QbHnG_JL7lllf5geAn_xP7SNvnSHGpx0bmMZl03qihet96ew5T0MuQrZryFCAFirKle2XS67K-Uwv0Gf46qmc5O8QLIkgD2TcxmZIfSfRJ-x70e-eSk-9lSujiYbOa_q-l3x_WNmrGn1E5C2dbNuqlYZP3IWbcZP9qhS22l8oSiMehLQ783TqPu09ICeLZiHomZ30JjJIJXmsptA4Ui3_9cOchLYraJCQy9B7trTVKQd88Snp3lJsb-5Q9OFLc1PfbM5vo8eWMmHof229UtsBt2YaU9NFX9y4hCE3EqQBKREsojdtKduHDGHzRFBS0UziFaL)
[CHIP IN NOW!](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=1e607ba662de4bd9af2d94a02120a40c&_e=5mRJtcRCF8mvVKVR8iJEaRvEb8_v4LJLLYLD9HNXYcE0fBZm_8C_qt1c0Y_xOPrZT5ezve0jYLBNssZ3jKsCyhhL5Zsja6xPnBIx8Jc4LNKoJfWWpZz_xXOii34kRg_1Ncrv2ub-k4gf0FA0gTSHEwkjPeaH7WGMDnbMdalZO4KX2LRv8q_JAu_YDFY_QbHnG_JL7lllf5geAn_xP7SNvnSHGpx0bmMZl03qihet96ew5T0MuQrZryFCAFirKle2XS67K-Uwv0Gf46qmc5O8QLIkgD2TcxmZIfSfRJ-x70e-eSk-9lSujiYbOa_q-l3x_WNmrGn1E5C2dbNuqlYZPygaGhtqjcs_AaLEg39X9NcUkD3RDKqigDQjF6YUJa-4KQMekEn0kHMyB0Tj8LreMSWGc6Tgy7_fBCcGHSycNIbgO6nDtIg4i2VGIdFP_YsGLxCPm2ApbanS88l6qLBQAU3qyvW5Y7DaYuNDN_iB7xzUauhBlBVxngJwEyQiYeBd)

name: Bonta HQ
subject: Rob’s fight for women’s rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
Right now, women across the United States face growing threats from the Trump administration and far-right extremists.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250308&t=1&akid=1683%2E1088799%2Eb_wF0l)
Today is International Women’s Day and March is Women’s History Month, a time to celebrate and honor the social, economic, cultural, and political achievements of women all over the world.
This observance feels all the more important this year, as **women across the United States face growing threats to their civil rights and reproductive freedom** from the Trump administration and far-right extremists in state legislatures.
After the federal right to abortion was overturned by the Supreme Court with help from Trump’s appointed justices, Republicans introduced abortion restrictions in countless red states, leaving _one in three_ women of reproductive age living in a state with an abortion ban.
Last month, a Missouri Republican in Congress introduced legislation aiming to ban abortion nationwide. And just two days ago, Trump’s Justice Department indicated it’s dropping a Biden-era lawsuit against Idaho’s total abortion ban.
It’s more than just reproductive freedom that’s at risk. Republicans in Congress are also pushing the SAVE Act to create more restrictions on voting, especially for women. If passed, this bill could prevent as many as 69 million married women who took their partners’ last names from voting if their new last name does not match what’s on their birth certificate.
**While these are frightening times with multiple threats to roll back the progress we’ve made when it comes to women’s civil rights, Rob is fighting back.**
The Attorney General, who has championed women’s rights and reproductive justice throughout his years of public service, pledged to protect reproductive rights after Trump won the White House. He’s making good on that promise by:
* Sponsoring two bills in the state legislature to protect abortion and other reproductive healthcare access in California;
* Continuing his lawsuit against a California hospital for illegally denying a patient an emergency abortion last year;
* Securing a legal victory defending California’s Abortion Accessibility Act, which requires California-licensed health care service plans and certain insurance policies to cover abortion services without a co-payment, deductible, or any type of cost-sharing requirement;
* Opposing Trump’s move to pardon anti-abortion extremists who threatened, harassed, and harmed abortion patients, providers, and clinics, and limit enforcement of federal laws protecting those seeking abortion care from harassment.

**[From hard-fought access to abortion to the right to vote, Rob is fighting for the rights of every woman in California and across the country. If he has your support, will you consider chipping in $5 to our people-powered campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250308?refcode=em20250308-1683&amount=5&refcode2=1683_1088799_b_wF0l&akid=1683%2E1088799%2Eb_wF0l)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250308?refcode=em20250308-1683&amount=5&refcode2=1683_1088799_b_wF0l&akid=1683%2E1088799%2Eb_wF0l)**
Thanks for all you do,
Bonta HQ
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-wrapper?refcode=em20250308&t=3&refcode2=1683_1088799_b_wF0l&akid=1683%2E1088799%2Eb_wF0l)**

After the federal right to abortion was overturned by the Supreme Court with help from Trump’s appointed justices, Republicans introduced abortion restrictions in countless red states, leaving one in three women of reproductive age living in a state with an abortion ban. Last month, a Missouri Republican in Congress introduced legislation aiming to ban abortion nationwide. And just two days ago, Trump’s Justice Department indicated it’s dropping a Biden-era lawsuit against Idaho’s total abortion ban. It’s more than just reproductive freedom that’s at risk. Republicans in Congress are also pushing the SAVE Act to create more restrictions on voting, especially for women. If passed, this bill could prevent as many as 69 million married women who took their partners’ last names from voting if their new last name does not match what’s on their birth certificate. While these are frightening times with multiple threats to roll back the progress we’ve made when it comes to women’s civil rights, Rob is fighting back. The Attorney General, who has championed women’s rights and reproductive justice throughout his years of public service, pledged to protect reproductive rights after Trump won the White House. He’s making good on that promise by: Sponsoring two bills in the state legislature to protect abortion and other reproductive healthcare access in California; Continuing his lawsuit against a California hospital for illegally denying a patient an emergency abortion last year; Securing a legal victory defending California’s Abortion Accessibility Act, which requires California-licensed health care service plans and certain insurance policies to cover abortion services without a co-payment, deductible, or any type of cost-sharing requirement; Opposing Trump’s move to pardon anti-abortion extremists who threatened, harassed, and harmed abortion patients, providers, and clinics, and limit enforcement of federal laws protecting those seeking abortion care from harassment. Thanks for all you do, Bonta HQ

Friend,

Josh Weil here, the Dem nominee running in the critical Florida special election on April 1st.

When Ukrainian President Zelenskyy came to the White House last week, there is no reason he should have been treated as anything other than what he is: a _hero_.

Ukrainians have been opposing Russia’s unprovoked aggression and placing Vladimir Putin in check for years. They are fighting for their survival as a nation and a people. They are fighting for their lives.

Like so many of us, I was utterly ashamed at the childish show that Donald Trump and JD Vance put on during Zelenskyy’s visit to Washington. __America should be a beacon for freedom__ —not supporting murderous dictators.

Take it from me: as a lifelong public school teacher who has worked with kids at some of their most difficult moments, **Trump and Vance’s bullying of Ukraine’s president would be _unacceptable_ in any classroom in America**—much less in the Oval Office of the White House.

It’s pathetic and embarrassing—**but I am optimistic because right now we can actually do something about it.**

The House stands at 215 (D) to 217 (R). **_This special election could tip the balance of power in Washington, D.C. and put a stop to Trump’s strongman act._**
|
---
_**[We need your help to do this. We have less than 30 days to accomplish this feat. But we can do it. America is waking up and paying attention to what is going on. Can you split a donation between Path to Progress and my campaign to rally the nation to our fight and stop Trump and Vance from selling out the soul of America?](https://jjajxo.clicks.mlsend2.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyODY4MDcsXCJsXCI6MTQ4MzMwMDk4MTc3NjA2NzIxLFwiclwiOjE0ODMzMDE1MTM1ODIzNjQ4Nn0iLCJzIjoiMjY5OWQ1YTcxY2ZiMjA2ZSJ9)**_

---
|
---
Thank you,

Josh Weil
Democratic Nominee
FL-06 __

name: Juliana, United We Dream
subject: 📣 Demand your members of Congress Co-Sponsor the Dream and Promise Act!
body:
Fight for a pathway to citizenship for millions! | | | Big news, Peter! ⏰ Congress reintroduced the Dream and Promise Act — a bill that could give a pathway to citizenship to millions of immigrants in our community! With Trump back in office and threatening to abduct immigrants from their jobs, families, and communities, the need for progressive, bold policy solutions like the Dream and Promise Act has never been bigger. Your members of Congress need to hear from you to let them know that people in Lorton care and are rallying for a pathway to citizenship for their immigrant neighbors! **You have the power to demand your members of Congress co-sponsor the Dream and Promise Act and put their support behind policies that protect our communities. Can you add your name to our petition today?** **[👉 Add your name 👈](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_mKAE84t-uAVI28WQmzg4g-TmzjWNa57kMj7SbfJ4dVyv8C9X3-Q2Jh7z1kPdiVtUxNasQKqkGRpFrZ1kqec_G0tu-0vuF8mfIcCF1N-wSCX-XPHqniCHG09Ye8-JY5vo5jBHGECclNvx0Xm0i-PeLZ2XJ7MJDg228GvCYOXj-qEXryeE_Fm-v1Q1PRlMKjsxIKPKOWxUdsZqJXRROiF5m4c8oHBUzCxXdsFJbUi2rw9KsFAYvgdsuVtim3mxuXx1-hh8InVj9fLJIfDjkx7y8Ro9Lxptp-aSJKWCgzh0CauqPcjRgpFgXrBpyNrKttgqQBtp7vNbXDRRp1W1s9fsuqkRN7Z-ama-avz8FuIz7UQ/4em/sjr_hCM8SRCUS52OebCEjg/h0/h001.bgW7usJ1_poeI1IBkINfybA2aizAy2MAdOGg0XWiY6M)** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_mKAE84t-uAVI28WQmzg4g-TmzjWNa57kMj7SbfJ4dVyv8C9X3-Q2Jh7z1kPdiVtUxNasQKqkGRpFrZ1kqec_G0tu-0vuF8mfIcCF1N-wSCX-XPHqniCHG09Ye8-JY5voEXx1xXcrp0G-YcPlYuizmXv92zPfICa80VxsX19EKVwif1SNjFkHB1e_ibgFmriy-xJ_rMn9X2B76KsF-SanswkI2xuW9L5Wvq3clmzj4pbXcPklmS2nipgYKtFvDlMm6GiJwvmsvn8NJ02KVHQxud5a24ziVjjG6J74EBUFx1cZFyYZ_QlxG98TCkZQcW2WDx4P3dLQ5khv-RsLB_PT_PbVwImdaAdACbdYZD9oGdg/4em/sjr_hCM8SRCUS52OebCEjg/h1/h001.mS4J-cHVm8VWrsRFk7P-HyIzmyHkijC4Yis1MiiytOY) The Dream and Promise Act would:
* 👪 Create a pathway to citizenship for many DACA recipients, Temporary Protection Status (TPS), and Deferred Enforced Departure (DED) holders in our community — potentially protecting over 5 MILLION people.

* 🤝 Reinforce that our families belong together and lawmakers have a responsibility to act.

* 📋 Get on record where our lawmakers stand: In support of keeping families together or in the business of fueling Trump’s mass abductions and kidnappings of our immigrant loved ones.

**The Dream and Promise Act benefits us all by putting 5 million people on a path to citizenship and ensuring families and communities aren’t torn apart!** With DACA hanging by a thread and hundreds of thousands of people at risk of losing TPS protections in the coming months, the Dream and Promise Act would ensure families and communities aren’t torn apart by mass abductions and deportations. If we want to fight back against Trump’s dangerous attacks, we need Congress to act now and support the Dream and Promise Act. **[Sign our petition to demand your members of Congress co-sponsor the Dream and Promise Act!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_mKAE84t-uAVI28WQmzg4g-TmzjWNa57kMj7SbfJ4dVyv8C9X3-Q2Jh7z1kPdiVtUxNasQKqkGRpFrZ1kqec_G0tu-0vuF8mfIcCF1N-wSCX-XPHqniCHG09Ye8-JY5vp_Mhz5Hgr8IhkEdyTTZPxU1C3r6AhN34rkDBMh4JHp40JVJBXcRvaKNcMLzsFSlOL6UXci4_BY5M5uAtO70M2yb52iMaLPf21Axg9hhB-0s0MCX4tDnR7beP24T2Tprmr182C4SktQ9F0eLePG_nv3JsXIEIH9UrFqx0gjbgovGXqJdrEGPvhppxcEzw_uBEqarNsI1PQhIO6EL6nvwKzeSLyKIWAPs-8dNepEb13DKA/4em/sjr_hCM8SRCUS52OebCEjg/h2/h001.OCbn2AkF9vwYSjHFbnpvFihC6dw4bnjvp4jTjt0glEo) ** In power, Juliana and the rest of the UWD team

name: Laura Friedman
subject: Some of what I’ve been up to lately
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103497681/532353024/628041926?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2FlNmU5ZWUtNGVmYy1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9tz8va6GYAtqlP1fJ80BkuWoqOOy-SsEV2MJZo4mUV0=) Friend,

I hear every day from people who feel that Democrats haven’t done enough to protect the nation from Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and the hostile takeover of our executive branch.

I fully understand that.

We cannot campaign like this is another two-year cycle. We have to make ourselves visible, and actively work to be the solution that regains trust of everyday, working people.

I’m doing my part in what has been a busy several weeks, meeting people where they are, hearing their biggest challenges and how the government is or isn’t meeting their needs. I am grateful to learn everyone’s stories, experiences, and challenges – and to have the opportunity to be part of the solution.

Here are just a few of my updates from across the district. Stay tuned for more!
* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103497682/532353025/628041926?refcode=em-3.8.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2FlNmU5ZWUtNGVmYy1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9tz8va6GYAtqlP1fJ80BkuWoqOOy-SsEV2MJZo4mUV0=)
I joined Indivisible, a pro-Democracy group, Chirla, an immigrants’ rights group, the TransLatin@ Coalition and several other advocacy groups, at Temple Beth Hillel to discuss how I’m fighting back against Trump’s reckless actions that are hurting countless California families.

I was energized by all those who are with us in this fight. Together, we’re finding ways to protect our democracy and our communities.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103497683/532353026/628041926?refcode=em-3.8.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2FlNmU5ZWUtNGVmYy1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9tz8va6GYAtqlP1fJ80BkuWoqOOy-SsEV2MJZo4mUV0=)
I hosted a town hall with California’s Attorney General Rob Bonta to discuss the legal battles we’re taking to stop the Trump administration’s abuses, and the legislation I’m working on with my colleagues to stop these unconstitutional power grabs, to return to the people the critical federal funding that Congress has already approved. [**You can watch a clip here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103497684/532353027/-803653937?v=EG9VJE0OQyc&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2FlNmU5ZWUtNGVmYy1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9tz8va6GYAtqlP1fJ80BkuWoqOOy-SsEV2MJZo4mUV0=&emci=31e6e9ee-4efc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=3ae6e9ee-4efc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=8447100)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103497685/532353028/628041926?refcode=em-3.8.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2FlNmU5ZWUtNGVmYy1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9tz8va6GYAtqlP1fJ80BkuWoqOOy-SsEV2MJZo4mUV0=)
I hosted my colleague Rick Larsen, the Ranking Member of the Transportation & Infrastructure Committee, to see first-hand what Trump & Musk’s defunding of transit, water and parks projects means for our region. We toured a brand new transit system in our district, and the LA River Restoration Project. These projects are not only environmental wins. They make our city healthier, more livable, and more resilient for generations to come. We are proposing steps to protect these critical projects from the Musk chopping block.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103497686/532353029/628041926?refcode=em-3.8.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2FlNmU5ZWUtNGVmYy1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9tz8va6GYAtqlP1fJ80BkuWoqOOy-SsEV2MJZo4mUV0=)
And just this week, I hosted Los Angeles firefighter Eric Rowley at Trump’s State of the Union address. Firefighters did their job — now it’s time for Congress to do theirs. Together, we're demanding my colleagues stand with disaster survivors in California & across the country by unconditionally delivering life-saving aid.

I understand what a privilege it is to represent this community, and you have my word that I will continue meeting as many folks as I can and using my platform to push back against the worst of the Trump agenda.

More soon,

Laura

clean_body: | = Friend, I hear every day from people who feel that Democrats haven’t done enough to protect the nation from Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and the hostile takeover of our executive branch. I fully understand that. We cannot campaign like this is another two-year cycle. We have to make ourselves visible, and actively work to be the solution that regains trust of everyday, working people. I’m doing my part in what has been a busy several weeks, meeting people where they are, hearing their biggest challenges and how the government is or isn’t meeting their needs. I am grateful to learn everyone’s stories, experiences, and challenges – and to have the opportunity to be part of the solution. Here are just a few of my updates from across the district. Stay tuned for more! = I joined Indivisible, a pro-Democracy group, Chirla, an immigrants’ rights group, the TransLatin@ Coalition and several other advocacy groups, at Temple Beth Hillel to discuss how I’m fighting back against Trump’s reckless actions that are hurting countless California families. I was energized by all those who are with us in this fight. Together, we’re finding ways to protect our democracy and our communities. = I hosted a town hall with California’s Attorney General Rob Bonta to discuss the legal battles we’re taking to stop the Trump administration’s abuses, and the legislation I’m working on with my colleagues to stop these unconstitutional power grabs, to return to the people the critical federal funding that Congress has already approved. = I hosted my colleague Rick Larsen, the Ranking Member of the Transportation & Infrastructure Committee, to see first-hand what Trump & Musk’s defunding of transit, water and parks projects means for our region. We toured a brand new transit system in our district, and the LA River Restoration Project. These projects are not only environmental wins. They make our city healthier, more livable, and more resilient for generations to come. We are proposing steps to protect these critical projects from the Musk chopping block. = And just this week, I hosted Los Angeles firefighter Eric Rowley at Trump’s State of the Union address. Firefighters did their job — now it’s time for Congress to do theirs. Together, we're demanding my colleagues stand with disaster survivors in California & across the country by unconditionally delivering life-saving aid. I understand what a privilege it is to represent this community, and you have my word that I will continue meeting as many folks as I can and using my platform to push back against the worst of the Trump agenda. More soon, Laura | =** | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! To chip in to Laura's campaign = To learn more about Laura's progressive record of supporting our working families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Laura Friedman for Congress PO Box 27296 Los Angeles, CA 90027 United States

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Re: NWS layoffs
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103497836/532353564/1514584251?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjI2MGQ2NS00ZmZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WrtbFsAZ3uxBqYITJRtKKhWBAdNIlZZBZFGsA3Y0xQY=)
I'm fuming. The reckless decision to fire NOAA and National Weather Service employees puts American lives at risk, Peter. As a meteorologist for more than two decades, I depended on their work to provide accurate, life-saving weather reports for my neighbors. Our community stayed safe because of the information I gave them, that came from these organizations. **Even things that might sound okay on a spreadsheet, are in fact highly-skilled, highly-trained specialists where the cost of catastrophe will far outweigh any savings.** For example, I’ve been informed that one of the people laid off was an NWS doppler radar electrician, who was told it was “not a necessary position”, and that NWS can get a contractor if they need to fix things that break down at the station. Do you know how many people know how to fix doppler radars, Peter? It’s not many, and the ones who can might need to be called in from across the state, and even across the region. **That is hours and even days that these systems will be down, and anyone from the Midwest knows those hours could be the difference between a full evacuation and unspeakable damage.** **You can’t just get a warning from Apple, either. Their weather data comes from the very services like NWS being gutted.** This won’t stand. As the only trained meteorologist in Congress, I am fighting back against any attempt to undermine the public servants at NOAA and the National Weather Service immediately. And I hope you’ll stand with me. [**That’s why I’m asking you to sign on today to commit to continue mobilizing against Trump’s attack on climate science. Everything from our home insurance prices to our neighbor’s safety depends on it.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103497837/532353565/413780487?refcode=em-3.8.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjI2MGQ2NS00ZmZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WrtbFsAZ3uxBqYITJRtKKhWBAdNIlZZBZFGsA3Y0xQY=&emci=c0260d65-4ffc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c2260d65-4ffc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=18052858) | [Sign on – Protect Climate Scientists](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103497838/532353566/413780487?refcode=em-3.8.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjI2MGQ2NS00ZmZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WrtbFsAZ3uxBqYITJRtKKhWBAdNIlZZBZFGsA3Y0xQY=&emci=c0260d65-4ffc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c2260d65-4ffc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=18052858)
---
-Eric
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103497839/532353567/779985510?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjI2MGQ2NS00ZmZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WrtbFsAZ3uxBqYITJRtKKhWBAdNIlZZBZFGsA3Y0xQY=&emci=c0260d65-4ffc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c2260d65-4ffc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=18052858) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103497840/532353568/-1582993359?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjI2MGQ2NS00ZmZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WrtbFsAZ3uxBqYITJRtKKhWBAdNIlZZBZFGsA3Y0xQY=&emci=c0260d65-4ffc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c2260d65-4ffc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=18052858) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103497841/532353569/988740625?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjI2MGQ2NS00ZmZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WrtbFsAZ3uxBqYITJRtKKhWBAdNIlZZBZFGsA3Y0xQY=&emci=c0260d65-4ffc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c2260d65-4ffc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=18052858) Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, [consider making a grassroots contribution here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103497842/532353570/1514584251?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjI2MGQ2NS00ZmZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WrtbFsAZ3uxBqYITJRtKKhWBAdNIlZZBZFGsA3Y0xQY=)

We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://act.ericforillinois.com/p/uulxx7KmPEOHzSyNB6xzow2?unsubscribedata=owRHRkVs0YQLi8Op%2B332tRzgeDYmbHKE7k%2BEGgqCpULBHIv6BlAeIr6JKWORIVDhog5Hz7uCWrlJAuhB39GKgOXnrqMeFuzzlhEwRdYNkvT%2FheF%2B%2Frv0BKLf1x2gOrFjjPHr3AMQdGkz8bHxU7NL%2F7SRiTEF6lzR7CAgAV3Fb%2B7tidagsTEGfhcON20ETK6BjpVElURG21jVRdoXY2lkoizpYCUledM7tTP4DcUJXUiCeJ3%2Bn1iFcXOBZ3ww8Lvf6Xvhp0nZzvOnHXN2gIb9US0tL7twW6ETLV90rykklNMFPubzswygXWChz%2F%2FyFhZQfri1R9fqLTkYOu9MkbGnCywYp2WiQgqmcsScGiU0cS9GR%2FvDbNi5S4VCeuIVpDOqmhae%2BZauRFdA32md40A0ZmZzBN9cCg6LUzq4OKoJgJCnYh31HO3dsX6JNwQh6I3o). Today is International Women’s Day, Peter!

On International Women’s Day, we celebrate the achievements of women everywhere, _but we must also take a moment to recognize that our fight for equality is far from over._

Right now, women’s rights are under attack. Extreme Republicans are working to roll back reproductive freedom, block efforts to ensure equal pay, and make it harder for women to access affordable healthcare and childcare. They are even trying to make it harder for women to vote, because those who changed their names when they got married could face even**** more hurdles to prove U.S. citizenship for a national voter ID.

Instead of moving forward, they want to drag us backward. And if we don’t fight back, they’ll keep chipping away at the rights people generations before us fought so hard to win. As a pro-choice woman doctor in the U.S. House of Representatives, I know how important it is to have leaders who will stand up and defend women’s rights at every turn. But I can’t do it alone.

It's on all of us to make our voices heard today— _and every day_ —in the fight for gender equality. [**Will you join me in committing to the fights ahead by signing my petition today? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103498090/532354718/1526778335?ms=em25_250308_inwomd_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&refcode=em25_250308_inwomd_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&source=em25_250308_inwomd_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250308_inwomd_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=er2FJUzPAy0KqKTCs0QGwyUAfA0lqGI7TlK3rJa3kj2cJX8bCczTcAVKxdZ/wG3kKXboKZR9YcE6vItotSBjqBIW5JtD0V8pDUx81Vvo5FwBYe3LKYznLPo8eQgKTC/dwxdp8tBAakzTtWl9B/AVDH+5cm11kIOXupwp4vmOjL4=&refcode2=e4c03d84-4ffc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGMwM2Q4NC00ZmZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ErroQLcUZc8gciNKfGOftHamMw0QDcI6ejpei53qXTA=&emci=a84227a6-cafa-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e4c03d84-4ffc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15820338) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103498092/532354720/1526778335?ms=em25_250308_inwomd_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&refcode=em25_250308_inwomd_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&source=em25_250308_inwomd_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250308_inwomd_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=er2FJUzPAy0KqKTCs0QGwyUAfA0lqGI7TlK3rJa3kj2cJX8bCczTcAVKxdZ/wG3kKXboKZR9YcE6vItotSBjqBIW5JtD0V8pDUx81Vvo5FwBYe3LKYznLPo8eQgKTC/dwxdp8tBAakzTtWl9B/AVDH+5cm11kIOXupwp4vmOjL4=&refcode2=e4c03d84-4ffc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGMwM2Q4NC00ZmZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ErroQLcUZc8gciNKfGOftHamMw0QDcI6ejpei53qXTA=&emci=a84227a6-cafa-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e4c03d84-4ffc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15820338) This isn’t just about politics—it’s about our lives, our collective freedoms, and our futures.

It’s about making sure women and girls have the right to make their own choices, receive fair pay, and have access to life-saving healthcare should they ever need it. It's also about having control over our own destinies.

Let’s show the GOP that we’re not backing down. [**Add your name to stand with all women today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103498095/532354722/1526778335?ms=em25_250308_inwomd_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&refcode=em25_250308_inwomd_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&source=em25_250308_inwomd_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250308_inwomd_adv_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=er2FJUzPAy0KqKTCs0QGwyUAfA0lqGI7TlK3rJa3kj2cJX8bCczTcAVKxdZ/wG3kKXboKZR9YcE6vItotSBjqBIW5JtD0V8pDUx81Vvo5FwBYe3LKYznLPo8eQgKTC/dwxdp8tBAakzTtWl9B/AVDH+5cm11kIOXupwp4vmOjL4=&refcode2=e4c03d84-4ffc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGMwM2Q4NC00ZmZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ErroQLcUZc8gciNKfGOftHamMw0QDcI6ejpei53qXTA=&emci=a84227a6-cafa-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e4c03d84-4ffc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15820338)

Hi Peter, By now I’m sure you’ve heard of the “Safeguard American Voter Eligibility” (SAVE) Act: one of the most restrictive voter ID requirements we've ever seen. [**We’re expecting a vote any day now, so make sure you tell Congress to vote NO on the SAVE Act now before it’s too late!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103498101/532354730/-202412641?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5YzAzZDg0LTRmZmMtZWYxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OUx7wfd1gsQK_w8EljQ-TMrcqt0zihZwDLAUfEUVTLo=&emci=1882cbd9-bcfb-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e9c03d84-4ffc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)

| | The SAVE Act would create unnecessary barriers to voting, by requiring voters to require strict proof of citizenship, such as a passport or birth certificate, to register or update voter registration. Simply based on unfounded claims of voter fraud. This bill would suppress and silence millions of voters, by requiring every citizen to provide a passport or birth certificate in person to register or update their voter information. The SAVE Act has also been attributed to a [poll tax](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103498105/532354735/-608423265?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5YzAzZDg0LTRmZmMtZWYxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OUx7wfd1gsQK_w8EljQ-TMrcqt0zihZwDLAUfEUVTLo=&emci=1882cbd9-bcfb-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e9c03d84-4ffc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230), as it would be expensive for those who have lost these documents to get them replaced. The SAVE Act is an unprecedented assault on voting rights — don’t be fooled.
Our democracy only works when everyone has equal access to the ballot box. We can't let the SAVE Act pass. Now's the time to stand up for our access to the ballots. [**Will you take a few minutes and email your Member of Congress today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103498107/532354736/-202412641?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5YzAzZDg0LTRmZmMtZWYxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OUx7wfd1gsQK_w8EljQ-TMrcqt0zihZwDLAUfEUVTLo=&emci=1882cbd9-bcfb-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e9c03d84-4ffc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)****

clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, By now I’m sure you’ve heard of the “Safeguard American Voter Eligibility” (SAVE) Act: one of the most restrictive voter ID requirements we've ever seen. | | The SAVE Act would create unnecessary barriers to voting, by requiring voters to require strict proof of citizenship, such as a passport or birth certificate, to register or update voter registration. Simply based on unfounded claims of voter fraud. This bill would suppress and silence millions of voters, by requiring every citizen to provide a passport or birth certificate in person to register or update their voter information. The SAVE Act has also been attributed to a , as it would be expensive for those who have lost these documents to get them replaced. The SAVE Act is an unprecedented assault on voting rights — don’t be fooled. Our democracy only works when everyone has equal access to the ballot box. We can't let the SAVE Act pass. Now's the time to stand up for our access to the ballots. **** Stand up for our democracy — we need you. Sincerely, Britney VanCitters (she/her) OLCV Political & Organizing Director | | | | | ---|---|--- Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

* * *
Apparently Christian nationalist warrior and new Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth thinks stories about little redheaded girls are just a little too DEI... President Trump is taking on Washington and fighting for American families, while Elon Musk is revolutionizing technology, taking on Big Government, and proving that bold ideas can reshape the future. But let’s be honest—our kids aren’t hearing the truth. The media, the left, and even their schools are distorting the facts about these two leaders. If we don’t teach them what real leadership looks like, who will? That’s why we’re excited to offer you this —to give kids the real story of these two bold leaders and their impact on America’s future. ✔ Donald Trump: The leader who put America First, fought for families, and reshaped politics. ✔ Elon Musk: The visionary behind Tesla, SpaceX, and groundbreaking technology. ✔ How they’re teaming up to challenge the status quo and fix what’s broken. Trump is taking on Washington’s corruption. Musk is taking on Big Tech. Trump fought to bring back American jobs. Musk is creating the jobs of the future. Together, they’re proving that leadership, innovation, and thinking big can change everything. Our kids deserve to know what real leadership looks like. They deserve to know the truth. ** For God, country, and our children’s future, The Kids Guide Team

name: Scott Presler - Early Vote Action
subject: I’m sorry.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Early Vote Action PAC](https://go
body:
I am doing everything I can to save our country.

| | | | |
---
Friend – I have spent some of the best years of my life fighting to save America from the radical left that wants to destroy it and sometimes, I’ve put that fight over the things I cherish the most.
I’ve missed birthdays, special occasions, and reunions...
I’ve come home completely exhausted from trying to secure victory in states far away from my home for **President Trump** and **our GOP majority**.
My dad served our country in the military, and he taught me how to love our country the way he does.
He still calls my mom his “bride” and I know that even when I don’t see him for months at a time, he understands the importance of **the work Early Vote Action does**.
My mom put everything she had into raising our family, and even today, she still puts everything she has into taking care of all of us.
I miss my family... But I would not change a single thing about the past few years, and **__[I will never give up this fight](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a6Wk/?__vbtrk=Mjc4NzU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc4NzU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_._**
Someday, all of this is going to end. We will have transformed the Republican Party to always put America First. We will have successfully fought to drop unlawful voters from states’ voter rolls. We will have transformed voter demographics, and mobilized enough voters to save our country, once and for all.
That is, at least, _**my hope**_ , and **my dream**.
We ****_delivered Pennsylvania for President Trump_**. **We were instrumental in **_**revamping the RNC**_.** We are so close to **_**transforming New Jersey** _**into a red state that I can feel it.
The support from patriots like you was instrumental in all of those victories, and we’re still not done. Without your support, we wouldn’t have accomplished any of what we’ve done so far.
I have given my life to this. If you believe this is still a cause worth fighting for, I hope you’ll chip in to help me keep doing it full time.
**__[Can I count on you to keep us in this fight](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a6Wk/?__vbtrk=Mjc4NzU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc4NzU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_?_**

_Forever Fighting,_

**Scott Presler** Founder, Early Vote Action

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a6Wk/?__vbtrk=Mjc4NzU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc4NzU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

You might be asking yourself, “What’s the significance of $4?” Well, that’s because there are 4 key Senate elections we need to win in 2026. We can also defeat two vulnerable Republicans up for election — Senators Susan Collins in Maine and Thom Tillis in North Carolina. If everyone who opened this email chipped in just $4, we could hit our fundraising goal for the month and start stockpiling our resources to invest in battleground states like these. name: Josh Harder
subject: Building a better future, for them
body:
My thoughts as a dad.

| | **** Happy International Women's Day, Peter! Now that I’m a dad of two daughters I often make the joke that for me, the future really is female. I will admit to seeing things a bit differently these days. Good schools, accessible healthcare, and safe neighborhoods mean that my daughters can grow into their full potential. It’s not hypothetical to me. That’s why I get so frustrated when I see MAGA Republicans pushing extreme policies to defund the Department of Education, restrict women’s reproductive rights, and take away access to healthcare. clean_body: My thoughts as a dad. | | ** Happy International Women's Day, Peter! Now that I’m a dad of two daughters I often make the joke that for me, the future really is female. I will admit to seeing things a bit differently these days. Good schools, accessible healthcare, and safe neighborhoods mean that my daughters can grow into their full potential. It’s not hypothetical to me. That’s why I get so frustrated when I see MAGA Republicans pushing extreme policies to defund the Department of Education, restrict women’s reproductive rights, and take away access to healthcare. It makes me so angry to know that their radical agenda will negatively impact my daughters, and I am more determined than ever to fight back. = It’s about building a better future for them, Josh

To defeat Jon Ossoff, we need every tough conservative to support the Georgia Nominee Fund. **_In New Hampshire, Jeanne Shaheen could run again, or could retire and create an open race._** Whoever our nominee is, the New Hampshire Nominee Fund will be ready for them on day one. **_In Michigan, we have an open Senate race. _**Michigan, like Georgia, is a Trump state. There’s no reason it shouldn’t have a Republican senator. The Michigan Nominee Fund is there to help us hit the ground running. **_Finally, in North Carolina and Maine, we must defend the Senate seats we have. _**

subject: here’s what’s next
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
---
| | Team, Trump doesn’t care about you or us. All he cares about is using chaos and division to make himself more powerful. Tuesday night’s joint address proved that.

Josh is fighting for YOU: for reproductive freedom, K-12 education, health care for our kids and our aging parents, our first responders, and so much more. As we see the fallout from Trump’s attacks last night, we need you to show your support for Democrats and keep Josh’s campaign going. **[Click here to donate anything you can to help us keep the fight going.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103499122/532358079/-486314421?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20250308_FR_TrumpSpeech_0_3MO_TeamGottheimer_NA_NA_1.2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWY5YjgzMC01MmZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NEJw9H66mqPLXpBglvaLPpTE6BG9B90BPTO76gJistw=&emci=57d38da3-aafb-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=fef9b830-52fc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=37438246)**
* * *
**_Begin Forwarded Message:_** Team,

Tonight, Donald Trump delivered a joint address to both chambers of Congress. Let’s be clear, this was **not** a State of the Union.

As usual, Trump doesn’t actually care about lowering costs and making life more affordable, instead he’s focused on sowing division and chaos amongst our allies, and within our country, while working families and seniors foot the bill. From leveraging tariffs on our neighbors, shutting down the Department of Education, or firing FAA or VA workers – all Trump has done is sow chaos and division rather than actually lower costs for everyday Americans.

I know the podium of the House Chamber seems like a long way from a Governor’s race in New Jersey. But the fact is that this race, and this election is our first real chance to prove to Donald Trump and his MAGA extremists that we won’t stand by while they attack our Jersey Values.

As one of two states with competitive races for Governor this year, we know full well Trump will do whatever it takes to prop up his hand-picked GOP talking heads, _including spending as much of Elon Musk’s money as he can get._

**This November’s election is our chance to show them that Democrats are ready to defend** reproductive freedom, K-12 education, health care for our kids and our aging parents, standing by our first responders, and so much more – _and it all starts with you and me._

So, if you watched Trump’s speech before Congress, heard commentators talking about it on the news, or saw your timelines flooded with scary headlines, I want you to remember that I’m in this fight with you. **[And, if you can, I hope you’ll consider chipping in to help us keep this fight going.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103499123/532358080/-486314421?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20250308_FR_TrumpSpeech_0_3MO_TeamGottheimer_NA_NA_1.2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWY5YjgzMC01MmZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NEJw9H66mqPLXpBglvaLPpTE6BG9B90BPTO76gJistw=&emci=57d38da3-aafb-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=fef9b830-52fc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=37438246)** _Click below to donate to Josh Gottheimer’s campaign. clean_body: | | Team, Trump doesn’t care about you or us. All he cares about is using chaos and division to make himself more powerful. Tuesday night’s joint address proved that. Josh is fighting for YOU: for reproductive freedom, K-12 education, health care for our kids and our aging parents, our first responders, and so much more. As we see the fallout from Trump’s attacks last night, we need you to show your support for Democrats and keep Josh’s campaign going. Begin Forwarded Message: Team, Tonight, Donald Trump delivered a joint address to both chambers of Congress. Let’s be clear, this was not a State of the Union. As usual, Trump doesn’t actually care about lowering costs and making life more affordable, instead he’s focused on sowing division and chaos amongst our allies, and within our country, while working families and seniors foot the bill. From leveraging tariffs on our neighbors, shutting down the Department of Education, or firing FAA or VA workers – all Trump has done is sow chaos and division rather than actually lower costs for everyday Americans. I know the podium of the House Chamber seems like a long way from a Governor’s race in New Jersey. But the fact is that this race, and this election is our first real chance to prove to Donald Trump and his MAGA extremists that we won’t stand by while they attack our Jersey Values. As one of two states with competitive races for Governor this year, we know full well Trump will do whatever it takes to prop up his hand-picked GOP talking heads, including spending as much of Elon Musk’s money as he can get. This November’s election is our chance to show them that Democrats are ready to defend reproductive freedom, K-12 education, health care for our kids and our aging parents, standing by our first responders, and so much more – and it all starts with you and me. So, if you watched Trump’s speech before Congress, heard commentators talking about it on the news, or saw your timelines flooded with scary headlines, I want you to remember that I’m in this fight with you. Click below to donate to Josh Gottheimer’s campaign. name: Wes Moore
subject: I won’t let myself rest when families are in need
body:
Right now, a lot of folks are concerned about the state of our economy, and for good reason.
In just the first few weeks of his presidency, Donald Trump threatened to freeze funding for numerous federal programs Marylanders rely on, laid off thousands of federal workers, and announced arbitrary tariffs that will raise the prices of groceries and other goods essential to our daily lives.
It’s senseless chaos, and it’s the complete opposite of what voters were hoping for.
I won’t let myself rest when families are in need.
That’s why I’m countering the Trump administration’s attacks against our economy by introducing initiatives that support displaced federal workers, promote small businesses, and deliver much-needed financial relief for Marylanders.
One example of this ongoing effort is our new tax reform plan.
Under our current laws, Maryland’s tax system isn’t fair. To address this issue, we’ve put together a tax reform plan that will make taxes simpler, fairer, and pro-growth — all without raising sales or property taxes by a single penny for the third year in a row.
Under this plan, two-thirds of Marylanders will get a tax cut.
We’re also expanding access to the Child Tax Credit, which supports middle-class families and lifts children out of poverty.
These are the types of policies we should all be focused on. Policies that put people first. If you agree, add your name to show your support for our economic agenda: [https://support.wesmoore.com/a/wes-em-20250308-1?source=em-20250308-1]
SIGN ON » [https://support.wesmoore.com/a/wes-em-20250308-1?source=em-20250308-1]
We can’t just accept the destruction coming from the White House — we must stand against it. That’s what I’m doing every day, and I hope you’re with me.
Elevate,
Wes

---
