name: Joe Kerr
subject: A Firefighter’s Mission in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I’m Joe Kerr, a second-generation firefighter and labor leader running for Congress to represent California's 40th District.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86817?firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8807%2E614464%2EwxaDHC)
Hi Peter,
I’m Joe Kerr, a second-generation firefighter and labor leader. For three decades, I’ve run headfirst toward the problem—whether inside burning buildings or in the halls of the State Assembly, I’ve always fought for common-sense solutions to save lives.
**[Now, I need your help keeping up the fight as I run for Congress to represent California’s 40th District. This is going to be a team effort, so Peter, will you split a contribution between Heartland Patriots and my campaign today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86817?firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8807%2E614464%2EwxaDHC)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86817?firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8807%2E614464%2EwxaDHC)**
In firefighting, when we pull up on a scene of a house on fire, we don’t ask who they voted for—we just put out the fire. As a fire captain and labor leader, I worked with both parties to protect rights and save lives. _It’s common sense._
**So, when I see Trump’s White House merely suggest seeking retribution for his political rivals instead of getting to work on the things he was elected to do, like lowering the costs of groceries and healthcare, I can’t sit back and let the fire spread.**
I will work with whoever, whenever, wherever, to fix our community’s greatest problems. This isn’t about being a Democrat or a Republican—hardworking families are being screwed over by chaos and gridlock in Washington. We need a practical problem solver who can understand both sides and bring people together with real solutions.
**[I’ve used my common-sense approach to save the lives of my fellow firefighters and working-class Americans across the country, but I need your help to take the fight to Congress. Will you split a contribution between Heartland Patriots and my campaign to join me as a founding donor today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86817?firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=8807%2E614464%2EwxaDHC)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86818?firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=8807%2E614464%2EwxaDHC) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86818?firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=8807%2E614464%2EwxaDHC) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86818?firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=8807%2E614464%2EwxaDHC) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86818?firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=8807%2E614464%2EwxaDHC) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86818?firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=8807%2E614464%2EwxaDHC) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86818?firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=8807%2E614464%2EwxaDHC) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86817?firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=8807%2E614464%2EwxaDHC)

Onward,
Joe

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. body:
Tomorrow is SUNDAY! Let me encourage you instead of finding a reason to not attend church, find a reason to attend church. I promise that you will NO
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19576257.10927.1.28eea6fef376b777f1b45a894d7488a8) |
---
Tomorrow is **SUNDAY**! Let me encourage you _instead of_ finding a reason to not attend church, find a reason to attend church. **I promise that you will NOT regret it!** If you _do not have a home church_ then I want to invite you to join me at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19576257.10928.1.ed9cb4c62cf39782c7658ec910f1f19a) tomorrow as we continue going through the [Book of Acts](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19576257.10929.1.875df02b3adab2d68fdb98034a6cae3f), _verse-by-verse_. Tomorrow's message is **Acts Pt. 64 - Riots + Revivals** **Tulsa** | 10am CT **OKC** | 6pm CT You can always join us **online** : [https://www.youtube.com/@sheridanchurch](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19576257.10930.1.0ad0885ebfcc816cdc8cf2805540787e) **Upcoming Events At Sheridan.Church:** -Wednesday, April 9 @6:30pm: **Rabbi Jonathan Cahn** | RSVP: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1554718](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19576257.10931.1.0fcba1a560a49040efdd5f47b6eb100a) -Thursday, May 8 @6:30pm: **Roger Stone** | _More Info TBA_ Please consider partnering w/[Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19576257.10932.1.8392b80b0fe9790d4e67858da9e98e1a) by visiting [https://sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19576257.10933.1.7462c98b1235f10fec55510c0decdaa5) Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19576257.10934.1.cff8fcd88c5c3404ab724764112739f8)

## Eric Trump Inside | Protesters Outside
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19576257.10935.1.86984a0a54bd2cf36fb464d9fad01ba2)
---
This week, I sat down with [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19576257.10936.1.2b8bdf800ac77ef92963b8a379c90b41) at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19576257.10937.1.07eb0ea88185ad4a01f31dd8206e812e) in Tulsa, OK for an _incredible conversation_ about a wide range of subjects from the **2024 Election** , **DOGE** and the **Great American Comeback** while protestors outside were not thrilled with a Trump speaking at a church... Watch [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19576257.10938.1.53b3ab6a3ca9150a4b6cee00d5968358) at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19576257.10939.1.95f15c7f3be63cb4916142fba8858268) here: [https://youtu.be/uH0zK20NJ18](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=19576257.10940.1.5342d7350b380a122079671396471c74)

name: Byron Donalds
subject: I have big news
body:
Join President Trump and I, stand for Florida.
| | | | https://secure.winred.com/byron-donalds-for-governor/don-prsp-email-announcement-rcl?utm_medium=emailrental&utm;_source=lp&utm;_campaign=20250308_byrondonalds_announcement&utm;_content=donate&amount;=20.25&utm;_term=MAGANEWS
---
|
---
The time has officially come.
**It is with great pleasure that I am announcing my official candidacy for Governor of the State of Florida.**
It’s MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds. I can’t thank President Trump enough for his endorsement and continuous support, he has stood with me since _DAY ONE._
I’ve been his STRONGEST supporter in the House, I will continue to be his STRONGEST supporter as Governor of the State of Florida.

|
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=954a2bf96816420ba2d5f5f5bc0bef32&_e=EfoxJQWVWJehQMlJOwwkEQRyV6jEk_SX8FCrkJAaok8hAb0iIwGYGEW4tysodnNQ00oNYN9kYsZRTmmVnyGsX9gOBHbptto-xZdeMvsJHObWRVBjN9AdITRTrN4dHR3GiImd-KorN9l9wYeIljB9HNovxlELrg8zqTSD1Bp1k-LN0iHWAEEaREAFxX_tXnDRgpfudR-uTlCHb9S98HrrHlFUCNeK7Kc8fP-RxEoUYhpWs80YvHICpYF1cUffhugPM9QJiXsLpPvwF3BcKvCXq2t2UQ14sUF5S796omqEYeOz7qCUcoBl_yLcxH8RZJGapB35t7rkh8MEuQkVQSFK0MgO2a3A42hRsDM-5BE2VKVjVjtJRsSyO0svdIbaTLKMtUeRXzECw8hxKjCjm4YSpMUWmnyERlUHklRieI3WLMc_5DlIxSuQQVvyWJiEQIZsgR1zqSSJ_mxGjc0yKXtG7w%3D%3D)
|

As Governor of Florida, I will work tirelessly to implement President Trump’s **America FIRST Agenda.** Whether it’s deporting illegal immigrants, keeping men out of women’s bathrooms, & extinguishing bureaucratic corruption, I promise you that under my watch, Florida will stay the _**FREEST**_ State in the Nation.
I can’t predict what the future holds for me, but I can GUARANTEE that Democrats won’t let me go without **HEAVY FIRE** coming my way.
It’s going to be a GRUELING fight against them & I’m up for the challenge. You’ve been with me every step of the way, but right now building a war chest for the fight ahead is our #1 Priority.
_**[So I’m humbly asking: will you stand with President Trump and donate now to my race?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=954a2bf96816420ba2d5f5f5bc0bef32&_e=EfoxJQWVWJehQMlJOwwkEQRyV6jEk_SX8FCrkJAaok8hAb0iIwGYGEW4tysodnNQ00oNYN9kYsZRTmmVnyGsX9gOBHbptto-xZdeMvsJHObWRVBjN9AdITRTrN4dHR3GiImd-KorN9l9wYeIljB9HNovxlELrg8zqTSD1Bp1k-LN0iHWAEEaREAFxX_tXnDRgpfudR-uTlCHb9S98HrrHlFUCNeK7Kc8fP-RxEoUYhpWs80YvHICpYF1cUffhugPM9QJiXsLpPvwF3BcKvCXq2t2UQ14sUF5S796omqEYeOz7qCUcoBl_yLcxH8RZJGag04ITnx2aaZiJvREDTtAC3MEcjP2waZZzBZeA7bIyursYuZGcnXfILkw5dg4Lz7HRwpOQlU809D3115j8wKeDtAe-kLCWoSra8VJNHnrDboG-Vc4lpwaZxqvzgFPUWajTAMMB_B3_jHrqDjKpc8QDA%3D%3D)**_

name: Oregon GOP
subject: Celebrating Strong Women on International Women’s Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (COMMITTEE ID 379) 187 HIGH ST
body:
Honoring Women Who Lead & Inspire

| | | | [ ](https://oregon.gop/)
---
| | Friend, Today, we celebrate the powerful contributions of women across the country and around the world. From business and education to public service and leadership, women continue to break barriers, shape history, and inspire future generations.
---
| | [ ](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/YVdyJZvbqGQk/d3JIdlZPbzVSUFlHVTBUQzk4MTU1bXdEQUVMY3BGYndxZ2tybVlMRjczUWdoM2tMY0ZMWnoyUVpYWFNrd21HMzFSUGhWNG1RTzI3ZVBoVjRsRnRRSFVtOWR3SHN6SlBmKzZIREpFaXhVNkk9S0/)
---
| | Here in Oregon, we recognize the dedication of women who serve our communities with integrity and who stand up for the timeless values of freedom and personal responsibility. Leaders like Lori Chavez-DeRemer, U.S. Secretary of Labor nominee from Oregon, along with Oregon Senator Kim Thatcher, and former Oregon Senator Jackie Winters, have all made a lasting impact by advocating for policies that strengthen our communities, our state, and our nation. On this International Women’s Day, we honor these and other women who work tirelessly to preserve our American values. Happy International Women’s Day! Thank you, Oregon Republican Party
---
---

name: Katie Porter
subject: Bad for consumers, workers, and business
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39504%2E3422442%2Eb8ZS1c)
Derek,
On the campaign trail, Donald Trump _talked_ about strengthening our economy, but in office, his chaotic _actions_ have set our country back.
He’s announced tariffs, then delayed them, then announced them again, then delayed them again. He’s fired federal workers, then rehired them, only to fire them again.
That is no way to govern.
Yes, Trump’s policies are misguided and harmful. But also, the chaos itself is damaging.
Consumers can’t be smart shoppers when prices can jump or fall at any moment. Workers lose productivity and morale when they could be laid off for no apparent reason. Businesses struggle to operate when their supply chains could be cut off at Donald Trump’s whim.
Every sector of our economy depends on our government to foster a consistent business environment. That’s why consumers and companies alike are losing confidence—even as some of Trump’s most harmful tariffs have yet to be implemented.
We need Congress to be a check on President Trump’s dysfunction, but the Republican majorities we have right now care more about appeasing Donald Trump than delivering for the American people.
**[Will you support my organization, Truth to Power, which is working to elect Democrats across the country, who will put families first and demand accountability from government?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250308-2?refcode=em20250308-39504&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39504_3422442_b8ZS1c&akid=39504%2E3422442%2Eb8ZS1c)**
More soon,
Katie

Former U.S. Congresswoman Katie Porter founded Truth to Power to support the campaigns of her fellow Democrats. Truth to Power supports candidates who will stand up to Donald Trump, fight to lower costs, and protect the environment. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20250308-39504&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39504_3422442_b8ZS1c&akid=39504%2E3422442%2Eb8ZS1c)**

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39504%2E3422442%2Eb8ZS1c).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

body:
Stay in the fight against MAGA extremism — chip in now!
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103500738/532363097/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlNjFiNWU1LTU3ZmMtZWYxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rmzkXti0d6JVDwIFAdsNYa0quxRlVVvzpH3VcA9pjQ0=&emci=3ddaeaa5-96fb-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2e61b5e5-57fc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=8431045)

Peter, we are witnessing MAGA extremists steamroll our democracy in an all-out attempt to destroy the federal government. Mass layoffs of critical government workers. Purges of dissenting views. Systematic dismantling of essential services for millions of people in the U.S. and across the globe. Blocking key media outlets from the White House. **Our nation’s founding democratic principles are facing an existential threat — and we must treat this moment with the urgency it demands.** Every day, all of us at the NDRC and our affiliates are working on the front lines of the fight for our democracy. [**Chip in now to help fuel this fight >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103500739/532363098/469381263?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_MTest_email_20250308-NDRC-Tier1-MTest_A&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250308-NDRC-Tier1-MTest_A&utm_campaign=MTest&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlNjFiNWU1LTU3ZmMtZWYxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rmzkXti0d6JVDwIFAdsNYa0quxRlVVvzpH3VcA9pjQ0=) Nobody voted for major cuts to health care, or fewer air traffic controllers, or the withholding of food for starving children. **The ongoing assault on our government is a symptom of larger anti-democratic efforts — which include calculated efforts to create an unfair political advantage through gerrymandered maps.** Remember, Republicans’ majority in the House is just three seats — the same number that Republicans gained in North Carolina after a new, Republican-drawn map was used in the last election. With margins so slim, every action we take and every resource we gather can make a meaningful difference in the fight for our democracy. **The work we do today will help stop the harm being done by Trump and his enablers in the next round of elections — and beyond.** We must be able to fund efforts to ensure fair maps across the entire country — from upcoming redistricting in Ohio to key state legislature and judicial races that will have lasting ramifications for our elections. [**Your contribution right now — whatever you can afford — will go right to work fueling our daily fight for a fairer, more representative democracy across the country. Donate now!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103500740/532363099/469381263?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_MTest_email_20250308-NDRC-Tier1-MTest_A&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250308-NDRC-Tier1-MTest_A&utm_campaign=MTest&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlNjFiNWU1LTU3ZmMtZWYxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rmzkXti0d6JVDwIFAdsNYa0quxRlVVvzpH3VcA9pjQ0=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Stay in the fight against MAGA extremism — chip in now! | Peter, we are witnessing MAGA extremists steamroll our democracy in an all-out attempt to destroy the federal government. Mass layoffs of critical government workers. Purges of dissenting views. Systematic dismantling of essential services for millions of people in the U.S. and across the globe. Blocking key media outlets from the White House. Our nation’s founding democratic principles are facing an existential threat — and we must treat this moment with the urgency it demands. Every day, all of us at the NDRC and our affiliates are working on the front lines of the fight for our democracy. = Nobody voted for major cuts to health care, or fewer air traffic controllers, or the withholding of food for starving children. The ongoing assault on our government is a symptom of larger anti-democratic efforts — which include calculated efforts to create an unfair political advantage through gerrymandered maps. Remember, Republicans’ majority in the House is just three seats — the same number that Republicans gained in North Carolina after a new, Republican-drawn map was used in the last election. With margins so slim, every action we take and every resource we gather can make a meaningful difference in the fight for our democracy. The work we do today will help stop the harm being done by Trump and his enablers in the next round of elections — and beyond. We must be able to fund efforts to ensure fair maps across the entire country — from upcoming redistricting in Ohio to key state legislature and judicial races that will have lasting ramifications for our elections. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks for everything you do to defend our democracy. — Biz John Bisognano President National Democratic Redistricting Committee = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. # [#]
Peter, Texas’s public education is suffering under Republican leadership. That’s why we need your help to organize, enfranchise voters, and elect progressives. Before we get into what’s going on, can you chip in any amount now to help us lead the charge? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-march25?amount=10]

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

DONATE $10 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-march25?amount=10&express_lane=true] DONATE $ » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-march25?amount=&express_lane=true]

DONATE $ » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-march25?amount=&express_lane=true] OTHER AMOUNT » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-march25]

Here’s what you need to know:

Trump is considering slashing the U.S. Department of Education.
A Texas lawmaker just filed a bill to abolish the Texas Education Agency.
Texas Republicans are slashing funding for our public schools.

We need your help to send a message to the GOP that Texans are fired up and ready to fight for our teachers and students. Our education agencies and public schools are VITAL to educating future generations.

Not just that, but those agencies and schools are what help ensure ALL Texans have access to quality, affordable education regardless of race, income, gender, preferred language, or ZIP Code. And here at TOP PAC, that’s what we’re all about.

So Peter, will you stand with us to show your support for Texas’ public schools, the Department of Education and the Texas Education Agency? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-march25?amount=10]

STAND WITH US [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-march25?amount=10]

It’s absurd that adequately funding education is even a question. Thanks for taking action.

–Texas Organizing Project PAC

name: Johnny O
subject: The Math Isn't Mathing

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3]
WBAL Radio: Congressman Olszewski criticizes President Trump’s policies
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP47/1/105827/images/wbal%20logo.png]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP47/1/105827/images/Screenshot%202025-03-08%20124918.png]

You know Johnny. He calls it like he sees it.
So when President Trump tells the American public that he can cut taxes for billionaires without touching the programs the rest of us need – like Social Security, Medicare and Medicaid – Johnny isn't going to just let it go.
“The math isn’t mathing,” he tweeted during Trump’s record-long address to Congress last week, catching the attention of local media.
Check out WBAL radio’s full coverage of Johnny O's direct and honest speech response here. [https://www.wbal.com/the-math-isnt-mathing-rep-olszewski-criticizes-president-trumps-policies-during-address-to-congress]
You can bet Johnny will keep pushing back against President Trump and extreme Republicans' exaggerations and deceptions, like their claims of a balanced budget that adds $2 trillion to the federal deficit. But he needs your help.
Please consider contributing to Johnny's campaign so he can keep reality-checking President Trump and arm our fellow Americans with the facts. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3]

name: Trump Alert via azdem.org
subject: Trump is trying to cut $250 million from Arizona’s medical research
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103501151/532364388/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250308_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDQyNTk2NTAtNThmYy1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fvbC9Tx5T8135r-Nh1O_TqW9js8upMQo18tSxeNM_7s=)
---
Donald Trump and his allies have proposed a federal budget that would slash more than $250 million in grants to Arizona’s universities and research institutions. If they succeed in making these cuts, vital research could grind to a halt. These cuts would stop researchers from working on treatments for Alzheimer’s, asthma, opioid addiction, and hearing loss. Scientists improving brain scanning technology and working on cancer prevention could lose funding. Governor Katie Hobbs and Attorney General Kris Mayes are pushing back against these devastating cuts, but they need your support to keep up the fight. **The stakes are high** — these cuts would devastate Arizona’s top research institutions, including the University of Arizona, Arizona State University, and the Mayo Clinic, putting groundbreaking work in jeopardy and setting our scientific community back. [**Can you pitch in today to help us support Arizona Democrats as they fight to block these reckless cuts and defend the future of medical research in the Copper State?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103501152/532364389/-94917156?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250308_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDQyNTk2NTAtNThmYy1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fvbC9Tx5T8135r-Nh1O_TqW9js8upMQo18tSxeNM_7s=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103501153/532364390/-94917156?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250308_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDQyNTk2NTAtNThmYy1lZjExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fvbC9Tx5T8135r-Nh1O_TqW9js8upMQo18tSxeNM_7s=)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Turn America back to Godly values
body:
Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3eac593977af48218e520713e796f2c6&_e=YRsQKZkCEroAdxUt_W6hxxvYQWVEbzgxb2c29muSPVvXFM3q0O6yPYfDDlp6ubhyeffs3_fGfkv7ku-_LCLBJVLCsOMNZXqVDBjLNxxT8SeYQXP4u2aPKJX0U_5Ilzj1DF5J75BDyb5JaUT2cOqMCWUp7sSrSw2gqHbhD9V9HQWaN5KuJcLvQ9PhX9XLp3skM50PIe3jcdRvtXzQ_QYkWklCLZ8tAhgT7mzXxGXbUI2K6krVFFekN79ZaSCHPcjwg96kRdwQLmZ6RhJVDxtSt_-QjtBDLsSJMvz55TqO58V7jKibxWWsfj7UPZqTPtzadrochnIz9VxOx_yDLY9EJV2ztX3ZK-XtW-s-vKaLMvQI_pa6tCf1nrV-dbF_O6m1)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3eac593977af48218e520713e796f2c6&_e=YRsQKZkCEroAdxUt_W6hxxvYQWVEbzgxb2c29muSPVvXFM3q0O6yPYfDDlp6ubhyeffs3_fGfkv7ku-_LCLBJVLCsOMNZXqVDBjLNxxT8SeYQXP4u2aPKJX0U_5Ilzj1DF5J75BDyb5JaUT2cOqMCWUp7sSrSw2gqHbhD9V9HQWaN5KuJcLvQ9PhX9XLp3skM50PIe3jcdRvtXzQ_QYkWklCLZ8tAhgT7mzXxGXbUI3oitmarQukntPt19qiYpQZzlZQCIQ8i7CD18L4jGWOs4lxoQIyb_2SEjzfylW2erpVOnWGmJ2gIbXIQUDzPxxElZWFHUJeKdXMAVXU9om0PMoLWni0VFe8DkKnxg3UQHAyAG5Aovu2UnCU1yJXEp-h)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3eac593977af48218e520713e796f2c6&_e=YRsQKZkCEroAdxUt_W6hxxvYQWVEbzgxb2c29muSPVvXFM3q0O6yPYfDDlp6ubhyeffs3_fGfkv7ku-_LCLBJVLCsOMNZXqVDBjLNxxT8SeYQXP4u2aPKJX0U_5Ilzj1DF5J75BDyb5JaUT2cOqMCWUp7sSrSw2gqHbhD9V9HQWaN5KuJcLvQ9PhX9XLp3skM50PIe3jcdRvtXzQ_QYkWklCLZ8tAhgT7mzXxGXbUI0oYrOWkHyNDTCjDrGKfFcDlKgsxkkJjRrI7UUsj57rCEodn8U6S72rVZ19lOeXhamz14ysr6ltoJNhGyfYEVWneHf6GodPCHlJXYcgx5kz2PeE-bLuPxZ6SFCLCkg3l53GEMAmrk2bXJoA7KljVUcp) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3eac593977af48218e520713e796f2c6&_e=YRsQKZkCEroAdxUt_W6hxxvYQWVEbzgxb2c29muSPVvXFM3q0O6yPYfDDlp6ubhyeffs3_fGfkv7ku-_LCLBJVLCsOMNZXqVDBjLNxxT8SeYQXP4u2aPKJX0U_5Ilzj1DF5J75BDyb5JaUT2cOqMCWUp7sSrSw2gqHbhD9V9HQWaN5KuJcLvQ9PhX9XLp3skM50PIe3jcdRvtXzQ_QYkWklCLZ8tAhgT7mzXxGXbUI0vNNMOhalWKoUkUSelhuq_jPX6RXOSsIFb2U3IqhuKBfzgV0LNTHOsM8-yOaDArmozG1blgZp9dyMUF7Bw12J9DZvqbMrD4mq-OkTWFTNlPBJa1nEEZbS7Jh7OwsixzRic7V1VvXB5zSQ6-goDGI1W)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3eac593977af48218e520713e796f2c6&_e=YRsQKZkCEroAdxUt_W6hxxvYQWVEbzgxb2c29muSPVvXFM3q0O6yPYfDDlp6ubhyeffs3_fGfkv7ku-_LCLBJVLCsOMNZXqVDBjLNxxT8SeYQXP4u2aPKJX0U_5Ilzj1DF5J75BDyb5JaUT2cOqMCWUp7sSrSw2gqHbhD9V9HQWaN5KuJcLvQ9PhX9XLp3skM50PIe3jcdRvtXzQ_QYkWklCLZ8tAhgT7mzXxGXbUI1vxBhCW-76PSEaNg1Qq77EhIa5d2N5DphdLe3qCvbxhptdm9WUh5uSMB8mamtN7cxAjJmw2ldAxjzNKjSZAw73okbkXyaJMvja9dI-SA2WL--9Rpx9L8A2h4Imp3-h3PX8Tb9w4IaXyPTYPUn4Vx0X)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3eac593977af48218e520713e796f2c6&_e=YRsQKZkCEroAdxUt_W6hxxvYQWVEbzgxb2c29muSPVvXFM3q0O6yPYfDDlp6ubhyeffs3_fGfkv7ku-_LCLBJVLCsOMNZXqVDBjLNxxT8SeYQXP4u2aPKJX0U_5Ilzj1DF5J75BDyb5JaUT2cOqMCWUp7sSrSw2gqHbhD9V9HQWaN5KuJcLvQ9PhX9XLp3skM50PIe3jcdRvtXzQ_QYkWklCLZ8tAhgT7mzXxGXbUI1f5cUv1IzUrBQKLQ7RQ2Onc2q47192VXdpLdqfh3yNIJEgrjDnHLeOvkV4YTAt1EhzcP5MOPuQDp-LPIXwHQyRrr3v2JLvuQ7PZ3hLHvJkUSwUsQrkLviYYXfNUnc9m2NQGUalZ1GyQPmK5T8xMvqH)

---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)****Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|

name: =?utf-8?B?Li4uIEZvciBUcnVtcOKAmXMgVGFyaWZmcw==?=
subject: YOU ARE NEXT...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/70756F655332783372636F454353396562687376694F485948735343712B763672586D4157707A676459726C636F6733786F6E2B526572766D6752546567474F/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-10%20at%208.23.20%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Friend,
Donald Trump promised to put America first , but his reckless tariffs have done nothing but raise prices on working families. These tariffs are hidden taxes—costs that get passed down to you every time you go grocery shopping, fill up your gas tank, or buy essential goods.
I’ll be honest, I am falling behind thanks to his deep pockets, but with your support we can show the GOP our love for our country and state run deeper. With just 23 days to go, will you help me?
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/4B51524A67654964665837454843716F686571364972354B7254774642307573563876675A556666544A72434F39385942505A65613176754D4A51535A585275/editor_images/IMG_0194.jpg]
Here’s the truth:
Higher Prices – Tariffs on imported goods mean everyday essentials cost more , from food to appliances.
Florida’s Economy Suffers – Farmers and small businesses in our district are struggling as retaliatory tariffs limit their ability to compete.
Job Losses – Manufacturing and trade disruptions have put hardworking Americans out of work.
While Trump and his allies push policies that hurt Florida families, I’m fighting for an economy that works for everyone , not just the wealthy few. We need trade policies that protect American jobs without punishing consumers.
If you agree, I need your support. Chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today to help us stand up for real economic solutions that put Florida families first. We are running out of time to make this happen. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/4B51524A67654964665837454843716F686571364972354B7254774642307573563876675A556666544A72434F39385942505A65613176754D4A51535A585275/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-02-01%20at%201.25.14%E2%80%AFPM.png]
It’s time to send leaders to Washington who fight for us , not for Trump’s failed policies. Let’s win this together.
Onward,

clean_body: [] Friend, Donald Trump promised to put America first , but his reckless tariffs have done nothing but raise prices on working families. These tariffs are hidden taxes—costs that get passed down to you every time you go grocery shopping, fill up your gas tank, or buy essential goods. I’ll be honest, I am falling behind thanks to his deep pockets, but with your support we can show the GOP our love for our country and state run deeper. With just 23 days to go, will you help me? [] Here’s the truth: Higher Prices – Tariffs on imported goods mean everyday essentials cost more , from food to appliances. Florida’s Economy Suffers – Farmers and small businesses in our district are struggling as retaliatory tariffs limit their ability to compete. Job Losses – Manufacturing and trade disruptions have put hardworking Americans out of work. While Trump and his allies push policies that hurt Florida families, I’m fighting for an economy that works for everyone , not just the wealthy few. We need trade policies that protect American jobs without punishing consumers. If you agree, I need your support. Chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today to help us stand up for real economic solutions that put Florida families first. We are running out of time to make this happen. [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Express Donate: $5 [] Express Donate: $10 [] Express Donate: $25 [] Express Donate: $100 [] Or, donate another amount [] [] It’s time to send leaders to Washington who fight for us , not for Trump’s failed policies. Let’s win this together. Onward, Gay Valimont Candidate for FL-1 [] Paid For By Gay Valimont Gay Valimont For Congress PO Box 1258 Gulf Breeze, FL 32562 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Are you interested in attending a nonviolent resistance training with Pramila?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Pramila will be hosting a series of nonviolent resistance trainings, both in-person and virtual, in the near future.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250308-4834-footer&t=1&akid=4834%2E420207%2EbL6o_H)
Peter,
With the Trump administration taking a hard line against the people’s right to peacefully protest, it’s more important than ever to know the law and understand your rights if you choose to speak up and make your voice heard.
**That’s why Pramila will be hosting a series of nonviolent resistance trainings, both in-person and virtual, in the near future.**
[**If you’re interested in attending, click here to let us know and we’ll get back to you with the details as soon as possible.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em-20250308-resistance-lab-interest-form/?source=em20250308-4834&akid=4834%2E420207%2EbL6o_H)
**[I’m interested! 🙋🏽♀️](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em-20250308-resistance-lab-interest-form/?source=em20250308-4834&akid=4834%2E420207%2EbL6o_H)**
We saw just how far Donald Trump was willing to go in his first term, when he repeatedly suggested shooting at peaceful demonstrators who dared to speak out against him.
Now that he’s back in office and supported by pliant MAGA majorities in Congress, there are even fewer guardrails to stop him — which makes understanding your rights all the more critical.
[**So Peter, if you want to make sure you’re notified when we host our next training, click here to let us know.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em-20250308-resistance-lab-interest-form/?source=em20250308-4834&akid=4834%2E420207%2EbL6o_H)
More updates soon,
Jayapal HQ
**P.S. — Can’t attend a training but still want to support Pramila’s work for the progressive movement?[Click here to pitch in $3 or whatever works for you today. All of our work is powered by this grassroots team — NOT corporate PACs and billionaires.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/48623?refcode=em20250308-4834&amount=3&t=2&akid=4834%2E420207%2EbL6o_H)

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Dear Reader,**It wasn 't long ago that The New York Sun, one of my favorite papers, became the exclusive publisher of my columns. ****In the short time that 's passed, the Sun's mission has become more urgent than ever.****
**
---
[**Join the Sun for 1 ¢ ->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7271e9f2532b412e8138aa250190fcb5&_e=riRjwO6EpUK8uz7VPuc10alrlJuL_FXDHLejJ2TU7-IXC0rbxFLgvk_-NCJj22eZxx3T8NIBB-pnlM_RoTsCwnIPr7FMABW62Ongso82w-tqikchqETEktvqaN1AXgsqQLKBbGglcb8JH3zxlA9lvKbe8fBftYqWZpGlO5hQiO3FuJbnJY2aw0K3T7P1aXAFlsvoTcjcN1S_L51dtyXkvyni6o26V6LlaRxGU5ct9LQk1-uek0WoLlBsUKOHOe-VivIAWD88bVmka3tMfBvhOXk5LZodyFvYe4t1M__uWbnj6gRLvAzjLA5K3qABNKqL5RJ2sGJxRQIZk2juiPthIaafbkRX943QzsD87OldLJxJZz8qbBmTdE9cSd3frjJRFokcT92zG8Tu4Ae8KYlgSp5UpxBug8o4fhHw0YfhLhA%3D)
---
It's been obvious to many of us for some time that journalism in our country has become corrupted.

More dangerous than the ideological implication is the fact that we're left with precious few to hold our country's most powerful institutions to account. Our justice system, law enforcement, universities, major corporations and government agencies have become politicized beyond recognition and act with impunity.

The Sun is brave and relentless.Every day it tackles head-on the most important issues facing our country. It truly holds the powerful to account.

It acts as a true newspaper should, in the service of traditional American values and the American people.

The Sun has a long history leading the charge. Its commitment to the finest journalistic standards goes all the way back to its founding in 1833.

The Sun is now growing at a rapid pace, but we're up against some of the world's largest media conglomerates. To win, we need you to join us. Every single person counts.
---

body:
We held our first tele-town hall for folks in Washington’s 6th District last week. A whopping 16,542 people joined!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103502270/532368246/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.03.08_TownHall_Wider&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDczNzBiZS01ZWZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FEjEI6QUUGeCxgUSS_uG6CgWt5UqXPfw18O3AeFpxUA=&emci=6f7b9bb5-59fc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=547370be-5efc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=23483442) | Peter, I have two quick updates for you: 1.) Then, on Tuesday night, Emily hosted a livestream with five members of our community who are experiencing the Trump-Musk agenda firsthand. [_**You can watch the full video on Facebook →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103502274/532368250/-1439612395?mibextid=wwXIfr&rdid=8bnFSVf2dBfWRdjo&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.03.08_TownHall_Wider&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDczNzBiZS01ZWZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FEjEI6QUUGeCxgUSS_uG6CgWt5UqXPfw18O3AeFpxUA=&emci=6f7b9bb5-59fc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=547370be-5efc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=23483442) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103502275/532368251/-1439612395?mibextid=wwXIfr&rdid=8bnFSVf2dBfWRdjo&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.03.08_TownHall_Wider&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDczNzBiZS01ZWZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FEjEI6QUUGeCxgUSS_uG6CgWt5UqXPfw18O3AeFpxUA=&emci=6f7b9bb5-59fc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=547370be-5efc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=23483442) [WATCH THE LIVESTREAM](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103502276/532368252/-1439612395?mibextid=wwXIfr&rdid=8bnFSVf2dBfWRdjo&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.03.08_TownHall_Wider&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDczNzBiZS01ZWZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FEjEI6QUUGeCxgUSS_uG6CgWt5UqXPfw18O3AeFpxUA=&emci=6f7b9bb5-59fc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=547370be-5efc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=23483442) In a time of fear and division, we must recognize folks like Dana, Ashley, Mary, Tiera, and Tony – neighbors from all walks of life who serve vital, unsung roles in our communities. I’ll continue to provide as much information as possible via email, social media, and upcoming in-person town hall events.** Thank you for all you do 💙 — Emily

clean_body: We held our first tele-town hall for folks in Washington’s 6th District last week. A whopping 16,542 people joined! | Peter, I have two quick updates for you: 1.) We held our first tele-town hall for folks in Washington’s 6th District last week. A whopping 16,542 people joined! We covered a range of topics: Medicaid, money in politics, mental healthcare, protecting public lands, and the steps we can take to stand up for our neighbors under attack from this administration. 2.) Then, on Tuesday night, Emily hosted a livestream with five members of our community who are experiencing the Trump-Musk agenda firsthand. In a time of fear and division, we must recognize folks like Dana, Ashley, Mary, Tiera, and Tony – neighbors from all walks of life who serve vital, unsung roles in our communities. Many of our neighbors are facing fear and uncertainty about the Republican agenda, especially the firings of federal workers and the proposed cuts to Medicaid. I’m committed to running a transparent, responsive, community-centered office. I’ll continue to provide as much information as possible via email, social media, and upcoming in-person town hall events. Thank you for all you do 💙 — Emily = | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. Box 1883 Port Orchard, WA 98366 United States | | If you would like to receive only our most important messages, . If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Are you with me in the fight?
body:
Earlier this week I gave the official response to Trump's speech — here's what I said. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103502595/532369580/2053923391?refcode=WUEFH320_20250308_SlotkinSplit_PL&sourceid=1055790&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTkwNDc0Yy02MGZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8TyhJSVKVSwBRlXuSjytW_u7zB1s58rOijcKmczgTo8=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103502596/532369581/2053923391?refcode=WUEFH320_20250308_SlotkinSplit_PL&sourceid=1055790&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTkwNDc0Yy02MGZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8TyhJSVKVSwBRlXuSjytW_u7zB1s58rOijcKmczgTo8=) Hi everyone. Senator Elissa Slotkin here.

Earlier this week, I gave the official response to President Trump's Joint Address. I hope you had a chance to watch.

Since I'm a stranger to most people who don't follow politics, I introduced myself and just kept it straight with the people watching about the moment we are in right now.

We just went through another fraught election season. Americans made it clear that they want change. But there is a responsible way to make change, and a reckless way. And, we can make that change without forgetting who we are as a country, and as a democracy.

Because no matter where you live, most Americans share three core beliefs: That the middle class is the engine of our country. That strong national security protects us from harm. And that our democracy, no matter how messy, is unparalleled and worth fighting for.

We all know that our country is going through something right now. We're not sure what the next day is going to hold, let alone the next decade.

But this isn't the first time we've experienced this as a country. Every single time, we've gotten through those moments because of two things: Engaged citizens and principled leaders.

If you're with me in that fight, I have an ask of you:

[**Can you split a contribution between my campaign and EMILYs List to help us elect a new generation of leaders who put country first?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103502600/532369583/2053923391?refcode=WUEFH320_20250308_SlotkinSplit_PL&sourceid=1055790&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTkwNDc0Yy02MGZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8TyhJSVKVSwBRlXuSjytW_u7zB1s58rOijcKmczgTo8=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103502601/532369590/2053923391?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=WUEFH320_20250308_SlotkinSplit_PL&sourceid=1055790&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTkwNDc0Yy02MGZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8TyhJSVKVSwBRlXuSjytW_u7zB1s58rOijcKmczgTo8=) | [DONATE $35](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103502602/532369591/2053923391?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=WUEFH320_20250308_SlotkinSplit_PL&sourceid=1055790&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTkwNDc0Yy02MGZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8TyhJSVKVSwBRlXuSjytW_u7zB1s58rOijcKmczgTo8=)

name: Team Thompson
subject: Standing up for working families
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://support
body:
---
| | Peter — did you see Mike’s important note? Republicans in Congress want us to slash the budget of Medicaid, SNAP, and other essential services to fund their tax cuts for the mega-rich.

**_[Help us stand up for working families. Read more from Mike below and click here to sign our petition before tonight at midnight>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103502738/532370044/1517430067?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20250307_PT_Healthcare_0_New_TeamThompson_NA_NA_Healthcare2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDg2MDgxOC02MWZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WB677AsDEhzDk4wB5vnndjDaV_T4gcwRbtGxcIFH2lY=&emci=f5850818-61fc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=04860818-61fc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2678920)_**
* * *
**_Begin forwarded message:_**
Peter,

The House Republicans' budget is set to dismantle Medicaid and SNAP benefits in favor of giving tax cuts to the ultra rich. Families across the country will suffer as food costs rise and health care disappears for their children.

My fellow Democrats and I are doing our best to prevent these crucial services from being gutted.

**_[If you stand with us, click here to sign our petition in support of Medicaid and other essential services.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103502739/532370045/1517430067?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20250307_PT_Healthcare_0_New_TeamThompson_NA_NA_Healthcare2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDg2MDgxOC02MWZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WB677AsDEhzDk4wB5vnndjDaV_T4gcwRbtGxcIFH2lY=&emci=f5850818-61fc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=04860818-61fc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2678920)_** **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103502740/532370046/1517430067?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20250307_PT_Healthcare_0_New_TeamThompson_NA_NA_Healthcare2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDg2MDgxOC02MWZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WB677AsDEhzDk4wB5vnndjDaV_T4gcwRbtGxcIFH2lY=&emci=f5850818-61fc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=04860818-61fc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2678920)**
50 percent of American children depend on Medicaid for healthcare and SNAP benefits provide food for families that would otherwise go hungry. Working families cannot afford to lose the $880 billion from Medicaid and $320 billion from SNAP that House Republicans want to cut.

Republicans in Congress are in the business of making the rich, richer and keeping the sick, sicker. I will continue to fight for these critical programs, but I need you by my side.

**_[We must act NOW. Please sign our petition to defend Medicaid and other vital programs from cuts by far-right extremists before tomorrow at midnight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103502741/532370047/1517430067?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20250307_PT_Healthcare_0_New_TeamThompson_NA_NA_Healthcare2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDg2MDgxOC02MWZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WB677AsDEhzDk4wB5vnndjDaV_T4gcwRbtGxcIFH2lY=&emci=f5850818-61fc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=04860818-61fc-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2678920)_**

Thank you for your support,

Mike Thompson

Republicans in Congress want us to slash the budget of Medicaid, SNAP, and other essential services to fund their tax cuts for the mega-rich. Begin forwarded message: Peter, The House Republicans' budget is set to dismantle Medicaid and SNAP benefits in favor of giving tax cuts to the ultra rich. Families across the country will suffer as food costs rise and health care disappears for their children. My fellow Democrats and I are doing our best to prevent these crucial services from being gutted. 50 percent of American children depend on Medicaid for healthcare and SNAP benefits provide food for families that would otherwise go hungry. Working families cannot afford to lose the $880 billion from Medicaid and $320 billion from SNAP that House Republicans want to cut. Republicans in Congress are in the business of making the rich, richer and keeping the sick, sicker. I will continue to fight for these critical programs, but I need you by my side. ** Thank you for your support, Mike Thompson | Authorized & Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress Mike Thompson for Congress PO Box 10541 Napa, CA 94581 United States

name: Board President David Canepa
subject: Big News Drops Soon—Don’t Miss It!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463**
body:
| | | | [ ](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=9920542b39&e=c0babbc643)
---
| | | Dear Friend,

I hope this note finds you well and that your 2025 is off to a great start.

I am honored to have recently been elected President of the San Mateo County Board of Supervisors.

As I reflect on my work serving San Mateo County, I am grateful for your continued support in helping me achieve so much for our community. Together, we’ve worked to address critical priorities like public safety, housing affordability, and ensuring equitable access to services for all.

While my current role has allowed me to make a meaningful impact, I know there is still more work to be done. As I look toward the future and the opportunities ahead, I would love to have your continued support. Your encouragement, ideas, and generosity have always been invaluable, and they will continue to help drive the success of my future endeavors.

** [David Canepa — Donate via ActBlue](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=95d8b43340&e=c0babbc643)**

Thank you again for your partnership and for believing in my vision. I look forward to continuing to serve you and our community in the years ahead.

In friendship,

David Canepa
Board President, San Mateo County

P.S. Please expect a call from me soon so we can discuss your priorities for the new year and how I can best represent them.

[](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=407540344f&e=c0babbc643) **Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463**

Peter —
A brand-new poll just dropped, and here's the situation: The Wisconsin Supreme Court race that will decide the ideological balance of the bench is wide open. Most voters still don't know much about the candidates, which means the next few weeks will determine everything.
And right on cue, MAGA billionaires are making their move. Elon Musk and his allies are pouring money into this race to try to buy the seat for Republican Brad Schimel. Why? Because Wisconsin's Supreme Court is one of the last checks on Donald Trump's MAGA agenda. If they flip this seat, it opens the door for them to dismantle voting rights, attack reproductive freedom, and do whatever it takes to tip the scales for the 2026 election through gerrymandering.
Here's the good news: Voters understand that this race matters. But they need to hear from us before it's too late. If we don't reach them now—Schimel and his allies will fill in the blanks with their own narrative.
This is the moment to act. We have just four weeks to fight against this tidal wave of Elon Musk's spending and ensure voters know the truth. This week, Trump addressed a joint session of Congress on the state of our union, and spewed lies about how "great" a president he's been.

[**We need to know, team, how would you grade Donald Trump as Commander-in-Chief?](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60106?t=4&akid=22909%2E4449941%2EfJ85PV)** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60106?t=5&akid=22909%2E4449941%2EfJ85PV)

---
Look, you know Trump is unhinged, but look at what exactly he's done in just his first weeks:
1. Threatened to invade THREE different countries.

2. Threatened to annex Canada and make it the 51st state.

3. Slapped 25% tariffs on Canada and Mexico.

4. Worked to dismantle USAID's critical work across the world.

5. Attacked the State Department's work on human rights around the world.

6. Paused crucial military aid to Ukraine after Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy spoke up against Trump and Vance lies and bully tactics at the White House

_Trump 's careless antics are absolutely destroying America's reputation, which could have material and economic impacts that would be devastating for everyday Americans!_

We think that Donald Trump is the **WORST** Commander-in-Chief we've seen in modern history.

But, we have no clue what Democrats in your area think?!
[**Confirm: How would you grade Donald Trump as Commander-in-Chief?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60106?t=11&akid=22909%2E4449941%2EfJ85PV)

name: Kerry McQuisten (Newsletter)
subject: "Oregon Rising" Debuts!
body:
| | | | |
# Announcing... OREGON RISING!
---
| |
---
_The debut header for Issue 1 of the Oregon Conservative Caucus newsletter. Each month will feature a different header with a piece of art depicting some part of our beautiful state._
---
| Since my last newsletter, I've been very focused on catching up with publishing company work and building the Oregon Conservative Caucus (OCC).
Within my company, Black Lyon Publishing LLC, two of my authors (Steven B. Epstein and C.J. Wynn) have recently appeared multiple times on national TV - _Dateline, Oxygen..._ I'm pretty proud of them. My 13-year-old finished her homeschool year early yesterday and graduated from Jr. High with a 4.0. I'm very proud of her as well.
As to the Oregon Conservative Caucus - our organization is SOARING. We have no infighting. We have no grifting. Our members are amazing people, and I value every one of them. We debuted our newsletter, OREGON RISING, a couple days ago. (Michael Stoffey, who heads up our Social Media Committee, came up with the name! Thank you!) Since then, we've added members to a 26th county and signed up literally hundreds more to our email list. We've begun targeting Tillamook County with advertising as we're SO CLOSE to flipping that county back to red again. If you or someone you know became a NAV or IND in the past couple years, I've listened when you told me your reasons. I know many of you were/are disillusioned with the party apparatus both inside Oregon and nationally. I get it. The RNC is under much better leadership now, President Trump is in the White House, and OCC is focused on Oregon's grassroots voters and the conservative policies that are good for all of us. Please consider registering Republican again!
I'll keep the rest short and sweet. **If you want to see what OCC has concretely achieved, click the button.** I think you'll be surprised and hopefully ... inspired. We are the ground game.

---

name: DLCC Membership Team
subject: What happens if a grassroots Democrat doesn’tactivate their 2025 membership?
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
We’ll cut straight to the chase – without you on our team, we can’t invest in state races. If we can’t invest, then we can’t compete. And if we can’t compete? We can’t win. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**What happens if a grassroots Democrat doesn’t activate their 2025 membership?** ****
1. Our DLCC membership team will stay stagnant at just over 9,000 members – which won’t be nearly enough to counteract right-wing billionaires’ spending.
2. State Democrats in places like your state and beyond won’t have the resources they need to compete against our opponents in upcoming special elections.
3. Expanding economic opportunity, protecting workers’ rights, and building a better future for people like you will become much, _much_ more difficult if Republicans keep amassing power.

**Listen, all you really need to know is this:** Without you on our team, we can’t invest in state legislative races. If we can’t invest, then we can’t compete. And if we can’t compete? _We can’t win._ [It’s simple – we need you to join the ranks of 9,000+ grassroots members who are fighting to ensure state Democrats have the tools they need to fight back against a MAGA takeover in the states. Will you chip in $10 to become a 2025 member today? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxD-0Fr2Pgyy2ET802uj5Jd3_xWUkFQxz3Yu6kq72YbN7jJmeUYQcHpOgkMwIPT1GWgsSY9CUptqlykR4hnI2gaTe1d5gOaaKiIdGoLQ7aP3_9f2Anmz4q3aoCsDs1a3r1lY3Z95CBwN6009G_rjYmkAUb1X6vIUEZIHVuWmoAJocnKLQTnW7AAFXXu2vo_aJ8tZiaNrEC6jvkfUn1avmGVtfQfopNDTUd-KJ85c1HB6dElW8e64Hp55K2aCnuPfCTS7JReyKn998sjXwApz3oeQvDw_Takj7mjQhbNH4Pv_HIHlH6-jzABzrGXmw0iz1qsSkotH9NrPdbKX5mL2j0z-SxBqFpF3oh77ewa8DHxBzCI3yNX9Eb8oIvY0_xfq5Vmx0JL7jGJfg5XTbCAOQ3sopeLtUTLouQvZ2cVlEFVNUwibqHnBir1REwTzLLHqoxMmRUOGmf5BuMfk_JWSK_A8skj5-FnLEE2G5RV8rqk3b01GK8DTR-rV2ptuFA1oxD8ZAfdxPixQkOXqkHFgWb1iUWRxhBZG5ZXVzISCM_rEJ2KC-wq7HPu6LoWmLUGxdxiLg08R5BdfNejjmDA25lTOVHhEIPF1T_uWluVVSIkidle1tURPTbW91aRoYBTLBb9nEZvLRMNhgGI75vp4Xa7yMbARQqC-jXAr0M2GHPBtHUDKy4BSKQzKayAlpZW5TPH1DjXdoZKBTgrxGc630r49g/4em/LGftXDFgRhmVKU7Kb2nOhA/h0/h001.7YQ2BkYCwuBM-SRACK5A5Fv6aCnbO_7sTGUy8QHxke0) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: We’ll cut straight to the chase – without you on our team, we can’t invest in state races. If we can’t invest, then we can’t compete. And if we can’t compete? We can’t win. | | | | | ---|--- What happens if a grassroots Democrat doesn’t activate their 2025 membership? ** 1. Our DLCC membership team will stay stagnant at just over 9,000 members – which won’t be nearly enough to counteract right-wing billionaires’ spending. 2. State Democrats in places like your state and beyond won’t have the resources they need to compete against our opponents in upcoming special elections. 3. Expanding economic opportunity, protecting workers’ rights, and building a better future for people like you will become much, much more difficult if Republicans keep amassing power. Listen, all you really need to know is this: Without you on our team, we can’t invest in state legislative races. If we can’t invest, then we can’t compete. And if we can’t compete? We can’t win. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | We can’t wait to see your name pop up on our membership list. Team, Donald Trump has given Elon Musk the green light to SLASH government funding -- **and he's setting his sights on PBS.**

For decades, PBS has brought free, impartial, educational programming into homes across the country. From Mr. Rogers to Big Bird to The News Hour and so much more, it's had an INCALCULABLE positive impact on our society. **But Trump wants cuts that would start closing down PBS stations!**

**We CAN'T just stand by as Trump and Musk take direct aim at PBS,** so we've launched an urgent Live Petition to PROVE Democrats support funding this all-American institution. We need 3,500 more signatures by midnight -- **please, don't delay:**

name: Team Yass
subject: Re: our recent survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Peter, Last month, our team sent along a survey to ask what issues you’re most concerned with, and this team was not shy in sharing their responses. According to the survey, many of us are concerned with the attacks on immigrants by the Trump Administration, the GOP’s attempts to roll back our progress on the climate crisis and the continued attacks on the right to reproductive freedom. We hear you, Peter, and **so does Yassamin.** Among the top priorities people expressed in our survey were protecting immigrants’ rights, addressing the climate crisis, and defending reproductive freedoms. Yassamin knows that immigrants don’t make our communities dangerous, _they make them stronger_. Immigrants, refugees, and asylum seekers have a right to a just and humane immigration process, one that respects their dignity and the rule of law. She also knows that the climate crisis isn’t a problem for tomorrow or for the next generation, _it’s a crisis NOW, and is the defining issue of our time_. As a climate policy expert, Yassamin knows that it will take bold and ambitious action in order to clean up the air and water and put us on track to repair the human damage to our environment. And Yassamin is dedicated to ensuring that we stop the rollback of reproductive freedoms and enshrine reproductive healthcare as a right, once and for all. Everyone deserves the right to make decisions over their own bodies, access the healthcare services that are right for them, and the right to seek them privately without government intervention. _**[If you’re with us in this critical work, we could use your support today. Will you pitch in $10 or whatever works best for you this week to help us keep up this work?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103504075/532374201/1386712341?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250308_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjBjY2M4MC03MGZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QTDdHz4ABckFRIBiBGCI7-z87fx2YcKcW-ODSJQP9sM=)**_ _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103504076/532374202/1386712341?express=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250308_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjBjY2M4MC03MGZjLWVmMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QTDdHz4ABckFRIBiBGCI7-z87fx2YcKcW-ODSJQP9sM=)

body:
I’ll pay for everything! Just enter to win before my contest closes.
| | | |

clean_body: Our efforts are diminished, and our progress is stalled. Now’s your chance to reactivate, Friend. | | | | Friend... I'm not sure how to say this... But I think it's time for us to face the truth... Your membership has expired, and now I 'm lost. We had some great times, standing our House GOP Majority. But now, it seems like you've moved on. | | | | "Generic Button" I remember the good times when you were a crucial part of our team. Your support meant everything to us, and we were unstoppable together. But now, everything is at risk. | | | "Generic Button" Look, I'm not here to beg you to come back. But I want you to know that we're not the same without you. Our efforts are diminished, and our progress is stalled. | | | | "Generic Button" "If you're willing to try again, I'm here to give it another shot. Renew your membership, and let's see if we can rekindle what we once had. " Renewing your membership would mean the world to me, Friend, can I count on you to take this step and make a difference? | | | "Generic Button" Yours truly, Dan, Membership Services | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Sign up for our free online course, "Totalitarian Novels," taught by Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn.

In this course, Dr. Arnn explores the oppressive nature of totalitarian governments by looking at some of the best literature on the subject: George Orwell's _1984_ , Aldous Huxley's _Brave New World_ , Arthur Koestler's _Darkness at Noon_ , and C.S. Lewis's _That Hideous Strength_.

In the third lecture, Dr. Arnn examines the regime in Aldous Huxley's _Brave New World_ , which relies on pleasure and consumerism to keep its citizens docile.

Click the secure link below to start today:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/totalitarian-novels**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/VWTjvbR5oGlqtMnN55FLZNzv0Wglr9OhChZT0x2ZiFAlvI4XcIzYv4hFqiwv1oYGpGo5vi10oZsm8RMbhVsGlYRBwwlJIFOBBQb9QS-uHPGy_hJStPtWhEehYtKM8CW35mhg9a3Jv-v0fUwAs19wfy9Y1efyJMo92aBdswWKX5UiMzX0ilK3G0r0N1tZ5pnyCDGJXt80Y_9mHpUXrlBuw-bmwxSv34ObMORqmAZuYUjAtszfeZFf2INuE2nxxnwm3S2gNEGbBY3NtJJNgMmJpvOhsDYQwBTLJadP-bop3g-LANhzDBCgsofpliE1DSi-ife4gpq4XuoiNudP_J7Me-Hi0idqBzB2TSTVFj0U9xgzhN7kGbT4-UxjoVAoTuFgrAHFVPdzoNJSVOXhRRvd8SJ3m6T6I9H2ULLLll8MPOvowj2TDGDATO46kEZFdOMWE9rt5FQao6FMHSGcvoR8bJg7y9DK/VhQj5veDus5obEy6Jk6KzGD_kcIpXw94/6)

name: Truth to Power
subject: Health care cuts coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39506%2E3422442%2EWbaFWn)
Derek,
A new non-partisan report from the Congressional Budget Office this week has confirmed what we already knew: the GOP budget will mean drastic cuts to our health care.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250308-3?refcode=em20250308-39506&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39506_3422442_WbaFWn&akid=39506%2E3422442%2EWbaFWn)
We have been sounding the alarm since House Republicans first introduced their harmful budget bill, but some GOP politicians tried to obscure the truth by claiming slashing health care wasn’t required.
They can’t hide from this anymore. This new budget report makes clear that legislators cannot meet the spending goals they’ve outlined unless they cut Medicare or Medicaid. So, either the budget they passed is a lie, or their promise about not slashing health care is a lie.
We deserve leaders in Washington who tell us the truth and work on solutions that get families the help and care they need. Our work starts now to flip the House and Senate in 2026.
**[Will you support Truth to Power in our mission to elect more Democrats and restore honesty and transparency to government?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250308-3?refcode=em20250308-39506&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39506_3422442_WbaFWn&akid=39506%2E3422442%2EWbaFWn)**
Thanks,
TTP

Former U.S. Congresswoman Katie Porter founded Truth to Power to support the campaigns of her fellow Democrats. Truth to Power supports candidates who will stand up to Donald Trump, fight to lower costs, and protect the environment. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20250308-39506&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39506_3422442_WbaFWn&akid=39506%2E3422442%2EWbaFWn)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39506%2E3422442%2EWbaFWn).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

| | You probably thought the election ended on November 5th, but control of the House isn’t settled yet.

The democrats could still win control...

**Here is where things stand:**
**Republicans:****217**
**Democrats: 215**
**Undecided: 3**

If the Democrats win the three special elections in FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21, the US House would FLIP to the control of Nancy Pelosi.

My name is Jimmy Patronis, and I’m the Republican Nominee in the FL-01 race.

**I’m facing a well-funded liberal who has a real shot of beating me, and since this race isn’t getting any national attention, my campaign is seriously underfunded.**

This seat is anyone’s game, and if we want to keep our MAGA Majority in Congress, I need your financial support.

Team,

President Trump and Republicans promised to cut prices "on day one." **Now, two months into their term, prices have only gone up.**
* Working families already struggling are now hit with Trump’s ‘Trade War Sales Tax’ — **costing the average family up to $2,000 this year alone.**
* The stock market is falling, and economists are bracing for a recession.
* To make matters worse, House Republicans are working to cut Social Security and Medicare benefits to line the pockets of billionaires like Elon Musk.

It’s apparent that Trump and House Republicans don’t care about hardworking Americans – **but we won’t stand for it.**
